I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN.| | | [](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=cd5c375444bd49759b131d52463f1031&_m=52562cb4c75a47c2830f76eb08f433b9&_e=Hs3l-qNKGpiYdv50BGxsoDRWNJA13HdV_BNiejWbpT-5DD2gLH9NcRfKOF9ocUyiv7AjnTs2f9Q3IJ529Q7szWjE1zVBhDaNAcpBeOXuyt1kB5RW5DBCY7wGCoDMNAxFqFdSVpWnZKdZAd2BdfjxvTUxIJAeUx9GGVK5ThyfFXBfJUm8mC1_6dcJq-uPg6ZRRCKTgAe1Qg_speLsRCifHQh7c1a6JOgxASB9Fkigov3PG7TekNkiFt-k1ilxcM9J0qcf9L1PIFG_IfThcd9mnjmMOpeVguvhQNa4x_mUzR2wUQm3JeYozI2UFZhY4lwsPTAps7sSE1ZpCnDxX0hFUz5eitIUr_LdplkscLK06K6mZufm3AoD74dtGDuKhyHn)

| | Peter, I know something about winning close races. Last month, I won the newly-drawn 10th Congressional District in Michigan by just 1,600 votes. Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, _[**and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=cd5c375444bd49759b131d52463f1031&_m=52562cb4c75a47c2830f76eb08f433b9&_e=Hs3l-qNKGpiYdv50BGxsoDRWNJA13HdV_BNiejWbpT-5DD2gLH9NcRfKOF9ocUyiv7AjnTs2f9Q3IJ529Q7szWjE1zVBhDaNAcpBeOXuyt1kB5RW5DBCY7wGCoDMNAxFqFdSVpWnZKdZAd2BdfjxvTUxIJAeUx9GGVK5ThyfFXBfJUm8mC1_6dcJq-uPg6ZRRCKTgAe1Qg_speLsRCifHctyhG6_rB9-Y5FBRQg8PICebsldD8WksRtEbzfVuMjvKEY0-_BB7VNBZS8pX2NQDKfncag2oL_RAAfnZH0TmB8z1t7b7lcgw2FHSzRKlf1CvCGVb5Dfg08eY4aXiH_yruhsoWE7tJmwFp8_VnNNVr4FJ_r9rtmGUZ-tZU8dRTiy)_
---
[](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=cd5c375444bd49759b131d52463f1031&_m=52562cb4c75a47c2830f76eb08f433b9&_e=Hs3l-qNKGpiYdv50BGxsoDRWNJA13HdV_BNiejWbpT-5DD2gLH9NcRfKOF9ocUyiv7AjnTs2f9Q3IJ529Q7szWjE1zVBhDaNAcpBeOXuyt1kB5RW5DBCY7wGCoDMNAxFqFdSVpWnZKdZAd2BdfjxvTUxIJAeUx9GGVK5ThyfFXBfJUm8mC1_6dcJq-uPg6ZRRCKTgAe1Qg_speLsRCifHZBaA_AV__jAv5Eb0o0CbbCAlZFq9QjadkDxU2T6RWGFgIju60D60eAVYPDRQpUuqmpojsGhISPiSM_1ooNCT2OtYkjtisEeu_xfPfP8V9KvNjqorosd7r-61RY-29XGKid9iu4TZDfrsGiaAx7Lfyglve2Xj-YsUK_hCxrEroId)

It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate, because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That’s why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia. We’ve seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We’ve seen how they’ve treated the men and women who serve our country. We’ve seen how they’ve left our border WIDE OPEN. It’s time for a change. That’s why I’m excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate. **We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.** _[**That’s why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Peter. Please chip in $5, $10, $34, or whatever you can spare to help Herschel win tomorrow!**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=cd5c375444bd49759b131d52463f1031&_m=52562cb4c75a47c2830f76eb08f433b9&_e=Hs3l-qNKGpiYdv50BGxsoDRWNJA13HdV_BNiejWbpT-5DD2gLH9NcRfKOF9ocUyiv7AjnTs2f9Q3IJ529Q7szWjE1zVBhDaNAcpBeOXuyt1kB5RW5DBCY7wGCoDMNAxFqFdSVpWnZKdZAd2BdfjxvTUxIJAeUx9GGVK5ThyfFXBfJUm8mC1_6dcJq-uPg6ZRRCKTgAe1Qg_speLsRCifHUZgigmCKo2UfuKSWR9V-pEXJngfjhF7LBb1hLL_z_BBePnlhfz3GimNzFUjnxrlb_WTo5DGQTWg-qdfnwcE4iCHTZoXBDoVE7TfPvzYZMwAhkjrICaQmdSfatdDWFOCwx-4yeeikw0c6We4xv5aHZ7hVzukQ3CP9RhgqiriTAER)_ Thank you,

clean_body: Get us across that finish line! | | As you know, Derek, this race is incredibly close which means reproductive rights, voting rights, our democracy and so much more are all on the line. We cannot afford to give up any ground in this runoff! Young Democrats will have the opportunity to help Georgia do two things: keep Senator Warnock where he belongs in the U.S. Senate, and send a strong message that we don't need a Walker. We need a Runner. ** We have 1 more day to send a message. Let's continue to help our volunteers for election day by hitting $7,5000 or more in our Georgia campaign fund by midnight tonight. We'll need to greet voters and cure ballots to make sure that every vote gets counted! Keep fighting the good fight. Onward, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. **Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Fellow American,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0fb7629619874c8aa27023c34c82416b&_e=IRkLbzxjRl-Wp8KDcODFuz45hDMzF7jrAd5DdTSnpL7VRA2DPKXmIw_zgEHDtLOjRRB_B76SsZiBUBNxy-t1I6pgf8xNj5jrmt_jnOn_lGjXHCFL5AMQ8VLt3Xj3ZHX6_EnB3RYEO38wCumrKWsvKofovyLK1ynJbc7iFYU-rGyRUqnsGtgaw-M1mgVy3-hSj57AAW2CJGfvfdkq8wmEUowsHYIkeOzGfgiQCRcvM9WpXOLoLHcwxUeycwocVQPEOxvDy_vDrTVNlXnFXRJrCeOJIQMxWr6JcejapWx4CmnQY3zemA-DRIOV1KpsvQMncBYOsUDC7PCB31mcUHmVElsxNTgxaB10mdSn5p3qLh6FtblJpLbkp-IVBAXv_hd4kD5WnNO81fC7CsEekWSBu-w32UL9EmQNdtmt_swHb_4yjC-8PXibH2fQcB75kE43)
Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing tomorrow! Please chip in $5 or more to help our ground game.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0fb7629619874c8aa27023c34c82416b&_e=IRkLbzxjRl-Wp8KDcODFuz45hDMzF7jrAd5DdTSnpL7VRA2DPKXmIw_zgEHDtLOjRRB_B76SsZiBUBNxy-t1I6pgf8xNj5jrmt_jnOn_lGjXHCFL5AMQ8VLt3Xj3ZHX6_EnB3RYEO38wCumrKWsvKofovyLK1ynJbc7iFYU-rGyRUqnsGtgaw-M1mgVy3-hSj57AAW2CJGfvfdkq8wmEUowsHYIkeOzGfgiQCRcvM9WpXOLoLHcwxUeycwocVQPEOxvDy_vDrTVNlXnFXRJrCeOJIQMxWr6JcejapWx4CmkmxFi_Z1AOo-WN3DTxjerQSH2TlbLvV9RRHm6afxkZ0XWvej1S4qW3Sk75uXueexh04WZEGa4gnEkcfuu0s13eXUD6axrJ6kZK8EuYY1pkzHaKxmhnJ6jqUj4I_WTuENyPoQNiZpMS_WJpCP0ntP3_)**

clean_body: I have some bad news. | Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never. Fellow American, The runoff election is less than 24 hours away. We are trying to make every hour count, but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be. We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow. Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history. We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff. Fellow American, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, our entire campaign suffers. If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose. It's now or never. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

| **We are just hours away from the runoff election in Georgia. We need all hands on deck!**

**[Friend, will you be one of the Patriots who help us flip Georgia red?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d2f0c33b8f5e4e42a189bab9cda9dd02&_e=01O_X5inSfGSztOGT6V22-s9rnx_keVwlzFG-GHAKnVYI4DOOT0jnrGDf-7qT2JVFRAIG9qDo2eZRV3uaeXxuUkjoNlbK3DFVI4Bzn3SbgGDpv5HKi5vBCPwKmV3UFUg8N829fliosY0mlpn8bD_HdBt_RB-vyC69HPAhrgEpoq1CqqcwaDvM-UDCbiVCr1D934aPB4h9na1ANWQ3okV8SN2oGThSOukQKu4lgXurPgDcqQd49NEpQaY8jsY2Dciq3gcCMeen1Lku7BnBtsbCKh_jydYrc4d1cf8JspytutO9Qttjn0Xz3hhX4V-rUVX8QiPeS5f6BXTo7f0iEj_jz8CGajyJo85HRmkevT4Q6vvZX4NSRGRGS0iK7npd_7UGz9wbmzbYwnm0FcWsXBNqgA-njkriz-681AGbAJAbidPUWzz4Z8cPdgLvWYT9_VxAwi6dGU6HEwv4GBPStpCfkEs66ajhMSwnFQbBet0x0CznCOyBHPxIM_-tjmGuy8IyuQ5vBS2URhsbUaP0GZOEA%3D%3D) This is no time to sit on the sidelines. It's our last chance to defeat a rubber stamp in the U.S. Senate for the Biden agenda.**

| [**HELP US STOP THE RADICAL LEFT** ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=d2f0c33b8f5e4e42a189bab9cda9dd02&_e=01O_X5inSfGSztOGT6V22-s9rnx_keVwlzFG-GHAKnVYI4DOOT0jnrGDf-7qT2JVFRAIG9qDo2eZRV3uaeXxuUkjoNlbK3DFVI4Bzn3SbgGDpv5HKi5vBCPwKmV3UFUg8N829fliosY0mlpn8bD_HdBt_RB-vyC69HPAhrgEpoq1CqqcwaDvM-UDCbiVCr1D934aPB4h9na1ANWQ3okV8SN2oGThSOukQKu4lgXurPgDcqQd49NEpQaY8jsY2Dciq3gcCMeen1Lku7BnBtsbCKh_jydYrc4d1cf8JspytutO9Qttjn0Xz3hhX4V-rUVX8QiPeS5f6BXTo7f0iEj_jx84-trAbvlL-fc4CSXRXyyHwwWcNp-SxHX0q8CUZAE2r_aWMO79hIiNb-Vdp0dbvoDdN3pHi1hjx5YVAiACHQIE-egTfC8tF1uoHHTqThltqLuvVFdXTDX14boqBRadYDmt2Qz4lpiluoPYQq15IdfHTmPh9Jl_bu5bKCUzI87QNkzqbVXh-GwcUs0qUPFTuw%3D%3D)

name: GA Dems
subject: Polls just closed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55599496/382181329/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGJjYzYxZC1mZDc0LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gwyHhE4ZeeW6onP9Ry_tB-EYzDOjIJYyeWDElZseUdY=&emci=ccbfad85-5a73-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=3dbcc61d-fd74-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, polls just closed in Georgia and we just wanted to say thank you for all of your hard work and support.

None of this would have been possible without you.

Unlike the 2021 runoffs, we had just one month to reach out to voters across the state to make sure they turned out to vote for Rev. Warnock one more time.

We laid everything out for Rev. Warnock in the Senate runoff, and we would not be in the position we’re in if it weren't for your belief that we could re-elect Rev. Warnock and keep his seat blue.

We were up against a lot in this runoff, but because of your support, we showed that Georgia is competitive and cannot be ignored.

Thank you for believing in and investing in Rev. Warnock and Georgia. We’re so thankful to have you as a part of our team as we continue fighting for a better Georgia.

– GA Dems
---
|
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, don’t scroll away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
Friends—I’ll keep this short:

TOMORROW is runoff Election Day for this important Senate race in Georgia.
With only hours left to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything
in their power to defeat me.

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the
GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker—and why Mitch McConnell's super
PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your
grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once
before, and I know we can do it again.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31935?t=1008&amount=32&akid=6470%2E3611125%2ErJkOLK ]So please, friends, will you split $32 between me and Tim
Ryan—or as much as you can spare today—to help me defeat Herschel Walker
and win in Georgia?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Forever grateful
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
| | | Your help could not come at a more pivotal time. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBiYwwL1D7bWw_LcFxdEpr1hlSrr1MS-x-ARNNq5pJtB1dx8NMlpdQAwvda9dEHZkByhpdsigGdOc_N49YqxuzrnKE98yxH-jphS_CITiwQc81RE7G_Q2Om9ZDdxm5tUIwFdKK9UZwvoY_3yngVQVR9w65NVBdm18uZS8c6cOZxWHZLmQVRZk9CEtj2K2dZI7tnAWPhSl7klQ7OZOD_6_-owftHF9L392vuk_nkwffQw5nsiH-zKwnf9G22e5bArBkgzSW2XA8tOEnvOaG6aW7Y50eWu2rtil8lkajKM5Nyfs_/3rr/V5kMHrIaSEGRy39MINchuw/h0/r4lcIIRgsHvdLzhcKHfI88M21AbEUkSqaqRdq1eSE38) | | Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we have had another great month preparing our team for the election ahead of us and engaging with the community.

I know the power of community-driven grassroots movements, and I could not be more grateful to have you with us. My team and I are working around the clock to ensure we have the resources to hit the ground running in 2023. All of our efforts would not be possible without you.

While we celebrate small victories, like another successful month engaging and mobilizing the community, we cannot take our eyes off the end goal.

Electing me as Houston’s next mayor and creating a city where every Houstonian can thrive is no small task. _**That’s why I have to ask one more time, team:**_ **_[whether you’re a long-time supporter or just joining us, will you contribute just $5 to my campaign right now to help us start December off strong? body:
| But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1425%2E5257348%2EY0y870)
**Derek, President Obama and I just had our rally here in Georgia.** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.MVT3tr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221205_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1425%2E5257348%2EY0y870)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **Tomorrow, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue.**
But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead in these final days.
They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical Election Day goal before midnight tonight.
**Derek, I'm asking:[Will you please split $10 – or whatever you can between me and Adam Schiff – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221205_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1425%2E5257348%2EY0y870)**

Friend,
---
Joe Biden is on the brink of building a 51-seat majority in the Senate.
---
**_But America has ONE Hail Mary left to stop that doomsday scenario... Herschel Walker MUST win Tuesday’s Georgia runoff._**
---
_This is your FINAL CHANCE to help Herschel Walker win the runoff and save America._
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: just $3
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
With less than 24 hours until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.

**$3** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today.
Your $3 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With less than **24 hours** until the runoff election, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $3 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please: Will you split $3 now between me and Peter Welch to shore up our Democratic Senate majority and fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**
**Here's a special link just for you:[secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-warnock](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5286?t=2&akid=1216%2E61531%2ENQfq11)**
Thank you for pitching in. I truly appreciate your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Will You Be Joining Us For This?
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=1) Peter -- I'm extremely excited to spend an evening with great patriots this Thursday. From Dr. Neil Shah to Mark Bishofsky to newly elected-senator Nathan Wesenberg, we have a great line up in store. The Mermaid venue is going to need final numbers from us ASAP, so if you are hoping to join us on Thursday night, **please grab your tickets now**. I can't guarantee that we'll be able to sell tickets in a couple days if we hit capacity. Join me on Thursday night to hear a special message from a pro-health freedom doctor! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=2) Dr. Shah is a Mayo trained medical doctor who has built an impressive and ever-growing privately owned medical practice in Minnesota. He's not afraid to speak his mind, even when it goes against the mainstream narrative on COVID and the experimental jab. Dr. Shah is well researched, articulate and has a wide grasp on medicine. But he doesn't like what he's seeing from his colleagues in the medical profession. COVID brought forward the "Death of Science!" **As you know, we'll be giving away an AR-15 and other firearms. You don't need to buy a raffle - just get a dinner ticket today, and you'll be entered to win.** Tickets are $60 per person, or $120 for a couple. We have special kids rates as well. Dinner included! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=3 "REGISTER NOW") [REGISTER NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=3)
---
Our annual Christmas events are loads of fun. And we have a couple extra fun things planned, but you'll have to buy a ticket to find out what it is.
Plus, this is your chance to learn about what we are going to do in 2023 to protect liberty in Minnesota.
So please join me and hundreds of other patriots on Thursday night!
## **WHEN: Thursday, Dec 8th (Doors open at 5:00pm)**
## **WHERE: The Mermaid, Mounds View**
## **[YES, Please Sign Me Up](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20221208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=4)**
See you on Dec 8th!

Jake Duesenberg
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=5)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=6)[http://www.action4liberty.com/](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_invite_5_0&n=7)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We can’t let this trend continue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Now that we’re officially in December and approaching the end of 2022, our fundraising efforts are more urgent than ever as we race to make sure every box is checked for our budget. Unfortunately, our latest internal review of our finances shows our numbers rapidly declining -- **_we can’t let this trend continue, Peter.**_
[**We’re asking you to chip in $3 right now to help us get our fundraising back on track -- can Pramila count on your support today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24257?refcode=em20221205-1923&t=1&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY)
**If _just 102 folks_ reading this email donated $3 to our campaign, we’ll get the fundraising boost we need** to keep Pramila in a strong position as she fights every day for the transformative policies we deserve.
Simply put, our fundraising has lagged behind where it needs to be these last few months. And catching up right now means Pramila won’t have to worry so much about fundraising going into a new session of Congress with a GOP-controlled House.
The clock is ticking towards the end of the year, which means our final fundraising deadline is drawing closer. [**Can you donate $3 to help us reverse this dramatic decline in fundraising?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24257?refcode=em20221205-1923&t=2&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY) **_Our fundraising must be strong heading into these last few critical few days of December._**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24257?refcode=em20221205-1923&t=21&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY)**
Your small-dollar donations go a long way to help Pramila fight back against the corporate lobbyists from Wall Street, Big Oil, and health insurance companies. With your support, Pramila can continue the fight to protect our environment, codify our rights, and expand our social safety net.
**Listen, we really need to see a boost in our fundraising numbers right now, or we’ll be in a much weaker position for 2023 -- and that’s not acceptable when so much is on the line.**
[**We're counting on you, Peter -- any amount at all truly makes a difference for us. Please consider donating what you can to give us a much-needed boost before the end of the year.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24257?refcode=em20221205-1923&t=22&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/24257?refcode=em20221205-1923&t=23&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY)**
Thank you for your steadfast support for Pramila – we appreciate you, Peter.
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221205-1923-footer&t=24&refcode2=1923_420207_7S4IAY&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1923%2E420207%2E7S4IAY)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: John James
subject: too close to call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. |
---
Fellow American,

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, **[and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b558e25efc56416ba5f6b0ea99fb5110&_e=9YtVgH6qFuJ8Fuqr1mYlAWT614Bym8I9mFl1FJmr6pyp2hiUaCmb83_7BlS8riT2wF7XxgrU3BiCVansCBKf-pMPfdVHBng2aNP1pJpdHyXzZA5gqUN1rp2Tal2saN9v3rlMoujMw6OB1zX7JbPgngm5bYK_U--N98fQw7qTftvBP-UgJaStSoB5q8Ypau10e1F9WSjV6VwU0k2tEnwGBcIyTz6bOUJX7brBsWPc0xurR5H7UxyKGk0MFTVqOMvVYaLKcVj7HOnhR-TLn4EufEEjdX6tr96UiuZ59dwBYnWc_uxFoctRpg_cVpITyS9J8mpWY4psqrA4hsiPbZ2PGduotFzOpPdSU_3K800ieV5m2GAylGeqXmngNYSljSyl59_Tp8BKtf3-FUvGvjfJdeg8ZjIHOrAU8_LZG_8ZqLEDQfGYlQKCQ-i4-ZiogcSpYTnIqWI_qwrRGbRPMp8m-A%3D%3D)**

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b558e25efc56416ba5f6b0ea99fb5110&_e=9YtVgH6qFuJ8Fuqr1mYlAWT614Bym8I9mFl1FJmr6pyp2hiUaCmb83_7BlS8riT2wF7XxgrU3BiCVansCBKf-pMPfdVHBng2aNP1pJpdHyXzZA5gqUN1rp2Tal2saN9v3rlMoujMw6OB1zX7JbPgngm5bYK_U--N98fQw7qTftvBP-UgJaStSoB5q8Ypau10e1F9WSjV6VwU0k2tEnwGBcIyTz6bOUJX7brBsWPc0xurR5H7UxyKGk0MFTVqOMvVYaLKcVj7HOnhR-TLn4EufEEjdX6tr96UiuZ59dwBYnXHlSrTP6JLhZJSfpo20HZr_TbJpnSlFQxRbbAb1W97o51iCzKqNd_WYpMwinKqTwlFF3hmf8wvk47qhderWVeQ8fJb0cHfEkspVmYcvNGMYGX0DSVd4i4SKIOBruJyfVNrcKEuLPSMeRyT4BA9jWgt9NYZTg3SjVHv6SnOJyapug%3D%3D)
It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia.

We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN.

It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate.

**We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.**

**[That's why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Fellow American. Please chip in $5, $10, $34, or whatever you can spare to help Herschel win tomorrow!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b558e25efc56416ba5f6b0ea99fb5110&_e=9YtVgH6qFuJ8Fuqr1mYlAWT614Bym8I9mFl1FJmr6pyp2hiUaCmb83_7BlS8riT2wF7XxgrU3BiCVansCBKf-pMPfdVHBng2aNP1pJpdHyXzZA5gqUN1rp2Tal2saN9v3rlMoujMw6OB1zX7JbPgngm5bYK_U--N98fQw7qTftvBP-UgJaStSoB5q8Ypau10e1F9WSjV6VwU0k2tEnwGBcIyTz6bOUJX7brBsWPc0xurR5H7UxyKGk0MFTVqOMvVYaLKcVj7HOnhR-TLn4EufEEjdX6tr96UiuZ59dwBYnUm-VhdV9eNXKuOmK72UN_u82hsLzRCcgRpQTYK34pSugAaB6ECm6KmWx8UUjpPoc4o4asQQ1QBKU378c93O4Xd5hZ5Az4x65gqLYPyCJH-84ANHDwwmnQ_u2uz40ernxJpXbw96NUnaUX4mtfXmS1aDyVqcO8NOao2mKUWr1tfWQ%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b558e25efc56416ba5f6b0ea99fb5110&_e=9YtVgH6qFuJ8Fuqr1mYlAWT614Bym8I9mFl1FJmr6pyp2hiUaCmb83_7BlS8riT2wF7XxgrU3BiCVansCBKf-pMPfdVHBng2aNP1pJpdHyXzZA5gqUN1rp2Tal2saN9v3rlMoujMw6OB1zX7JbPgngm5bYK_U--N98fQw7qTftvBP-UgJaStSoB5q8Ypau10e1F9WSjV6VwU0k2tEnwGBcIyTz6bOUJX7brBsWPc0xurR5H7UxyKGk0MFTVqOMvVYaLKcVj7HOnhR-TLn4EufEEjdX6tr96UiuZ59dwBYnUI3qgar43qQTzcAG27y1sjNewkBk6ihlMf5NJ6KbMOA5pcrJ_JKxTToD_YYb5eoUI0i2NpAthKlj-rQa77nbP1QPeyEK4FelFlUo2DoWrwr4tdINKQEu79haHcIfGokJYOPx58MooBZDIGff0nAYgOW7OkGXN2D1SJEtiWKqhTuA%3D%3D)

John James

body:
I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. |
---
Fellow American,

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, **[and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=11a7f4718a5d4270921284e46aaa3765&_e=YGxe3TROXkUs50EecKCtli63Pjkehqbs5X1aftcBFuxUgAX6O9YoLzm6LHz3l1bN9JuF6Bd7yvyWyOHSdJsidD6rRz1xiJnZi9upG7osCfpU_mMRqJEO9o4sDxgLPu6c-iXdLEu_7qboonO3Xe3vs-kSFr19lyjNLruwkSeL07AnRCdtN7QoZ2kkDnoPRuXAm51mxMptLDHBEYtHlAWVNK9DR1SXK_OyOPpqy-Ln9GBanjqpoq1jv1n8u3WvgFzrIgCgKrObGW1nisjxhJpHlweb3frgC1V4Tem_bVqVWagDk54kDEVqRFRXPTaFzWS9YJYMSeRmWzgbnlzYqCxTMEbaw2xhUgcxwO0Rms1ylnDHELDs3NDkAiIc3GOdPCkw3jiWDizzgOtXkpRNvLeFCjVKUBeE79Nzn7gE66UHjnIcCd_X8IyXEhBYsEYESQNq)**

It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia.

We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN.

It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate.

**We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.**

**[That's why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Fellow American. Please chip in $5, $10, $34, or whatever you can spare to help Herschel win tomorrow!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=11a7f4718a5d4270921284e46aaa3765&_e=YGxe3TROXkUs50EecKCtli63Pjkehqbs5X1aftcBFuxUgAX6O9YoLzm6LHz3l1bN9JuF6Bd7yvyWyOHSdJsidD6rRz1xiJnZi9upG7osCfpU_mMRqJEO9o4sDxgLPu6c-iXdLEu_7qboonO3Xe3vs-kSFr19lyjNLruwkSeL07AnRCdtN7QoZ2kkDnoPRuXAm51mxMptLDHBEYtHlAWVNK9DR1SXK_OyOPpqy-Ln9GBanjqpoq1jv1n8u3WvgFzrIgCgKrObGW1nisjxhJpHlweb3frgC1V4Tem_bVqVWaiB8PgDwR9SuUM8M6NZQW8-vSCYfElNKAmpNm-73giHKpQa3o8LkNIJNCEkP9Lg5aFA4ONBI7uOEIoUHo1I8hRcWrurdYePZQ61hw_Owox_I9UFksThn0pps8pjGEot8_gFdQDTUZAEUqboy9p2e3Ya)**

clean_body: I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. | Fellow American, I know something about winning close races. Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes. Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia. We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN. It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate. We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations. Thank you, John James Congressman-Elect | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

clean_body: I'm urgently asking | | | Friend, this is important: Herschel Walker and I are in a neck-and-neck runoff, and this crucial race ends tomorrow. With the entire GOP establishment behind Walker, defending this seat will come down to your grassroots support. So I’m urgently asking:= Here’s why your support today couldn’t be more important: Even before the runoff, experts were calling me the most vulnerable senator on the ballot. That’s why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the GOP are coming after me as their top target for defeat. They have poured more than $58 MILLION into Walker’s campaign to flip this seat. With our very democracy at stake, it’s never been more urgent to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and pull ahead in this must-win runoff race. That’s why we just set a critical goal to raise $100,000 by midnight – but with just a few hours left, we’re dangerously short. So please, friend, I’m counting on you:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for stepping up when it matters most, friend. I truly appreciate it. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock: Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win. Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory. If you're with me, = If you'd like to become one of my TOP supporters and receive exclusive updates from our campaign team, text "GEORGIA" to 52005. clean_body: Get us across that finish line! | We're getting there, Derek! Wanted to get this in front of you before midnight tonight. Your generosity so far has translated to over 5,000+ voter contacts this weekend. Imagine how many more we can get if you donate now. -\--------- Forwarded message --------- From: Stop Herschel Walker <info@yda.org> Date: December 06, 2022 at 1:15 PM EDT Subject: FW: Chipping in $25 now can mean 100's of votes. | Derek. We cannot allow Herschel Walker to be in the Senate tomorrow. We know that the GOP will try to enact a nation wide abortion ban if they have equal numbers in the Senate and have the House Majority. Herschel can't be the only one to decide what people can do with their bodies. If Herschel can order women to get abortion despite being "pro-life", people should be able to make that decision for themselves too. Just $25 now can mean a world of a difference tomorrow. Tonight and tomorrow, we are still working to turn the vote out. We're making phone calls. We're knocking doors. We're texting voters. Anything and everything to stop Herschel Walker. We are all in on Georgia until December 6th. Keep fighting the good fight. Onward, YDA | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. To help us mobilize the next generation of Democrats, | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Young Democrats of America, please .

I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. |

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

clean_body: We’re already being massively outspent on the airways, and now George Soros is dumping in even more money. | Fellow American, The amount of spending from Super PACs and dark money groups against us has been incredible. I'm not a politician, but I understand that when your opponent throws everything in the playbook at you, it's a sign of desperation. Polls show this Senate runoff is a dead heat with less than 24 hours to go until Georgia voters cast their ballots. And now a new report indicates George Soros is dumping even more money into Georgia to defeat us. I need your help to fight back against the onslaught of outside money. Please allow me to be painstakingly clear: even if you've given recently, I need your support again if we're going to score a major win on Tuesday evening. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: , we'll work around the clock in the final 24 hours to make sure we can implement our ground game when it matters most - on Election Day. Time is money, and we're running about of both very quickly... Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Freedom First Project
subject: #1 Survival Item of 2022
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
# #1 Survival Item of 2022
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock**[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-_aCvNUrSV1YzelrTkg)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[**People are buying these in 4 packs – Learn More**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-0-zDa6R83GgCKUJSQaw) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads.We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it.The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours.The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand.And then... poof!GONE!Our inventory manager was asking..._**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow!And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now.That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:[**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-99RX2MA)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)| | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that – to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world – it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQwLTk2ZGY4YTlkYjIzNzRhMDc4YWM5OTdlODM4NmEzZTNiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/9hAGdJnhDHZg7xrRvXcDog) to unsubscribe.
---

scared of losing this seat to Herschel, and they’ve outspent the GOP 2:1 to defeat him.")**_To help us balance the scales before voting closes, we're gifting you a 15X-MATCH on any contribution to help push Herschel Walker to victory.

name: John James
subject: too close to call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. |
---
Peter,

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, **[and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3513c16d31e14d4292f1ed2aa28ac0b5&_e=oK1KFvsstS5yknbzNPiPKMNawuy_ImtF50RuX5e4FL8106asS2kAmOn-BwR7Unr2yekGojPYIhL3i9KlmMeheUDbxsFTLtA_oxOG2vuSCFBi_CSnonN4mQzj9p6yRvEHEPeXIcr4AAtb2GZTnyOBuid-9aLXpYIFytbBNjxFCLHrqw4Cidm1nySofu-d9HIFA-5mJC6c85frMP1VfEt5N63gSODz4u6HnSPcWAkw6y7NyjhcUSb3PmEIMx2ASvkIdi0JSN0YmlDekgEedD6I8kMOC-egBk8JzUT9Gs-hNykmb_8S7U9ToXrwMfUTme8jVJUFTZKlsaodC7x995eASE2nhhkRjyWHSzyweVn6Xhs3nJseeEh3Xdx3KW3gE_zm9CwAsaG2rrSboGsB4X1DQyIgzF-YigrjoRgBLpEIH9zfH-UZ6u9qXWzimJ3ZKPa-)**

[ ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3513c16d31e14d4292f1ed2aa28ac0b5&_e=oK1KFvsstS5yknbzNPiPKMNawuy_ImtF50RuX5e4FL8106asS2kAmOn-BwR7Unr2yekGojPYIhL3i9KlmMeheUDbxsFTLtA_oxOG2vuSCFBi_CSnonN4mQzj9p6yRvEHEPeXIcr4AAtb2GZTnyOBuid-9aLXpYIFytbBNjxFCLHrqw4Cidm1nySofu-d9HIFA-5mJC6c85frMP1VfEt5N63gSODz4u6HnSPcWAkw6y7NyjhcUSb3PmEIMx2ASvkIdi0JSN0YmlDekgEedD6I8kMOC-egBk8JzUT9Gs-hNylf7wei44mybiBLXTAofvoWctVTF-XsU5bbtXJxr1daHLWlfQKfMV_2GX1syo2QzBP9vmFdP2V8a26PREvaqosFZRC9HC64tsYKLOTcGUG2hsem3xhqgc-Uu9rXZj5NVju3lTKVzcjn-xc25YNfChF6)
It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia.

We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN.

It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate.

**We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.**

**[That's why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Peter. Please chip in $5, $10, $34, or whatever you can spare to help Herschel win tomorrow!](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3513c16d31e14d4292f1ed2aa28ac0b5&_e=oK1KFvsstS5yknbzNPiPKMNawuy_ImtF50RuX5e4FL8106asS2kAmOn-BwR7Unr2yekGojPYIhL3i9KlmMeheUDbxsFTLtA_oxOG2vuSCFBi_CSnonN4mQzj9p6yRvEHEPeXIcr4AAtb2GZTnyOBuid-9aLXpYIFytbBNjxFCLHrqw4Cidm1nySofu-d9HIFA-5mJC6c85frMP1VfEt5N63gSODz4u6HnSPcWAkw6y7NyjhcUSb3PmEIMx2ASvkIdi0JSN0YmlDekgEedD6I8kMOC-egBk8JzUT9Gs-hNylbUOOINiw19PH1RZtOo0534dUGBNs30ZNgj-odFNrB0eeiqeCOQmbqFFBp7fmKPPU46-F-KdztfU3Xd9cawXSy_7q2YPh6cLIQFPfS4HG359QnzZeBdcLWpGjj9FtgLmjVJzVfj5ScQWBes8IGj_eX)**

clean_body: I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. | Peter, I know something about winning close races. Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes. Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, - It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia. We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN. It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate. We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations. Thank you, John James Congressman-Elect | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

subject: 14,000 illegal crossings per day (not a typo!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
_THIS IS AN URGENT CALL TO ALL PATRIOTS:_
Joe Biden will let Title 42, a Trump-era border policy, end this month! **This is expected to result in a SURGE of illegal crossings across the southern border from 9,000 to 14,000 (not a typo!) migrants PER DAY.**
****[SIGN ON: SAVE TITLE 42](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030760:Jrj5NoGVN:m:1:3253819041:FDAA03E424E2BE7115160CFEE7E10A52:r)****
We need the power of each and every Patriot reading this to help us [**SAVE TITLE 42**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030760:Jrj5NoGVN:m:1:3253819041:FDAA03E424E2BE7115160CFEE7E10A52:r) right here and right now. This policy is set to expire at the end of the month, so we need all hands on deck.
[**The single most important way to help is to go on the record to SAVE TITLE 42.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030760:Jrj5NoGVN:m:1:3253819041:FDAA03E424E2BE7115160CFEE7E10A52:r)
_\-- Migrant shelters at the border are at capacity, leading to illegal immigrants being set free
\-- Border agents are overwhelmed
\-- Our communities are facing threats from drug cartels, human trafficking, and rising crime_
Under Joe Biden, we've seen the number of illegal crossings SKYROCKET. It's about to get so much worse. Experts estimate we've already had more than 2.3 million migrant encounters just this fiscal year!
We cannot let this continue. [**We need the force of our entire grassroots network to go on the record to help House Republicans SAVE TITLE 42 right here and right now before it 's too late!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030760:Jrj5NoGVN:m:1:3253819041:FDAA03E424E2BE7115160CFEE7E10A52:r)
****[SIGN ON: SAVE TITLE 42](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030760:Jrj5NoGVN:m:1:3253819041:FDAA03E424E2BE7115160CFEE7E10A52:r)****
We're counting on you, Peter.
Thank you,
House Conservatives

subject: The Georgia runoff is our last stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Why your $10 is important
| |
---
| | | Peter, Nikki Haley here!

Herschel Walker isn't just running to be Georgia's next U.S. senator. If he wins, he'll prevent Democrats from getting a critical 51st vote in their Senate majority.

This is why we need to win this crucial last race of 2022.

Republicans may not have a Senate majority, but a Herschel Walker win will give us another strong voice to stand against President Biden's dangerous and radical agenda.

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TO HERSCHEL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62030757:Jp2HQoGNQ:m:1:3331421248:0E5A79D19EBF8B999FD583B6B0BB7D31:r)
---

Today, Georgia voters will be going to the polls in RECORD numbers to decide whether this seat will remain blue or flip red. This is our last stand. We cannot afford a repeat of the 2020 runoff--when Democrats won both Senate seats.

So what do you say? We need Herschel in 2023, and Herschel needs us today.

My very best,
Nikki Haley

---

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0139%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=N2S2Y%2flEtpRfhzwMZ%2fplOQ&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42853%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aHXfIKIPM%2bpUd0Zydgsylg&sysid=1)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42854%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NJWUaTC5F1PZsb3RcRn%2f2Q&sysid=1)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42865%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iu76v0UyvZtBt1xKmsj77A&sysid=1)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2WBcIFEegfzGDZmgJdxX0w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42867%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4FZ9cHVFPSYs97znrTX%2fkA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42868%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c3%2bPxNhmr%2bGrvrUdVkxZKQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42869%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NQj57%2blWQ6zxFl3sgB%2bPwA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42860%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w1dkvYPeleXtw1Ht5NIy1g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42861%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wIjzeR8HgVImAjg2PjbWrw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42862%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y80ea0%2bx4licIcX4RhoqIQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42863%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f0ctN59suAmJ2AxiwVkS2w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42864%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mi97LMoN6WhxOiHJw8s5Ew&sysid=1)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42866%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2WBcIFEegfzGDZmgJdxX0w&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42861%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wIjzeR8HgVImAjg2PjbWrw&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42863%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2f0ctN59suAmJ2AxiwVkS2w&sysid=1)

People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?”

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Friend, I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you’re thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, “what about them is influential?!” This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren’t, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here’s how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m on the road and need your help
body:
You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were g
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj4501kbo0vuardgsabo89o5ock6rd8hkcf4l1vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4clh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3m5m0h0hldkaitl6q700j8mk1gb1b99r83g6p18_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4clh2bs)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcts4c2a2c0b2hoa8quv8trfe5btpfrjfbedqrmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4clh2bs)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4u9adbv8t4k5hvgruf3qpsqv30t6deq7a2sr1s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4clh2bs)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8qvifvcvpemp98g8gjdb7a55i8iiaprif2tnuf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4clh2bs)

Thank you so much for supporting these efforts--[together we can help kids across the U.S. get the education they deserve.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl4vu6corg2ftiovie1j64g8i9m4l1tdbeqk1neo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4clh2bs)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsati3t0fjmvlq4freoq9ppu0ppgl90abfilli48_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqe8s9lc1jbapdjc3ij5djmmoq71ptmcmp78thgcso76p1hegqe4s74cpge2s70sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj665rj6phnmaq6cdb4mdhmfc5lclp2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4qet8851v1c4a7vj7up7in96f504hls76lv5ro0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk3lqn1913ncne2p4sj78qiomf16ib48fctoj2eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsmgva7jsnc3d8ufre4uaoqu26cjd9c8uuv3k6mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob4cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zj0eeh7efpac94dktphljai9lri8d24lejpjchpg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5egpiit3c0897289cpt9fs0s4uijm6sivp64ip8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c1j64ob1chhm49fg)

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zs62vfukc57nkl491e3g6gthpr8ftlevr487c5p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob0cjh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _" Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product. "_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo14taeio8dgev43vl5ha8bf7m1km2696ehnlm4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph62ob0cjh2bs)**

Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61d52d8ep634o6te0afepm4481804e7817kfcdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph66oj1c1h2bs)

[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoi55gnddf7o1hqelrlfepmehofo33rvaverk8f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph66oj1c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsun691ffs58ckqr4fjsaqdg3152eenjfvs1blh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph66oj1c1h2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3rnhg67qf477c141v13gbvt03udc9pmolme9io0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph66oj1c1h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zujbpcborpdokto6id1kjqc6saiuk3u7opojb630_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph66oj1c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu3u6q2haa9qaham8q1u0pgse53sch801m01tj4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph66oj1c1h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znnlcevdp7kojaq75d0efuu9cpnhq81k6v9gt2jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph66oj1c1h2bs)

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031335:63O3soGtN:m:1:3253819041:23DCFE9DA43149099DFB1015F3C2C233:r)

| | |
