| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031335:63O3soGtN:m:1:3253819041:23DCFE9DA43149099DFB1015F3C2C233:r) Hi Peter,

**[Please chip in IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031335:63O3soGtN:m:1:3253819041:23DCFE9DA43149099DFB1015F3C2C233:r)**

(Because you're a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you've seen some of this information before... it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn't protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn't attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn't receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden's Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What's more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I've locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She's a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She's the absolute worst judge I've appeared before in 45 years.

And now she's throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Peter, I've filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera ' and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I'm suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus' home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can't be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents ' AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Peter, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift RIGHT NOW.
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031335:63O3soGtN:m:1:3253819041:23DCFE9DA43149099DFB1015F3C2C233:r)
I'm using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031335:63O3soGtN:m:1:3253819041:23DCFE9DA43149099DFB1015F3C2C233:r)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Peter, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031335:63O3soGtN:m:1:3253819041:23DCFE9DA43149099DFB1015F3C2C233:r) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I'm fighting for... and dig deep and chip in right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031335:63O3soGtN:m:1:3253819041:23DCFE9DA43149099DFB1015F3C2C233:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: A runoff request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51 seat majority. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7554%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=dd4PQVIWSzqqSSgA%2fQ46iQ&sysid=1)

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. We can hold him accountable, win this race and get our country back on track, _**[but we can only win if we have your help.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95219%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=49ETCP8zD0sczRslbHW72Q&sysid=1)**_

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95210%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fWECmLMV9VqGT9iTrlzCIA&sysid=1)
All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

**[That's why I am asking for your help.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95211%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BbsmEwMCiPaVizErKlXWng&sysid=1)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $5 →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95210%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fWECmLMV9VqGT9iTrlzCIA&sysid=1)
The Georgia runoff will be the last fight of 2022, so WE MUST WIN IT! We can flip a Democrat seat in the Senate, but I need your help. I know money is tight in this Biden-Warnock economy, **[but if you can chip in even $5 right now- it will help us reach out to undecided voters, implement our 'get-out-the-vote' program, and win!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95212%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zhpv%2fdm4YtCkCK%2biUaP4zQ&sysid=1)**

Every single dollar impacts how many more doors we can knock on, phone calls we can make, and voters we can reach. **[Please pitch in anything you're able ASAP, even if it's just $5.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95213%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y%2bIsysTFfJobT812kramiA&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY →**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=byWq%2bro36p%2f%2bUhcTO59g4A&sysid=1)

body:
a 51st Senate vote for Democrats

| | | | | Peter, | | **[Rush a $10 or $20 donation to Raphael Warnock’s re-election campaign for last minute Get Out The Vote Efforts All Day Today!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19c8feb2-446e-482a-903f-694c3aa51b08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **" Georgia, Georgia, the whole day through," Ray Charles sang. ** **This is exactly what we must keep in mind today: To fight this battle "the whole day through."_ No letting up until all the votes are in, counted and we've re-elected Senator Warnock. _** _**We've come too far to lose because we let up too soon. Too far to take our collective feet off the gas til we have that 51st vote and the judges & legislation that come with it. ****Too far to allow a no-nothing, Trump-worshipping, abortion-banning, violent, misogynistic, anti-Semite, Herschel Walker, steal the seat out from under us.**_ _**Today we take another step towards taking our country back--and like so many great political moments the past few years--it's gonna happen in Georgia.**_
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f13be3b-4f81-487c-ad5a-775f5063c8ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_This is, again, why I have "Georgia on my mind."_ ** **[So, with this new dawn to which we've awakened, let's bring about a new day in America. And we therefore ask, one more time, that you dig deep and please join us in rushing Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25, or more--so we can go win this thing.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1694daea-19e2-484c-90d8-86ec6d0ba8c5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you for what you've proven this past year--that we will fight for democracy, and as a great poet said, not go gentle into that goodnight. Cliff

name: Young Kim (R-CA)
subject: Just asking for your signature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Congresswoman Young Kim moved to the U.S. as a child not speaking one word of English.

| |
---
| | | | **ENDORSE YOUNG KIM**
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znjh3s13dg3vql31509gehqomcqu04c1vur29uso_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c3h2bs)
| [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0esee7t9s6ektrv6jbks9eq6cu9mb12ohn1201g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c3h2bs)
---

Friend, Congresswoman Young Kim moved to the U.S. as a child not speaking one word of English. Through dedication and a whole lot of perseverance, she's now one of the first Korean American women ever serving in Congress.

Young is a proud conservative who fights for commonsense solutions that improve our national security, lower taxes, support small businesses, decrease government overreach, and keep the American Dream alive for future generations.

Unfortunately, because she's a conservative woman and fearlessly calls out the Democrats' failed policies, she's constantly attacked by the Left. They're fighting hard to unseat her, and we're fighting hard to push back against them.

To boost our efforts and send a message to the Washington Democrats that Americans stand with Young Kim, we're launching our official endorsement petition and would like for you to sign.

**[We've set a goal to reach 150 signatures by midnight tonight. Will you give Young your endorsement by the deadline?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z350471ds42h8n2uadgmb3vqdkpg4hv6jnlbise8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c3h2bs "We’ve set a goal to reach 150 signatures by midnight tonight. Will you give Young your endorsement by the deadline?")**

Knowing we have your support is empowering and truly keeps us going. So if you're in the fight with us and hope to see Young in Congress another term, please give her your endorsement by midnight tonight.
---

| [**SIGN YOUR NAME**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbffu08ttcicfmsai1rv8vrhhjir4h1jj0dg7vr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c3h2bs)
---
* * *
__
_We 'll get straight to the point, Friend: _
__
_We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats._
__
__YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she 's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations.__
__
_[_**So, we 're humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4mtrko84d5fri7n9455js1vs8ha4dmmnodo7moo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c3h2bs)_

subject: 14,000 illegal crossings per day (not a typo!) 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
_THIS IS AN URGENT CALL TO ALL PATRIOTS:_
Joe Biden will let Title 42, a Trump-era border policy, end this month! **This is expected to result in a SURGE of illegal crossings across the southern border from 9,000 to 14,000 (not a typo!) migrants PER DAY.**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Just in time for Christmas
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk45hops09kemofqir6jsu0u4s76mvecvk5vp670_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpgu2rolsk7hov6u2t4t2s329dp235qpd1sl3mb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbrb1qh0repkf2048j9vpv9vqf8qkconht746os0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn75kuflkbd316pa9a7mh4rt320r2rda46vdot38_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh479p900frbm6q6irsdd4ktqibb64te6j23g670_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zab0r12jnodj9efdo3gppcgka42oue8v7m9jgoo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zabjge0qv2l523245p407o6espu0hhg27keo3ci0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9119gum2tua0k31er317rfr41ghs3797fbj0qog_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z50qt454k7sp9hnpgrqv4t20d2uuo1p60do9c688_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c5h2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

Raphael Warnock's runoff win last year is why Democrats control the Senate today.

Senator Warnock has voted for Joe Biden’s disastrous agenda 96% of the time, so he is to blame for our country going in the wrong direction. All eyes are on Georgia. If I lose this runoff, Democrats will have a 51-seat majority where the most radical proposals will succeed. We cannot let that happen, Fellow American.

Senator Warnock and Democrat Super PACs have launched an advertising blitz that is flooding the airwaves. We already had over $70 million in false attack ads run against us in the general election, and now they’re running even more in the runoff!

The Democrats' petition to impeach Justice Clarence Thomas, which already had OVER 1 MILLION SIGNATURES, is growing larger by the minute!

**The Democrats are working day in and day out to gain more signatures to impeach Justice Thomas, and _[we must rally like never before to show the radical Left that we support him.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrlte3lh4i5s185121r2qc490j8uve9vsbo18u70_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c3h2bs "we must rally like never before to show the radical Left that we support him.")_**

Friend, have you heard the news?! It is beyond awful.

The radical Left's newest attack is to impeach Justice Clarence Thomas, and to make matters worse - they started a petition which already has over **1 MILLION signatures!!**

Justice Thomas has consistently served as a voice of reason on the court and has been a PIVOTAL part of our Supreme Court - without him, who knows where our country would be right now!

**_[We cannot let Joe Biden and his woke mafia continue to slander Clarence Thomas' name on the warpath to destroy our justice system.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3md7bp0mrtvc9c6n875868ous3fgo1j8vqnqa1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cph69o76c3h2bs "We cannot let Joe Biden and his woke mafia continue to slander Clarence Thomas’ name on the warpath to destroy our justice system.")_**

body:

Peter,

A great start to Army Navy week! Taking the Hill Founder, 32nd Undersecretary of the Army, Congressman, and US Army Soldier for Life, Patrick Murphy, was announced as the Chairman of Public Safety Advisory Board of Pennsylvania by Governor-elect Josh Shapiro.

[Statement from the Governor-elect's transition team website: ](https://act.myngp.com/el/suiP2rS9qaRGJoemPKruY66BTiRsfDIcJ3ZwhCzdinI=/WyeNZNAvcFuFRqwAMhPTw7M0dLk9gFpugHxom3NfbzQ=)
"The Advisory Committee for Public Safety will be chaired by Patrick Murphy, former Under Secretary of the Army. The co-chairs of this committee - including current and former Pennsylvania law enforcement officials, emergency management experts, and community safety advocates - will advise the transition on steps the Shapiro-Davis Administration should take to invest in law enforcement and make our communities safer, ensure the Commonwealth is ready for a wide range of emergency situations, and improve the criminal justice system to address historic inequities, restore trust, and make our communities safer."

We also have several awesome events to share around Army Navy including our policy panel at Wharton with panelists such as the Chairman of Johnson & Johnson Alex Gorsky, Chairman of the House Armed Services Committee Adam Smith, Owner of the Houston Astros Bob Zlotnik, 3x Pro-Bowler Brandon Brooks, and many more incredible speakers. The panels are from 1:00 p.m - 6:00 p.m on Friday, December 9th, and tickets are still available [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/suiP2rS9qaRGJoemPKruY66BTiRsfDIcJ3ZwhCzdinI=/yol5X1PYuVrrmnfcA9Dgtgf0sqH9KssIWVVy3t_wg8A=?eid=449809742047).

On Army-Navy day itself Taking the Hill is having an event at the Army-Navy game with some great sponsors and dozens of generous donors. Tickets for this event are sold out, but if you're interested in sponsoring future events like these reach out to the TTH team.

Thank you,
Dan Kunze
Taking the Hill Board Chairman

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: John James
subject: I have a message about the Georgia runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, **[and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031769:JbBt6oGcN:m:1:3253819041:108C64196CB085F3501004F85687E71F:r)**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031769:JbBt6oGcN:m:1:3253819041:108C64196CB085F3501004F85687E71F:r)
It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia.

We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN.

It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate.

**We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.**

**[That's why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Peter. Please chip in whatever you can spare to help Herschel win today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031769:JbBt6oGcN:m:1:3253819041:108C64196CB085F3501004F85687E71F:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031769:JbBt6oGcN:m:1:3253819041:108C64196CB085F3501004F85687E71F:r)

John James
Congressman-Elect

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: You’ve probably noticed that children todayaren’tgetting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.
body:
I’m writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z70dt7clcr9mihoc6ojvndebrlci6kmblg2ahjg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj68or2clh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6m5h54f72gie0mtlvaaabrh7bkouscvhvo3hjc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj68or2clh2bs)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2kjb99iktf5moig3dldepvfrbmdb38jor79lhp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj68or2clh2bs)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06sif45r033a8fvh8asj445p18mmbblj89ebdu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj68or2clh2bs)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zofd72452rmujgkj844mm5isl9k56i4em7s1u3dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj68or2clh2bs)

Thank you so much for supporting these efforts--[together we can help kids across the U.S. get the education they deserve.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfpnsnjbocsnosvlt7cshu1jab9v218223qjs6s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj68or2clh2bs)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj7hndqdvaa5l4op4o4hqeqfdelk5p1mtkakdqmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj68or2clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Garrett Bess, VP @ Heritage Action
subject: Elon Musk calls ESG “the devil” - here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032153:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)
---
| | Peter, Across the country, the radical Left-wing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is taking over. ** ** _Have you heard of ESG?_ ** ** This radical agenda represents...
* **Racial quotas in the workplace**
* **Cancel culture for "wrongthink"**
* **Corporate donations for abortion**
* **Pushing the trans issue onto children**
* **Critical Race Theory**
* **Corporate welfare**
* **Anti-oil, "green new deal" mandates**
* **A Social Credit Score**

... all in one MASSIVE package. It's being pushed by "woke" corporations and Left-leaning financial institutions that fund them. **But don 't just take it from us. Tesla and new Twitter CEO Elon Musk went as far as calling ESG "the devil."**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032153:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)
---
| | Elon Musk has learned about the ESG agenda the hard way. _The S &P kicked Musk's Tesla off of their ESG 500 index despite Musk's company being an electric car company._ _This shows what ESG scores are really about --punishing political enemies for the Left! _ Even though Elon Musk has a "green" auto company, a major ESG "ratings" organization gave Tesla a low score. **Leftist institutions can subjectively fudge the numbers and use the ESG score to punish anyone they want!** This agenda claims to assist 'sustainable investing' for individuals - but this is further proof that it's actually a social credit score designed to blackball conservatives, independent-minded Americans, and anyone who is dangerous to the Left's socialist plan for America.. **At Heritage Action, we 're FIGHTING BACK against this radical movement with a nationwide campaign to END ESG. **It starts by fighting back against the financial institutions on Wall Street that are pushing this ESG agenda!
---
| | [**HELP US FIGHT BACK TODAY >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032153:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)
---
| | Our **ESG Hurts** campaign aims to raise awareness about the agenda and support the work of lawmakers who are fighting the ESG agenda. So far, we've had a BIG impact supporting state governments who keep their taxpayer dollars from funding ESG! This means:
* Protecting state pension and retirement accounts from being invested with financial firms who push for ESG.
* Making sure state contracts for banking and financial services are with institutions that are NOT pushing ESG.

**In 2022, multiple states have already sent a CLEAR message to the ESG powers-that-be and the Wall Street firms facilitating the agenda.**
* **MISSOURI divested $500M from woke investment firm BlackRock**
* **SOUTH CAROLINA divested $200M from BlackRock**
* **LOUISIANA also divested $800M from the Left-wing firm**
* **FLORIDA just divested $2 BILLION from BlackRock over ESG**

**These states are PROTECTING taxpayer dollars from funding a blatantly anti-American agenda!** Other states are fighting back--Oklahoma, Tennessee, and West Virginia have also taken prominent stands against ESG. Heritage Action's "ESG Hurts" campaign has educated tens of thousands of Americans on this issue. And we're backing the state legislation that is fighting to end ESG. **We need your help to keep this campaign moving in 2023 - ****_and winning_****. Can we count on YOU to chip in and join our fight against the woke agenda?** Heritage Action is committed to supporting even more states in 2023 as they pass laws to protect America from the globalist ESG agenda. _**[Donate to Heritage Action today and keep ESG from Hurting America >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032153:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)**_
---
| | [**DONATE $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032154:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)
---
[**DONATE $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032155:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)

[**DONATE $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032153:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)
---
| | If Americans don't learn the TRUTH about ESG - and lawmakers don't put a stop to it - this agenda will take over our country. Heritage Action, will NEVER stop fighting until ESG is defeated, no matter what kind of opposition we face. **And we need grassroots Americans like YOU to stand with us against this radical agenda.**
---
| | _**[< < CHIP IN TODAY >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032153:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)**_
---
| | **When you contribute to the ESG Hurts campaign, you 're helping us...**
* Fund explainers about ESG and how it works
* Fund our activists fighting ESG on the front lines
* Fund our work implementing anti-ESG policies at the state level

We would really appreciate your support, Peter. **[_Donate whatever you can today to support our fight against the WOKE ESG agenda in America! >>_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032156:JhgGpoGNa:m:1:3331421248:C2089B7A298AD4E121466282C994225F:r)** Thank you, Garrett Bess Vice President, Heritage Action

name: VADEMS
subject: Trump Pitches “Terminating” Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
As the former President floats ending democracy, Youngkin remains silent about his party’s leader. closer to preserving and expanding LGBTQ civil rights.

|
---
Derek, In an appeal to his base on the far-right, former President **Donald Trump suggested on Friday that the Constitution should be “terminated”** in order to return himself to power. This newest push to undermine the results of the 2020 presidential election has been met with silence from Glenn Youngkin. Even as his party’s leader continues his assault on democracy, Youngkin refuses to step up and denounce Trump’s comments. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Trumptrainnews is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z58qovpo3ej6odm0qofbnbl1mbn3dm4n1vst85r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6cob2cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv3k4hqmm8rsmmuvmgbngrscl5aigme4h7hpj86g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6cob2cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z47474euq72egnu748ealerch16jem7ali16s91g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6cob2cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj817q9u94uso4lmhmt26v3ur72q2e5p6hgjl4jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6cob2cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Live from Waffle House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Just when I think I've seen it all, something new happens in the Georgia Senate runoff.

**Joe Biden campaigned the other day for Raphael Warnock ... in BOSTON.**

The Warnock campaign is scared to be seen with President Biden on the same stage, so they sent him to NEW ENGLAND where he attended a phone bank at a union hall making calls to voters in GEORGIA.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031764:6hHALoGvN:m:1:3253819041:7F52035CE18CE4B7A4B91FBE19B3C13B:r)
**Not only did President Biden make calls into Georgia to get out the vote for Warnock, but he also helped Warnock raise MILLIONS of LIBERAL DOLLARS at a Boston fundraiser.**

Peter, the other day I campaigned for Herschel IN GEORGIA (I know - a shocking concept). While I was there, I recorded a short video about the race after a quick lunch at Waffle House (a great Georgia-based company). **[Click here to watch the video:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031764:6hHALoGvN:m:1:3253819041:7F52035CE18CE4B7A4B91FBE19B3C13B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031764:6hHALoGvN:m:1:3253819041:7F52035CE18CE4B7A4B91FBE19B3C13B:r)
**Raphael Warnock votes with Joe Biden 96% of the time, but he doesn't want Georgians to know. Biden's policies are so unpopular in Georgia that Senator Warnock sent the President to campaign 1,000 miles away from Atlanta!**

Democrats are pouring money into Georgia from liberal states like Massachusetts and California because they know Raphael Warnock is a reliable vote for their radical agenda.

**[Don't let Massachusetts buy a 3rd senator. Please, help Herschel in the final hours of this race. Chip in anything you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031764:6hHALoGvN:m:1:3253819041:7F52035CE18CE4B7A4B91FBE19B3C13B:r)**

With the runoff election on Tuesday, IT'S NOW OR NEVER!

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031764:6hHALoGvN:m:1:3253819041:7F52035CE18CE4B7A4B91FBE19B3C13B:r)

Lindsey Graham

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031764:6hHALoGvN:m:1:3253819041:7F52035CE18CE4B7A4B91FBE19B3C13B:r)

name: Herschel
subject: Looking for you to go the extra mile
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

**This is it.**

_**This is when we dig deep.**_

We're in overtime. The crowd is cheering, and the lights are bright.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032510:6Pa9LoGvN:m:1:3331421248:5F7A0BEDBC3B084731E9BAE5826A8918:r)
I have asked for a lot of you over the last few months, **[but can you dig a little deeper right now and invest in our Senate campaign to help us win in overtime?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032510:6Pa9LoGvN:m:1:3331421248:5F7A0BEDBC3B084731E9BAE5826A8918:r)**

_**I can't remember ever losing an overtime game in my football career, and I certainly don't intend to start now.**_ I'm asking for your support today so that I can be the 50th Senate vote against the disastrous Biden-Schumer-Warnock agenda.

Georgia deserves better. America deserves better.

It's time to pull out this win in overtime.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62032510:6Pa9LoGvN:m:1:3331421248:5F7A0BEDBC3B084731E9BAE5826A8918:r)
Herschel

subject: D.C. jail blocked cancer treatment for Jan. 6 peaceful protester
body:

Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zebt53o3ih5jmlamit8pp5ro12c6qi3kc2gsl7d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6aoj6cph2bs)

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3ru0vt5206rqcs2mrujnjetb950f4fhane62h40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6aoj6cph2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp4afo92paqar8dlsj47lattubt3qjh7oqjutg28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6aoj6cph2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z83jjql0g2ka7gccimedg2vnktl4uamqc63th6p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6aoj6cph2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjdbkhptrqtr0010auftbp8bjv3t8jipu6ghg7oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6aoj6cph2bs)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Will D.C. jail kill this Jan.6 peaceful protester?
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it gre
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z22at3reh8euueeoodjgk8138vouahk713bt1a1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6eo34chh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5p87dh2iao8g2jfhakel85bbrj5hlemcn3i4dq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6eo34chh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zldg1b4u16j8cvh3actcjmerl5g8sahss537lkb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6eo34chh2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjdqse0udouqvombuhgktteh5g8bp8u2ott76ji8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6eo34chh2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrpu5ta02j5vmfr45iubmaier0m8nia3df91tgvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6eo34chh2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zob9jrq9v4rgiojiiaiji2a6ggv310ni1agq9p3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj6eo34chh2bs)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: ELECTION DAY! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033717:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "From the Desk of Marco Rubio")
---
**_It 's Election Day in Georgia!_**
I'm locked in on helping win this election, Peter.

The Democrats have shown time and again how much they have failed this country and I refuse to allow them to gain any more power to control our lives.

_I 'm committed because Herschel believes in **common sense policies.**
I'm committed because Herschel believes in **LOW taxes and LESS government control.**
And I'm committed because Herschel believes that the American Dream **is growing further and further out of reach.**_

Today, while ballots are being counted, **Democrats have continued to funnel millions (and I mean literally millions) of dollars to Herschel 's far-Left opponent** to stop any Republican momentum and we need your help so we can respond.
---
| | | [HELP STOP THE LEFT'S MILLION DOLLAR WARCHEST](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033717:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "HELP STOP THE
LEFT’S MILLION DOLLAR WARCHEST")
---
We need all the help we can get to fight back. I can't stress this enough, **but Herschel 's race WILL decide whether or not Republicans have a chance to take back control of our country.** That means we have two options:
1\. Let a Pelosi and Schumer Endorsed candidate win and ERASE any sense of a red wave.
**2\. We can work as a team RIGHT NOW to stop the Democrats from running our country into the ground.**
I know you get a lot of these messages, but these are REAL challenges and REAL worries we have. I'm humbly asking you to chip in to help me get America back on track.
---
| | | [STAND WITH HERSCHEL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033717:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "STAND WITH
HERSCHEL")
---
It's grassroots supporters like you that will defeat the Left, Peter.

**[Are you with us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033717:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "Are you with
us?")**

To victory,
Marco
---
| | |

* * *

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033718:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033718:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "Join my fight to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033718:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN
DREAM")
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033719:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033719:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "If you’re
committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62033719:JgferoG2N:m:1:3331703221:C98247A3CE39F25C5048830C60A7F493:r "STOP THE DEMS")

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate

Miami, FL 33153

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: that is how much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:

**$5** – that's how much I'm asking you to donate today, friend.
Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and expand our Senate majority. And your support has never been more urgent.
Right now, I’m running neck and neck with my opponent, Herschel Walker. With only hours until the polls close, we need all hands on deck to power our campaign through the final stretch.
**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. Please, friend: Will you split $5 now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to fuel our people-powered movement to victory here in Georgia?**
**Here's a special link just for you:**[**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock_gfs**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55608783/382232104/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3824-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE5NDUyYi03Mzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y2r4Q8SLLbBiLHBQoFM3i1DETiymxe9o4fiUs8ZHbts=)
Thank you for pitching in, friend. I truly appreciate your support.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Just in time for Christmas
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0131%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Btf18RUKggJ3rBJv5FI3NA&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42874%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vwBOEMrMIm5c8Xj%2bvFDq%2bA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42874%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vwBOEMrMIm5c8Xj%2bvFDq%2bA&sysid=1)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42885%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PgXdZB9V8IWqoPHQ828LlA&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42886%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o4JNczY4xJrEGc5UCmSCrQ&sysid=1)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42887%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SSGAHXzL2pcaZh9EfFZh2Q&sysid=1) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42888%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aOwQK0xUgduhYtVaR5qX%2fg&sysid=1)
---
[Get my book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42886%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o4JNczY4xJrEGc5UCmSCrQ&sysid=1)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42889%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KCJKfUAPpaGBk8yI5GEPiw&sysid=1)
---
| | [Get my book ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MkXAPu8fq9hEchayXNX1gg&sysid=1)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0131%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Btf18RUKggJ3rBJv5FI3NA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0131%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Btf18RUKggJ3rBJv5FI3NA&sysid=1)

You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I was on stage with President Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
**Peter, President Obama joined me on the rally stage here in Georgia last week.**** ** It's an honor to have him by our side at this pivotal moment.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55610769/382240724/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk922-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ0Y2ZhNi03Njc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUesHdUl_N3z8kxyIU8Ir9RuUEzQ3GnPShO2z4NhHNY=)
If you didn't get a chance to join our rally, here's what you need to know: **Today, we're going to win this runoff election and keep Georgia blue. **

But here’s the thing: Republicans know this, and they’re afraid. We narrowly led Herschel Walker in the general election – so now the GOP is flooding this race with more than $58 million to help Walker take the lead today.

They won’t hold back, and neither can we. That’s why I urgently need your support to help hit our critical pre-runoff goal before midnight tonight.

**Peter, I’m asking: ****[Will you please split $5 – or whatever you can between me and Letitia James – so we can win in Georgia and expand our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55610770/382240725/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk922-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGQ0Y2ZhNi03Njc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUesHdUl_N3z8kxyIU8Ir9RuUEzQ3GnPShO2z4NhHNY=)**

Thank you so much for all you do, Peter.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Overtime is the ultimate test
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
We need to leave it all on the field to pull this off
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031774:6FWzAoGNb:m:1:3253819041:E6D135EAEE56D64D6B6769A9CB01AEDC:r) Peter, my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day.

But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we're headed to a runoff election in Georgia. In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME.

I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team's grit and determination.

Overtime is grueling when you've been playing hard for four quarters.

But we need to leave it all on the field if we're going to pull off this win.

Senator Warnock and his liberal allies are convinced they can maintain their stranglehold on power by following the same playbook that led them to victory in 2020.

But they've underestimated us, Peter.

We will outlast them, we will outclass them, and we will outwork them. Nothing will stop us from winning this race if you're on my team.

But my campaign account is depleted after a long and expensive race.

_**[So would you please consider chipping in to help us play until the final whistle and win the final race of 2022?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031774:6FWzAoGNb:m:1:3253819041:E6D135EAEE56D64D6B6769A9CB01AEDC:r "So would you please consider chipping
in $15 to help us play until the final whistle and win the final race of 2022?")**_ | | [HELP HERSCHEL WALKER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031774:6FWzAoGNb:m:1:3253819041:E6D135EAEE56D64D6B6769A9CB01AEDC:r)
---
Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker

In the Georgia runoff election, **Republican Herschel Walker** is facing an almost overwhelming blue wall of Democrat dark money.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Enough with Biden's reckless spending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz
body:
Dear Peter,

98 suspects on the terrorist watch list crossed our southern border.

Mexican drug cartels ship deadly fentanyl into our country, killing more than 100,000 of our fellow Americans through overdose.

And while terrorists, drug cartels, and human traffickers assume operational control of our border...

**Joe Biden spent $60 billion to secure the border of Ukraine while 5,000,000 illegal aliens poured over our southern border in the largest invasion in U.S. history.**

When Republicans take the majority in November, we must be the party that puts America first!

The days of Joe Biden's blank check in Ukraine are numbered.

**And I will not vote for one more dollar for the regime's reckless proxy war to see which thug in a tracksuit control Ukraine.**

**[If you agree, I hope you will join me by signing your"Not One Dollar" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) [**CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR NAME**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) **Once you join the fight against the D.C. swamp pumping tens of billions of dollars into Joe Biden's adventure in Ukraine,[please chip in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) so I can get this petition in front of as many America First conservatives as possible.**

_I say enough is enough._

The first responsibility of the federal government is to secure our own border from invasion.

Joe Biden failed at that job.

Come January, when the new GOP majority takes power, I intend to lead the fight to put our priorities back in order.

**But I need your help to show the uniparty warmongers that I have the MAGA movement grassroots army by my side demanding that the government put securing the American border first!**

**[That's why I'm asking you to sign your"Not One Dollar" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) [**SIGN YOUR PETITION TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) **Once you add your name, please join me in this fight[by chipping in a contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r).**

The D.C. elites abused the American people by risking nuclear war over Ukraine's border while ignoring the epidemic of drugs, criminals, terrorists, and illegal aliens flooding across our border.

**Add your name and show the regime you are joining me in declaring that the days of Joe Biden's Ukraine gravy train are over.** [**HELP END BIDEN'S RECKLESS SPENDING
ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) [** CONTRIBUTE $10 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) [** CONTRIBUTE $25 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) [** CONTRIBUTE $50 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) [** CONTRIBUTE $100 >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) [** CONTRIBUTE NOW >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61234509:WUAGuCDNb:m:1:2365227053:B803D8BB44772F9D6B39DD0C0159AAB0:r) Matt Gaetz
Congresman (R-FL)

clean_body: Dear Peter, 98 suspects on the terrorist watch list crossed our southern border. Mexican drug cartels ship deadly fentanyl into our country, killing more than 100,000 of our fellow Americans through overdose. And while terrorists, drug cartels, and human traffickers assume operational control of our border... Joe Biden spent $60 billion to secure the border of Ukraine while 5,000,000 illegal aliens poured over our southern border in the largest invasion in U.S. history. When Republicans take the majority in November, we must be the party that puts America first! The days of Joe Biden's blank check in Ukraine are numbered. And I will not vote for one more dollar for the regime's reckless proxy war to see which thug in a tracksuit control Ukraine. . Once you join the fight against the D.C. swamp pumping tens of billions of dollars into Joe Biden's adventure in Ukraine, so I can get this petition in front of as many America First conservatives as possible. I say enough is enough. The first responsibility of the federal government is to secure our own border from invasion. Joe Biden failed at that job. Come January, when the new GOP majority takes power, I intend to lead the fight to put our priorities back in order. But I need your help to show the uniparty warmongers that I have the MAGA movement grassroots army by my side demanding that the government put securing the American border first! . Once you add your name, please join me in this fight. The D.C. elites abused the American people by risking nuclear war over Ukraine's border while ignoring the epidemic of drugs, criminals, terrorists, and illegal aliens flooding across our border. Add your name and show the regime you are joining me in declaring that the days of Joe Biden's Ukraine gravy train are over. Matt Gaetz Congresman (R-FL) Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz. ** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Are you ready to win?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

**The Senate runoff in Georgia will impact every single American.**

Inflation, recession, crime, unsecure borders, woke policies...and all the other lovely gifts from the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer cabal are only going to get worse unless we break the liberal chokehold on power.

Unless you want to see more one-party Democrat rule in Washington, **[I need you to stop what you are doing and make the largest possible donation you can directly to Herschel Walker's Senate campaign RIGHT NOW.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034390:JwHX1oGNp:m:1:3331421248:CDDBAA7212FCE1818735D5B8E4F00CAD:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034390:JwHX1oGNp:m:1:3331421248:CDDBAA7212FCE1818735D5B8E4F00CAD:r)
We cannot allow Warnock to win. **Peter, that means we must help fund Herschel's runoff efforts against Warnock's multi-million-dollar war chest.**

| **RUNOFF DONOR FILE**
**SUPPORTER:** Peter
**RUNOFF EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION:** [$34](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034390:JwHX1oGNp:m:1:3331421248:CDDBAA7212FCE1818735D5B8E4F00CAD:r)
**DEADLINE:** 06:00 PM TONIGHT

[** CONTRIBUTE NOW -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034390:JwHX1oGNp:m:1:3331421248:CDDBAA7212FCE1818735D5B8E4F00CAD:r)

---

We are at a crucial decision point. Either we help Herschel win...or we will watch the woke mob torch our nation's history.

Senator Warnock represents the failed values and policies of Big Government Socialism. Herschel wants to restore America with common sense values and policies that work.

That leads me to the heart of this email.

_Who would you like to see in the Senate from Georgia, Peter?_

Do you want to continue down the destructive path of Big Government Socialism with Warnock - or get back to an America that works for all Americans with Herschel?

**[Please go here to make an emergency donation directly to Herschel's campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034390:JwHX1oGNp:m:1:3331421248:CDDBAA7212FCE1818735D5B8E4F00CAD:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034390:JwHX1oGNp:m:1:3331421248:CDDBAA7212FCE1818735D5B8E4F00CAD:r)
Newt Gingrich

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Five reasons this race matters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034460:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)
---
Peter,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034460:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034461:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more "level-headed" options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034460:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)**

**I want Herschel to win.** The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great.

**[Will you do me a personal favor and contribute to Herschel's campaign today? I promised him I would do my best to raise $100,000 for him, and I hope you'll help me deliver on that promise.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034460:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034460:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)

Jim Jordan

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034460:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034462:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034463:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034464:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034465:J8P_1oGDN:m:1:3253819041:40FB65D5F632A9E66DBF21D48ACEF291:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.
