name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Most hateful organization in America
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd430b5f48da4040aa7d1ff49ef2b3b4&_e=z93wL0FcsXBTyle-EP4-KxmKXXfAZB4XF-5VS6RsjJmM4saQgXuauYEgIlLAKVIo8YYKpqVe9xQ0hXxLPfKVqZisizUPoiwUX3-IQMXvPo572-0vVPe_5tH0aLwNp3ND6RhI_5swdWAW_xZg5CEz7puJE8Z_UzuI-Xg-CEA4koW9iZv2bfNGYRM7-yKLqsPgR38vOGEZkNelMrhZMObYWMq5_k9kT-z3LWxfeGzj7j--xEZ9yGx2j634oz3sEuLjq0pv6d_j1_1mmrUo1pAy08JsC_wat7R7e2HGZ6vyktU%3D)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd430b5f48da4040aa7d1ff49ef2b3b4&_e=z93wL0FcsXBTyle-EP4-KxmKXXfAZB4XF-5VS6RsjJmM4saQgXuauYEgIlLAKVIo8YYKpqVe9xQ0hXxLPfKVqZisizUPoiwUX3-IQMXvPo572-0vVPe_5tH0aLwNp3ND6RhI_5swdWAW_xZg5CEz7qpFhc_T9c4F8RwPXyXnYtiZKh2RPZX-PwT5IJXzWqQXaPRR1h9e-6tI1IrXkY_nYwUsPQOoWmzduA9-2FqMieSLcK7EjugLieZAhmT_Nc-7ANh9xQ2X0M5HhLVQSpzgdUgPvMTNHOtM1Sics6By7E4%3D)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd430b5f48da4040aa7d1ff49ef2b3b4&_e=z93wL0FcsXBTyle-EP4-KxmKXXfAZB4XF-5VS6RsjJmM4saQgXuauYEgIlLAKVIo8YYKpqVe9xQ0hXxLPfKVqZisizUPoiwUX3-IQMXvPo572-0vVPe_5tH0aLwNp3ND6RhI_5swdWAW_xZg5CEz7iFU0Ng9YUwN_IhKWqxKNBk185vZf3yp5xF1twX9OdY3Ms9tF2ACO6CrDdLyzVjSAvP_A260Z3Od-0IbzSemm0t0bnbLbdKNGe3S7QjiDolxK4jdLtiLvitdEKX8HxDKhAjJWzBF5iT9kpVVAbukwQU%3D)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd430b5f48da4040aa7d1ff49ef2b3b4&_e=z93wL0FcsXBTyle-EP4-KxmKXXfAZB4XF-5VS6RsjJmM4saQgXuauYEgIlLAKVIo8YYKpqVe9xQ0hXxLPfKVqZisizUPoiwUX3-IQMXvPo572-0vVPe_5tH0aLwNp3NDGsY-paEGFVfRtwPzJ_dPPqWSgQykFfrdTaawE3K0m90vlqj7KDfYnpz2AqWXZPcJzZttW4Ki9B9EyErTaCppkBbTefuERoSta37xXHZ7YKcqfVlhjbidgaoSfjNdI94SOXmnh9DGKU6OQk8UaZhxiAZN_5Fj-iJycset8A6eXXM%3D)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd430b5f48da4040aa7d1ff49ef2b3b4&_e=z93wL0FcsXBTyle-EP4-KxmKXXfAZB4XF-5VS6RsjJmM4saQgXuauYEgIlLAKVIo8YYKpqVe9xQ0hXxLPfKVqZisizUPoiwUX3-IQMXvPo572-0vVPe_5tH0aLwNp3ND2MXKhm0N4DS9baW4llH-hxN900QYQTkOuuDoXBJnGcvjjS_kFdi3kXXrFSiJ364tg76jd2rlHlhCzzm58G_letuc3A6cAuBHLqkBQEOi0Yk6l0cNoN4-NvLURprJXRqbRkJANIAKhakyF-QtsUaaRmaZNnD6D1s75eEcGTs83scK1d0jMX7KPB7LtzGndjju)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cd430b5f48da4040aa7d1ff49ef2b3b4&_e=z93wL0FcsXBTyle-EP4-KxmKXXfAZB4XF-5VS6RsjJmM4saQgXuauYEgIlLAKVIo8YYKpqVe9xQ0hXxLPfKVqZisizUPoiwUX3-IQMXvPo572-0vVPe_5tH0aLwNp3ND6RhI_5swdWAW_xZg5CEz7qxhHMlXRwBAPWH7YHX1kJizWVD9GVRMgqk2_8n7oI6TaNqQfpQK1Y6f6xLRlD854_mJZ9pAZg9Ot53wKVNkGUypta_2JLkE5KMo3RwLutymDX33B3sw3TVaYEKJTpF0TEhEW4x_yuo-iZhLXAd6BLw%3D)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

clean_body: Friend, I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you’re thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, “what about them is influential?!” This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren’t, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here’s how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Secret Service Has Repeatedly Changed Story on Existence of Hunter Biden Gun Records
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that the United States Secret Service has repeatedly changed its position about whether it is in possession of records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware. The Secret Service now says it now located over 100 records, totaling over 400 pages and will complete its initial processing of the records by January 9, 2023.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 5, 2022

The Secret Service now says it now located over 100 records, totaling over 400 pages and will complete its initial processing of the records by January 9, 2023. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 5, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that the United States Secret Service has repeatedly changed its position about whether it is in possession of records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware. The Secret Service now says it now located over 100 records, totaling over 400 pages and will complete its initial processing of the records by January 9, 2023. ---|--- | | | | = | = The Biden administration is giving a nonprofit partially funded by leftwing billionaire George Soros’s Open Society Foundations (OSF) $12 million to strengthen labor rights and empower workers in three Latin American countries. The U.S. taxpayer dollars will go to the Solidarity Center, a Washington D.C.-based group closely allied with OSF as well as the country’s largest union conglomerate, the American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations (AFL-CIO). = ---|--- | | | | = | = “Why is the Biden administration hiding records about federal demands of Big Tech to censor and suppress Americans participating in the debates about elections?” asked Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. = ---|--- | | | | | Though years ago India passed a sweeping law giving transgender people rights—and prohibiting discrimination in education, employment, and healthcare—the Biden administration is spending American taxpayer dollars to counter stigma and prejudice against the transgender community in the south Asian nation with the world’s largest democracy. Uncle Sam will pay for workshops that will help employees and leadership at Indian companies create awareness about transgender persons and their rights. ---|--- | | | The European Conservative In recent days, we have seen news reports proclaiming the Ukrainian victory along the western bank of the Dnipro River in the city of Kherson. body:

Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3snkilbnmbedhk3f8nomplp7kkh254n5ck6t78o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj61o74cdh2bs)

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1r6hb7mulgf7rf9i6ikr8iro188p6vo67dv6uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj61o74cdh2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf85a9hdjmm5s2gog9c90pf8elag0o8rqauu5pu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj61o74cdh2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmanljpc7ab1d1vtqporkg4r9bspl0jardlfc8r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj61o74cdh2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4b9u1cn685n09fd5mlf1u1etdos64iplgh229k0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpj61o74cdh2bs)

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Tomorrow at the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The Supreme Court is about to hear a case that has big implications not only for our fight for fair maps, but also for our system of checks and balances – Moore v. Harper.
|
---

The Supreme Court is about to hear a case that has big implications not only for our fight for fair maps, but also for our system of checks and balances -- _Moore v. Harper_.

Last year, voters in North Carolina overturned a gerrymandered congressional map in state court. Now they're headed to the Supreme Court to defend the fair map and stop extremist Republicans in their state from reinstating the gerrymandered map.

**[Friend -- If the thought of Republican legislatures operating without the check of a state court concerns you, we could use your support. Sign our petition if you think SCOTUS should protect our system of checks and balances.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55617076/382264619/-1462679232?source=20221206_AOTL_P_EHH_A2_ActivesXopeners&refcode=20221206_AOTL_P_EHH_A2_ActivesXopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjMDc4MDFmLTgxNzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WNVSykZVfyHwKTtzTX1fnGBeNATL8N-XDyqzKo-3ec=&emci=8d6f8f49-0c75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5c07801f-8175-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55617077/382264620/-1462679232?source=20221206_AOTL_P_EHH_A2_ActivesXopeners&refcode=20221206_AOTL_P_EHH_A2_ActivesXopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjMDc4MDFmLTgxNzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WNVSykZVfyHwKTtzTX1fnGBeNATL8N-XDyqzKo-3ec=&emci=8d6f8f49-0c75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5c07801f-8175-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)
---
North Carolina’s extreme Republicans turned to the “independent state legislature” theory -- a fringe legal theory claiming that state legislatures have **exclusive** power to regulate federal elections.

When those extreme Republicans argue their case in front of the Supreme Court this week, they will be asking SCOTUS to dismantle state-level judicial review of state legislation impacting federal elections -- effectively preventing state courts from providing checks and balances as needed to protect voters’ rights and the electoral process.

**[Add your name if you think the Supreme Court should protect checks and balances when deciding _Moore v. Harper_.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55617078/382264621/-1462679232?source=20221206_AOTL_P_EHH_A2_ActivesXopeners&refcode=20221206_AOTL_P_EHH_A2_ActivesXopeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjMDc4MDFmLTgxNzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6WNVSykZVfyHwKTtzTX1fnGBeNATL8N-XDyqzKo-3ec=&emci=8d6f8f49-0c75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=5c07801f-8175-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**
If the Supreme Court sides with the extreme Republicans pursuing this case, the fair North Carolina map will be replaced with the gerrymandered one already determined to violate the North Carolina Constitution. But this SCOTUS decision could also cause ripple effects to our democracy beyond this one map.

We’ve seen extreme Republicans go to great lengths to manipulate maps and overturn election results. Now they are asking the Supreme Court to give unchecked power to state legislatures -- including those that remain heavily gerrymandered.

**Let’s call this what it is: a desperate and reckless attempt to dismantle the accountability that prevented extreme, power-hungry politicians from successfully manipulating maps in the first place.**

We won’t know what the justices decide until next spring, but we need to be prepared for any outcome. This case has the potential to completely change the landscape of our federal elections.

I hope I can count on your support,

Eric H. Holder, Jr.

clean_body: The Supreme Court is about to hear a case that has big implications not only for our fight for fair maps, but also for our system of checks and balances – Moore v. Harper. | The Supreme Court is about to hear a case that has big implications not only for our fight for fair maps, but also for our system of checks and balances -- Moore v. Harper. Last year, voters in North Carolina overturned a gerrymandered congressional map in state court. Now they're headed to the Supreme Court to defend the fair map and stop extremist Republicans in their state from reinstating the gerrymandered map. North Carolina’s extreme Republicans turned to the “independent state legislature” theory -- a fringe legal theory claiming that state legislatures have exclusive power to regulate federal elections. When those extreme Republicans argue their case in front of the Supreme Court this week, they will be asking SCOTUS to dismantle state-level judicial review of state legislation impacting federal elections -- effectively preventing state courts from providing checks and balances as needed to protect voters’ rights and the electoral process. If the Supreme Court sides with the extreme Republicans pursuing this case, the fair North Carolina map will be replaced with the gerrymandered one already determined to violate the North Carolina Constitution. But this SCOTUS decision could also cause ripple effects to our democracy beyond this one map. We’ve seen extreme Republicans go to great lengths to manipulate maps and overturn election results. Now they are asking the Supreme Court to give unchecked power to state legislatures -- including those that remain heavily gerrymandered. Let’s call this what it is: a desperate and reckless attempt to dismantle the accountability that prevented extreme, power-hungry politicians from successfully manipulating maps in the first place. We won’t know what the justices decide until next spring, but we need to be prepared for any outcome. This case has the potential to completely change the landscape of our federal elections. I hope I can count on your support, Eric H. Holder, Jr. All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. | | **_POLLS ARE ABOUT TO OPEN FOR THE GEORGIA SENATE RUNOFF!_** Peter,

In just a few minutes, polls across the state will open and Georgia voters will begin casting their final ballots for who they want to represent Georgia for the next 6 years.

**_We don’t have any time to spare._**

name: John James
subject: I have a message about the Georgia runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, **[and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034300:6cuzmoGVN:m:1:3331703221:D9A43AEBD0796431FEA4C8BD674EE929:r)**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034300:6cuzmoGVN:m:1:3331703221:D9A43AEBD0796431FEA4C8BD674EE929:r)
It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia.

We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN.

It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate.

**We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.**

**[That's why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Peter. Please chip in whatever you can spare to help Herschel win today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034300:6cuzmoGVN:m:1:3331703221:D9A43AEBD0796431FEA4C8BD674EE929:r)**

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034300:6cuzmoGVN:m:1:3331703221:D9A43AEBD0796431FEA4C8BD674EE929:r)

John James
Congressman-Elect

clean_body: Across the state, voters are casting their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue. | | = Today's the day, Peter: Across the state, voters are casting their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue. That's why the GOP has made me their top target, flooding this race with millions of dollars in attack ads in the hopes of helping Herschel Walker flip this seat. But I'll let you in on a secret: We're going to win – but not without your support. Today's election is the final test for our grassroots movement – and with our bold agenda on the line, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas now. That's why I'm looking for 10,000 grassroots folks like you to step up with a donation right away so we can power our final GOTV efforts and keep Georgia blue. name: John James
subject: I have a message about the Georgia runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zd3e2bhr1r9tqjpooc0bv90kp33e2u84d4nd2qr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uer72pllepibctpl6gq38tlkm8rm8t1me8ob8o76mmoe2cj7miprdcrjcph35dtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0sjgcoo7eddm61rm2pjkc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
|
---
Fellow American,

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, **[and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6coslbv45ng64j89j7pmv162j9jkp58673qhg88_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs)**
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeb7ve8muiuuc53uflv47gekuhk0pvr5f4as4738_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs)
It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia.

We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN.

It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate.

**We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.**

**[That's why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Fellow American. Please chip in $5, $10, $34, or whatever you can spare to help Herschel win today!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z381db6qu38mn5pkiclk379seccucbj41l9ae238_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs)**

Thank you,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf2dlsfg8ani5u7f2f7ohfjjnakafnmp0c6j9g5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs)

John James
Congressman-Elect

[** Donate Today -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z713htcl7ndsgt72hpnos9v5okp7j9cbg8tovh0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs)

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zaajnma3a9kkqeesvkn2dmgjuv71ofkk6m7ebq90_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znpd5uvfo1gofod28la2bge21ui17099o9mm0v98_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvqa4841uvq064m47e1asmtgbuk6jneu5e2jvvsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zb9424c8h25tprmcmcttrktu1f5adigddnim3cjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmcp74s1h2bs)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Overtime is the ultimate test ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
We need to leave it all on the field to pull this off
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031562:6-hByoGrN:m:1:3331421248:2089B0C3B16E9AB12CFA4477DEBFBFD1:r) Peter, my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day.

But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we're headed to a runoff election in Georgia. In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME.

I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team's grit and determination.

Overtime is grueling when you've been playing hard for four quarters.

But we need to leave it all on the field if we're going to pull off this win.

Senator Warnock and his liberal allies are convinced they can maintain their stranglehold on power by following the same playbook that led them to victory in 2020.

But they've underestimated us, Peter.

We will outlast them, we will outclass them, and we will outwork them. Nothing will stop us from winning this race if you're on my team.

But my campaign account is depleted after a long and expensive race.

_**[So would you please consider chipping in $25 to help us play until the final whistle and win the final race of 2022?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031562:6-hByoGrN:m:1:3331421248:2089B0C3B16E9AB12CFA4477DEBFBFD1:r "So would you please consider chipping
in $15 to help us play until the final whistle and win the final race of 2022?")**_ | | [HELP HERSCHEL WALKER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62031562:6-hByoGrN:m:1:3331421248:2089B0C3B16E9AB12CFA4477DEBFBFD1:r)
---
Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker

_**[Our Final Plea for Herschel Walker](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034927:6_n_yoGEN:m:1:3253819041:393C6E8E771E35CD8516E801AB7885F7:r "Our Final Plea for Herschel Walker")**_

Running isn't new for Herschel. He ran a lot while playing college football in his beloved state of Georgia. Unfortunately, running for Senate isn't quite the same experience.

And running for Senate in Georgia is an experience like no one could have predicted. The Democrats have gone all-out in their attempts to smear and discredit Herschel while he jogs on, trying to keep the American Dream alive, well, and attainable for all of us. **Warnock has outspent Herschel by nearly $100 million just to knock him down.**

_[Luckily, the people of Georgia can't be bought by crooked liberal politicians.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034927:6_n_yoGEN:m:1:3253819041:393C6E8E771E35CD8516E801AB7885F7:r "Luckily, the people of Georgia can’t be bought by crooked liberal politicians.")_

As we make our final plea before the polls close later today, we're begging patriots like you to make a stand. Not just for the people of Georgia but for all the conservatives counting on the GOP to maintain their 50 seats in the Senate.

_**[If you contribute before voting concludes, we 'll apply our special 15X-MATCH to any amount you donate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62034927:6_n_yoGEN:m:1:3253819041:393C6E8E771E35CD8516E801AB7885F7:r "If you contribute before voting concludes, we’ll apply our special 15X-MATCH to any
amount you donate.")**_

We can't lose sight of the finish line, especially when we're this close.

_Answer our call for help and push Herschel Walker to victory before the radical Left trips him up and swipes this crucial seat out from under us!

_

subject: Our final Hail Mary attempt to stop Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Georgia Republican Party, Inc
body:
Herschel Walker needs your support at the FINAL HOUR. | | | Herschel Walker needs your support at the FINAL HOUR. | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=83300d882b&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend,
---
Joe Biden is on the brink of building a 51-seat majority in the Senate.
---
**_But America has ONE Hail Mary left to stop that doomsday scenario... Herschel Walker MUST win Tuesday’s Georgia runoff._**
---
_This is your FINAL CHANCE to help Herschel Walker win the runoff and save America._
---
[**Please make your FINAL contribution to put Herschel past the finish line – for a maximum 1,500% impact.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a02d3b0a54&e=fdefed58de)

**Herschel Walker was only 36,465 votes behind Raphael Warnock in the November 8 election. **

_That’s why we’ve been mobilizing to get Herschel *_MORE_ * than the 36,465 votes he needs to close that gap and take the lead._

name: Team Sinema
subject: Passing the Respect for Marriage Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Great news, team: Last Tuesday, the Senate passed our _Respect for Marriage Act_. This legislation safeguards the rights and freedoms of same-sex and interracial couples, ensuring they continue to receive the same protections afforded to all married Americans. **The House will vote on our bill this week, and then it will head to the president’s desk to be signed into law.** In these final steps before the finish line, we need to come together and show everyone our team is eager to see this bill become law. [**We hope you’ll stand with us this week and add your name to push for passage of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ in the House >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55627821/382280693/1435146554?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221205_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWVjY2Q5ZC04Yjc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-IvfiTBolw1ie2eKGlmgJnyJApldv0J2gIxzD4Lzxg=&emci=28ec2b5f-8975-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=15eccd9d-8b75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2415496) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55627822/382280694/1435146554?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20221205_PM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWVjY2Q5ZC04Yjc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-IvfiTBolw1ie2eKGlmgJnyJApldv0J2gIxzD4Lzxg=&emci=28ec2b5f-8975-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=15eccd9d-8b75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2415496)

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Herschel needs our help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035156:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)
---
Peter,

By now you know Herschel Walker is in the fight of his life. He's gearing up to face off against the socialist Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in a December 6th Senate runoff that will determine the extent to which Democrats have control over the Senate.

I think a lot of folks, yourself included perhaps, may be thinking that this race isn't important given that Democrats have 50 votes plus Kamala Harris' tie-breaking vote - effectively giving them control of the Senate. If you're in this mindset, then you're the audience I'm hoping to reach today. This race isn't over, and it would be extremely bad form to leave Herschel Walker on the field, alone, in the final hours of his race.

Disclaimer: **[At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to chip-in to help keep Herschel's campaign funded through December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035156:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)** But first, I'm going to give you five reasons why your donation is needed now more than ever.
1. **_Absences_** : Absences in the Senate happen from time to time, due to health reasons or otherwise. If we can get Herschel elected, Republicans and Dems will each have 50 seats - leaving Democrats with no margin for error. If a Democrat is out sick with the flu and cannot vote, Dems cannot pass legislation. **If Herschel loses, Dems have a cushion.**
2. **_2024_** : The 2024 map for Democrats is tough. If Herschel wins on December 6th, Republicans start the 2024 cycle from a position of strength. If we have 50 seats going into 2024, we can devote even more resources to West Virginia and Montana (**both deep red states**) where Democrat senators will be seeking reelection.

[** CHIP in $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035157:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)

3. **_Judges_** : With a 50/50 Senate, the Senate Judiciary Committee will have equal numbers of Republicans and Democrats - allowing us to force Democrats to only consider the most consequential nominations. **If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want.**
4. **_Federal nominations:_** With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more "level-headed" options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to.
5. **_6 years:_** If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, **it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years.** If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028.

**We simply cannot afford to lose this race.** We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. **[That's why I'm asking you to chip in today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035156:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)**

**I want Herschel to win.** The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great.

**[Will you do me a personal favor and contribute to Herschel's campaign today? I promised him I would do my best to raise $100,000 for him, and I hope you'll help me deliver on that promise.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035156:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035156:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)

Jim Jordan

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035156:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035158:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035159:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035160:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035161:J9awCoGuN:m:1:3331703221:F8BB9824A27CD9C4A9434DEDD2B42F88:r)

If Warnock wins, Democrats can confirm anyone they want. 4. Federal nominations: With a 50/50 Senate, Republicans will have leverage over who can win confirmation to lead federal agencies. With a 50/50 Senate, we'll get less Elizabeth Warren-type nominees and more "level-headed" options to give the thumbs up or thumbs down to. 5. 6 years: If Herschel Walker wins on December 6th, he'll serve for the next 6 years. If we don't get Herschel over the line, it could have an impact on who controls the Senate for the next 6 years. If we're at 49/51, it will be that much harder to win back the Senate in 2024 and retain it in 2026 and 2028. We simply cannot afford to lose this race. We all hoped for a different outcome on November 8th. But wishing for a different outcome while we still have a chance on December 6th would be foolhardy. I want Herschel to win. The Senate needs Herschel's vote to stop Democrats from doing their darndest. You need him so we can keep America great. Thanks, Jim Jordan | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7568%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=491QtDuCvsXyak8duowDJw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95379%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lFH5Fj24fk%2b707WVlZnrAg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95370%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bxTY%2fXDoukIzgD9gfDDDFg&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95371%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GAS21DYvnz%2bVEJeWODLTbg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c95372%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=htzOtbcsRIelUGAdFXR2sQ&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: D.C. jail blocked cancer treatment for Jan. 6 peaceful protester
body:
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it gre
Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvvs66a09d903fguh6fnslk4rj41pgar3keesjig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgmeo74c5h2bs)

name: American Briefing
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z100dotk2040cc1igpus2bg0bma8f8fqanr9lbvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm6o36cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zroill8brilii4ucp3mr11llt068ioh5ibuc3dd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm6o36cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7ct2tr3hascdrlodu6b3eulc70cpugderhnduio_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm6o36cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9536m3jsj85kuu9i972umf35dpo1vek94me0klg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm6o36cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Today is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31991?t=1008&amount=32&akid=6471%2E3611125%2E8-DRFk ][IMG]

Today's the day, friends! Across the state, voters are casting
their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue.

That's why the GOP has made me their top target, flooding this race with
millions of dollars in attack ads in the hopes of helping Herschel Walker
flip this seat. But I'll let you in on a secret: We're going to win—but
not without your support.

Today's election is the final test for our grassroots movement—and with
our bold agenda on the line, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas
now. That's why I'm looking for 10,000 grassroots folks like you to step
up with a donation right away so we can power our final GOTV efforts and
keep Georgia blue.

So please,
I'm personally asking: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31991?t=1009&amount=32&akid=6471%2E3611125%2E8-DRFk ]Will you split $32 right now—or as much as you
can spare before the polls close tonight—between me and Tim Ryan so we can
win in Georgia and expand our Senate majority?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31991?t=1010&express_lane=true&amount=32&akid=6471%2E3611125%2E8-DRFk ]Donate $32 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/31991?t=1011&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6471%2E3611125%2E8-DRFk ]Donate $50

Your support means so much. Thank you.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Friend,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us – even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $5 → **](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxlkd1unDAQhZ_G3IFgjCF7wUUSTLdKu5FodtM75LXNYsUYZExWvH0NQlWVSpYlf2fmeH5kkWR5jDHJDhCIIgWWtDxQBcQACcRZgnGSQMSZiNv4ykSCM55wQGkse6Z01FopXafMh7TCv5eID33QFRnglOMMH3gGKTkweCBXYMAYEIjJlQS66JwbJ4QfEVT-TJLPVkZ3ZawUq4lnTrI-7KSdeCd1qAz3zM5maNtQDHcTDnrpR8VDi3A1u76ZhtlyiXBp5SeCbEWc9SNTN7PCLXNN3LU1Cpe7iWe9FGruPdo682Di_rEPgjRHWv96PtIfDaVNVVP6dvx-eqF1U59Pr1UVlq_vp6aml3-1_aP_jLfKBuOkcZ4arsND-vvlNp-qO_FyY7QSXvgCOyX8vMpeU5Wn72VgCzHeldZqynK_j9u2j3X8vmet2qVA-RMC2NIAtknD7PCFnc8_7RJenz7Cb-QCt1WEZ3-7ZZR_I3eTaK8ZUF7-AalPrtk)

name: Great America Update
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7591%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=dqEtegVeZ187qGEiw4gCXA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77381%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zCxoP9YQf6n7uYjWts5%2f7A&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77382%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NCQz6lC%2fNAYVlsnnC12nyw&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77383%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6NZJQOKuG3OdmLmMdumxyg&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77384%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pko9raOMp6sJyngwH4pM0w&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77395%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vR6UFLueqkoeR3%2fCGhQ8rw&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7591%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=dqEtegVeZ187qGEiw4gCXA&sysid=1)

Unite the Country

subject: Just in time for Christmas
body:

Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9de1d117b1d847b7adbfe56703a087c1&_e=SynpxIqHYx0yW-QNSJEB1ETAOpWzfySPpyUCWb7g61TTj4dur8tCN-YWpr6TJSrI3LAn-6JbXEq1GDrz1qt0Fz4LlxmydnPprE2hPnxCWPBcSTVv2AP32qEK8Iaf8VcunVc033K_YRFp27g_uFVYszTVohI_aubvfJkDiKcfKsPDPzAjGpsQwlQdI3UHjfXSK3RqbtjM5smxkNciy-paKaXf6OXhI4ht-pIIFGBkSZFEhjK_LdrHetlPRRWKH2aZK3DlrMPeFc9rz_NjC0ML035a8h7KptuL7a8m8-TiBGpfIQUsRgmFVsLgFxS1JOE1)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9de1d117b1d847b7adbfe56703a087c1&_e=SynpxIqHYx0yW-QNSJEB1ETAOpWzfySPpyUCWb7g61TTj4dur8tCN-YWpr6TJSrI3LAn-6JbXEq1GDrz1qt0Fz4LlxmydnPprE2hPnxCWPBcSTVv2AP32qEK8Iaf8VcunVc033K_YRFp27g_uFVYs5IbfJvubNILtZUAlXgEtaPcxpknS25hGlekeZv1mvHvK2TUxXiE7Fox-ImdM6SClMWztXRVtwEj5lLzqEzEfIwJHHw6U4--jucOaMd5JaA6biIYPT-goMpJboKZIoaBRvS03SijJbdTt-F5Q2uQlPUb6cjCs-elnENCGAkODqRW)

---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9de1d117b1d847b7adbfe56703a087c1&_e=SynpxIqHYx0yW-QNSJEB1ETAOpWzfySPpyUCWb7g61TTj4dur8tCN-YWpr6TJSrI3LAn-6JbXEq1GDrz1qt0Fz4LlxmydnPprE2hPnxCWPBcSTVv2AP32qEK8Iaf8VcunVc033K_YRFp27g_uFVYs4LyIEVokJZQNSZ8L6EOJgKK4VTuZE-JsoQBb6UtdG19fXtStO0Rz0MHhTSLboQbsubRAL523G8nY3shQ0o9uX2dO53sJr2eIqJ1J673wlKKWfkzJIEDRUAVdJak8_D5SKRFMpnVX28AfoefPEja4NNGypua092M-NiHObVyuyPP) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9de1d117b1d847b7adbfe56703a087c1&_e=SynpxIqHYx0yW-QNSJEB1ETAOpWzfySPpyUCWb7g61TTj4dur8tCN-YWpr6TJSrI3LAn-6JbXEq1GDrz1qt0Fz4LlxmydnPprE2hPnxCWPBcSTVv2AP32qEK8Iaf8VcunVc033K_YRFp27g_uFVYsy7Pk6NVGahmGQ7F5pi_PnO3FLAHtxd-mFb33nTf6fZHQaX6Uy8EfOu3pqQ7lO7UkPNkQBpk_EJOnWMcgMduoUnrkzez1yAqS9hg-HrlRRngACVBK3JKzPPtI_3RWu4ybgmpneIiI9V-TJQub8POCPzqyZ2wlu8_x9LX0QoJpp3R)
---
[Get my book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9de1d117b1d847b7adbfe56703a087c1&_e=SynpxIqHYx0yW-QNSJEB1ETAOpWzfySPpyUCWb7g61TTj4dur8tCN-YWpr6TJSrI3LAn-6JbXEq1GDrz1qt0Fz4LlxmydnPprE2hPnxCWPBcSTVv2AP32qEK8Iaf8VcunVc033K_YRFp27g_uFVYsz1uBJAtzQP_2dvHWwpeGO76-swEEzdOhE7ohWv4pBw_c47_EwZiCreSD7YHECyAkvFPkKuyowLKpp1whCENuWeD0U7WqPj1Xz51zxLadfvVusxbo5gI1nsz0muj2bNIdM9Zp6j7r9OaGACFsnX9TBbRKRdYBXBmuloxEGs5gCc7)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9de1d117b1d847b7adbfe56703a087c1&_e=SynpxIqHYx0yW-QNSJEB1ETAOpWzfySPpyUCWb7g61TTj4dur8tCN-YWpr6TJSrI3LAn-6JbXEq1GDrz1qt0Fz4LlxmydnPprE2hPnxCWPBcSTVv2AP32qEK8Iaf8VcunVc033K_YRFp27g_uFVYs5_UN_efavLQZCUlyVdp9BmS0-rpEgw4RdOhfTw8L5JYz7TAxGtGdii0icNHFWVxq-rCbFbIgGHrdHGFf4oeCuivgJmYd2zBxU4hbMjfD3cs6p_YPI7vJgTAPo5B8Qur7aOvebSLqWkCB_Ajq8Xl2Fcn1YCqQ57HqBnJUczp7Nli)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: Curley's Christmas Drive
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=6865d19e02&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello PeterTimes are hard out here as we get ready for the Christmas season. In Florida, just like every other state in this nation, families are struggling because of extremely high gas prices, runaway inflation and the rising cost of living.I’ve been operating my food bank for 20 years and I’ve got to say, it’s never been as hard as it is right now for people. The lines get longer every week. Now at Christmas time, it breaks my heart more than usual.
I hear stories of fixed-income families not even able to buy small gifts for their kids because they’re struggling to get by. The government talks about how great things are going in our economy but we all know that is a lie. I see it every single day.I’m reaching out to you because I know that you’ve got a big heart just like me and you want to help families this Christmas season. Curley’s House, my food bank, has been helping this community for 20+ years. This Christmas season, though, we’re going to need to raise some extra funds to help these people out some more.Most years we buy toys and things for the kids so they can have something under their tree. We might have to cut that part this year because things are too high, but we’re going to try and not do that. I need to raise about $2,400 extra so we can go out and get some toys for these kids to have something under their tree.**That’s my goal: $2,400.**
| [DONATE $25.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=88dd554a07&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $50.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=15754383e5&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $150.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7733284af6&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [DONATE $500.00 TODAY](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=dbedb4bd32&e=fdefed58de)
---
Whatever you can give will be greatly appreciated, **And just so you know, whatever that you donate to Curley’s House is tax-deductible as we are a 501c3 organization. So please, give generously as possible.**
| [PLEASE DONATE TO CURLEY’S HOUSE TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b648a5027f&e=fdefed58de)
---
With love and gratitude,Lavern SpicerFounder of Curley’s House

name: ELECT HERSCHEL WALKER
subject: Election Day Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
**It’s Election Day in Georgia and our last chance to elect Herschel Walker to the Senate.**

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqv8j6qploupe1b7v000d3t15dkc246b19trl248_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm9or6c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt1hnjr1dvshstpc8afqtsi4di3146jov0e46ll0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm9or6c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztecmpamfcln8gfr3g6c6o06n0sdk0h7vu9ho6p0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm9or6c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsco7pnbu5e11i4471ud4lmm37tt63qkhmr2o95o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpgm9or6c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035256:6YykEoGhN:m:1:3331421248:7C53DD8BD257D087C285E0DD361642A4:r)

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035256:6YykEoGhN:m:1:3331421248:7C53DD8BD257D087C285E0DD361642A4:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Friend,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us – even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

name: Marina Jenkins
subject: Explaining Moore v. Harper
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This redistricting case is in front of SCOTUS this week.
|
---

Friend -- The team here at All On The Line wanted to send you a primer on _Moore v. Harper_ , the redistricting case in front of the Supreme Court this week.

Our team has been in the weeds on this case for a while now -- our affiliate organization, the National Redistricting Foundation, is supporting the voters who are protecting the fair congressional map in North Carolina.

**Extreme North Carolina Republicans will be attempting to replace that fair map with the gerrymandered one that the state supreme court deemed unconstitutional.**

But their legal argument -- the “independent state legislature” theory -- has no sound legal support. And in fact, it runs counter to more than **_100 years of legal precedent_** established by previous SCOTUS decisions.

These extreme Republicans claim that state courts don’t have the power to decide whether state legislation regarding federal elections, such as the drawing of congressional maps, complies with -- or runs afoul of -- state laws. But in the landmark redistricting case _Rucho v. Common Cause_ , Chief Justice Roberts explicitly pointed to the ability of state courts to enforce state laws as an example of checks and balances in the redistricting process that can protect voters from extreme gerrymandering.

**[Sign our petition if you want SCOTUS to uphold checks and balances in our federal elections.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55640861/382302293/-1462679232?source=20221206_AOTL_F_mvh1_Actives&refcode=20221206_AOTL_F_mvh1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1OTgxODkyLWEwNzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tVynM2wK-ad5qGSDwnQGZe5K_oWgwdPsj-MOma5L1qA=&emci=8e1b3b38-0f75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=c5981892-a075-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**

Demanding that gerrymandered state legislatures have unilateral power over congressional redistricting -- with no judicial oversight from state courts -- is pretty ridiculous.

Voters sent a clear message when election deniers in places like Nevada, Michigan, and Pennsylvania lost their elections and failed to secure power as governors or secretaries of state. Voters do not want extremists to have power over elections without checks and balances.

**[If you agree, sign the AOTL petition to show your support for checks and balances in redistricting.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55640867/382302324/-1462679232?source=20221206_AOTL_F_mvh1_Actives&refcode=20221206_AOTL_F_mvh1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1OTgxODkyLWEwNzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tVynM2wK-ad5qGSDwnQGZe5K_oWgwdPsj-MOma5L1qA=&emci=8e1b3b38-0f75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=c5981892-a075-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)**

clean_body: This redistricting case is in front of SCOTUS this week. | Friend -- The team here at All On The Line wanted to send you a primer on Moore v. Harper , the redistricting case in front of the Supreme Court this week. Our team has been in the weeds on this case for a while now -- our affiliate organization, the National Redistricting Foundation, is supporting the voters who are protecting the fair congressional map in North Carolina. Extreme North Carolina Republicans will be attempting to replace that fair map with the gerrymandered one that the state supreme court deemed unconstitutional. But their legal argument -- the “independent state legislature” theory -- has no sound legal support. And in fact, it runs counter to more than 100 years of legal precedent established by previous SCOTUS decisions. These extreme Republicans claim that state courts don’t have the power to decide whether state legislation regarding federal elections, such as the drawing of congressional maps, complies with -- or runs afoul of -- state laws. But in the landmark redistricting case Rucho v. Common Cause , Chief Justice Roberts explicitly pointed to the ability of state courts to enforce state laws as an example of checks and balances in the redistricting process that can protect voters from extreme gerrymandering. Demanding that gerrymandered state legislatures have unilateral power over congressional redistricting -- with no judicial oversight from state courts -- is pretty ridiculous. Voters sent a clear message when election deniers in places like Nevada, Michigan, and Pennsylvania lost their elections and failed to secure power as governors or secretaries of state. Voters do not want extremists to have power over elections without checks and balances. Our team will keep you posted as things unfold! \-- Marina Jenkins Litigation and Policy Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Hi, Peter, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – Georgians have casted their early ballot and now, Election Day for this critical runoff election is today.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. _[So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $25 or more now – split between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia – to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55612039/382245843/1583625711?refcode=20221206.3_RW_A30&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODVkNGU3Zi03Nzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DlSoXbY2gPzkghcWuCzvYE4LvaOxNEcOGEPK2K8vTQ4=)_**

body:
First, we ran more than $1.3 million in ads during this runoff. Effective ones. Ads that move independent voters.
#
Derek -
It’s Election Day in Georgia. And while we wait for the results, we wanted to take a moment to talk to you a little bit about what we did... together... this year.
First, we ran more than $1.2 million in ads during this runoff. Effective ones. Ads that move independent voters.
This is on top of the millions we spent during the first election. Again, ads that moved polls.
It’s also on top of the $23 million we spent this election. We’re talking about ads that helped re-elect Mark Kelly, Abigail Spanberger, and a number of other House races that many pundits wrote off.
Again, we did this together.
VoteVets was the 4th largest outside spending organization among Democratic groups this cycle.
But unlike others, most of our donations come from lots and lots of people contributing whatever they can, whenever they can.
**So we’ll see what happens tonight. But whatever the outcome, it’s time to reload for the fights ahead — legislative and electoral. But we can’t do it alone. So please:**
[**Can you contribute $5, $10 or WHATEVER you can afford today to VoteVets? We will put it right to work in the legislative and electoral fights that are sure to come immediately following tonight’s Georgia election.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221206-1-15&t=1&akid=7219%2E3013755%2EWAMVxT)
