name: Laura Loomer
subject: Vindicated by Elon’s Twitter Files
body:
The Internet has been on fire since Twitter's new owner, Elon Musk, released internal documents a few days ago that prove Twitter's staff at the highest levels were taking marching orders from the Biden Campaign and the DNC to censor conservatives. | | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BI4h30PkDMHfQrDCybIqYw/jBBY7u27kK4gGxkHl87jvA) | Dear Friend,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/KRlJopH1lM6h9T2gR2Mf8Q/jBBY7u27kK4gGxkHl87jvA) The Internet has been on fire since Twitter's new owner, Elon Musk, released internal documents a few days ago that prove Twitter's staff at the highest levels were taking marching orders from the Biden Campaign and the DNC to censor conservatives.

Social Media Bias was never simply about policies to excuse censorship . . . **it was about controlling the public narrative to benefit the Left and their political agenda.**

As more internal files are released, it will be proven that Twitter wasn't just listening to political parties and campaigns, but they were also directly banning people at the request of Leftist activists and organizations.

I was banned from Twitter in November of 2018 after Twitter executives met with leaders of a designated terrorist organization, CAIR (Council on American-Islamic Relations).

While that was exposed by the _Wall Street Journal _in 2019, we are sure to find emails and exchanges just like the ones released by Elon that prove Twitter was making every excuse they could think of to ban me and other influential conservatives - **all so they could advance their Leftist political agenda without interference.**

My lawsuit against Twitter and Facebook is moving forward, and it's vital we advance to the discovery phase as we can't rely on Elon Musk to reveal all of Twitter's internal documents.

But to do that, I'll need to be able to pay my legal fees, and that's where you can play a critical role in ending the censorship of conservatives. [**Will you please donate today?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BI4h30PkDMHfQrDCybIqYw/jBBY7u27kK4gGxkHl87jvA)

While I appreciate Musk's move to release these documents that prove political bias and Big Tech election interference at Twitter, he still hasn't delivered on his promise of "account amnesty" by reinstating tens of thousands of banned conservatives on his platform.

I'm still banned on Twitter, and I have not yet received my account back.

This isn't about being able to Tweet. It's about being able to TELL THE TRUTH to the world, and protecting the integrity of our elections.

That's what the Left hates. They hate being exposed for what they are. And they view me as one of their top threats, because even while being the most banned woman in the world, I have continued to expose them all.

So please, [**help me keep my lawsuit alive by donating here**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BI4h30PkDMHfQrDCybIqYw/jBBY7u27kK4gGxkHl87jvA), and stay tuned for more updates as my RICO lawsuit progresses!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Honoring the ratification of the 13th Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Dear Derek,

I’m reaching out today to honor the anniversary of the ratification of the 13th Amendment, which abolished slavery in 1865 and began our country’s long reckoning with racial injustice.

From the Reconstruction Era, to the civil rights movement of the 1950s and 60s, to the social justice protests during 2020, America’s journey to equality and prosperity for all of us, regardless of race, has been long and hard fought.

There is still so far to go for true equality, but I know that this country and the values it stands for are worth fighting for.

For country,

Chris Deluzio

----------
[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Re: Moore v. Harper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The biggest threat to free and fair elections
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55641421/382305774/823540626?refcode=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA5ZjFlZS1hMzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlE6-mS3AZOdOj00FMuND-WO-997ASqup0OxO8GIU5A=&emci=6ef8e0e8-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1049176)
It doesn’t stop, Peter. Tomorrow, SCOTUS will hear _Moore v. Harper_ , a case that threatens to end democracy as we know it. _And that’s not an exaggeration._ **Here’s what you need to know:** _Moore v. Harper_ could reinstate the extremely illegally gerrymandered congressional maps that North Carolina’s highest court threw out. The Republicans aren’t just arguing that their awful maps were legal, they are arguing that our state Supreme Court had **NO** authority to strike them down. That means state courts could lose power to strike down bad election laws passed by the legislature. Under the strongest form of this doctrine, state legislatures have unchecked authority to decide how elections are conducted in their state. _This is beyond the pale!_ **[Peter, add your name now to our petition demanding that SCOTUS do their job and protect our rights and defend our democracy>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55641422/382305775/-58660883?refcode=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA5ZjFlZS1hMzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlE6-mS3AZOdOj00FMuND-WO-997ASqup0OxO8GIU5A=&emci=6ef8e0e8-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1049176)** If the right-wing majority on SCOTUS sides with the North Carolina Republicans in this case:
* States could lose their ability to combat federal partisan gerrymandering
* Ballots in federal elections could be thrown out for arbitrary reasons
* State courts could no longer protect our voting rights in federal elections
* States could pass laws that allow them to throw out the presidential electors chosen by the people and select their own

**In states like North Carolina with a GOP-controlled legislature, this would be a disaster.** Republican-controlled state legislatures could throw out the results of presidential elections they don’t like. **[We cannot let this stand. We must act to make our voices heard. Sign our petition now to tell SCOTUS to defend our democracy instead of tearing it down>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55641423/382305776/-58660883?refcode=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA5ZjFlZS1hMzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlE6-mS3AZOdOj00FMuND-WO-997ASqup0OxO8GIU5A=&emci=6ef8e0e8-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1049176)** Thank you for standing with me. Roy Cooper [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55641424/382305777/-58660883?refcode=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA5ZjFlZS1hMzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlE6-mS3AZOdOj00FMuND-WO-997ASqup0OxO8GIU5A=&emci=6ef8e0e8-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1049176) | ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55641425/382305778/435245919?refcode=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ms=ea.b409f1ee-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDA5ZjFlZS1hMzc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GlE6-mS3AZOdOj00FMuND-WO-997ASqup0OxO8GIU5A=)****

subject: Time is running out
body:
Use your Oregon Political Tax Credit before midnight on 12/31 | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55641455/382305978/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2ODcwMTZhLWE0NzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1pmVYi1I_4LagQD1KU9nZJb-F1FhTy3myA8ZfEa8YM=&emci=8f3ae40b-9e75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=7687016a-a475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2107230) |

| | Dear Peter, Thank you so much for being an OLCV supporter. You make our work protecting Oregon’s people and places possible. As the end of the year approaches, I wanted to make sure that you know about Oregon’s Political Tax Credit. **[The State of Oregon gives eligible tax-paying Oregonians a $50 gift ($100 for couples filing jointly) that you can donate to a qualified political group, including OLCV PAC.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55641456/382305979/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2ODcwMTZhLWE0NzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1pmVYi1I_4LagQD1KU9nZJb-F1FhTy3myA8ZfEa8YM=&emci=8f3ae40b-9e75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=7687016a-a475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2107230) **By contributing today, you can help us continue electing environmental champions and it won’t cost you a dime. You are eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
* You are an Oregon resident.
* You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2022.
* You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly).

**[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55641457/382305980/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2ODcwMTZhLWE0NzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1pmVYi1I_4LagQD1KU9nZJb-F1FhTy3myA8ZfEa8YM=&emci=8f3ae40b-9e75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=7687016a-a475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2107230)** In the 2022 General Election, the message from voters was very clear: we want climate action and we want climate leadership. Because climate voters came out in force this election, Oregon's next governor will be a climate champ and we protected our pro-climate and pro-environment majorities in the state Senate and House. But winning elections is just the first step. We have to continue showing up every election, every legislative session, every day, and demanding action on issues that are important to us. **[Give to OLCV PAC using your Political Tax Credit](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55641458/382305981/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc2ODcwMTZhLWE0NzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=u1pmVYi1I_4LagQD1KU9nZJb-F1FhTy3myA8ZfEa8YM=&emci=8f3ae40b-9e75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=7687016a-a475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2107230)** and ensure that we have the resources we need to continue this important work in 2022 and beyond. Thanks for all you do. Sincerely,
Doug Moore
OLCV Executive Director |

name: Herschel
subject: I’m not sure what we’re going to do
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035912:JP2REoGNv:m:1:3331703221:E013E0EADED0DE2BDFF8F837C17022DA:r)

---
**Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never.**
Peter,

The runoff election is today.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us - even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

[** Help our Ground Game!
Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035912:JP2REoGNv:m:1:3331703221:E013E0EADED0DE2BDFF8F837C17022DA:r)
Peter, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, _our entire campaign suffers._

**If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose.**

**[I am counting on you to help make sure we have the funds we need to win this thing! Please chip in to help our ground game.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035912:JP2REoGNv:m:1:3331703221:E013E0EADED0DE2BDFF8F837C17022DA:r)**

**It's now or never.**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035912:JP2REoGNv:m:1:3331703221:E013E0EADED0DE2BDFF8F837C17022DA:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035912:JP2REoGNv:m:1:3331703221:E013E0EADED0DE2BDFF8F837C17022DA:r)

name: Young Dems of America via yda.org
subject: How else can we convince you
body:
We are down to the wire here in this election. We are in need of grassroots donors like you to help get our message out to young voters. What else can we say to convince you? | | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yA3tVaxbrjmEeQD3IRPUq_fn2toJ9AnieUrwShRJCcxSdwuuS6nKv4fLaRBqMSdN6opmNzdDY-hp0g0DfIXlWaMHP_DpQ6nBCtpQ5EgSJlN93lFGyCz1LsVOvJFmjjEYMcjV-SYMF6mknI8iO4y61wphk91AzagfcW3UhGoimfZglwWUh41fMSKRzzfrupg97_9fnnNTHARwVE0Zrdz2LhyWIXFZV7ARWUVKgxP8vfmDWrlznTReMnj6AaRAsv033WU-mkQegeHFPzW3wDkdHbevOofgtkxUx9HiqkD9jlKKxbsOo9ej-_lcs4so2pS5yIsWAwP2ed01Mar3rOZkiH/3rr/u4f6qJP4QtmF1WjwoChAlg/h0/burreJBwm63yB2xf_UyYVpkrk2x1jdaPDsA1SZNayt8)
---
---
---
Derek, we are down to the wire here in this election. Right now Voters area heading to the polls in Georgia and we are in need of grassroots donors like you to help get our message out to young voters in these final hours.
**_What else can we say to convince you?_**

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpZyQFJmwsJ5PhvcCRPt5e_D8sxfbOqQ73HurmRHm7XjCmHOrIrAfafDrLx16CP91ULKr67mORr-DIEY_J9OX1U8INcqQ63Vsctmr1ARTjhphBMf6mNW4DGJNHh6Je7fGpy3QXPyMayFKJSevirEToiq5k6-JpLoJ1wAKT_4hBmfDTPdyXi_mRxZctA3ShH8GYV7qsj8jkz44CbwGI7LX8QPxI5U94ha2oeC5U72A6HiMnuNDXaPNVot3bTYKCqvvWZ00j_YQIl31T2hqomoKYRSTrn1XKK59sr1IsBPXAEaWiqwwWPWxgXWv1s4l0sWmQPvDzwMH6QX8akrcH7gYu/3rr/u4f6qJP4QtmF1WjwoChAlg/h1/ffW80fBXkbux0CfZuQwWs14_eeWcSx83PgLSxSuYHLc)
What if we told you that Youth voter registration is at an all time high but many of these young voters have not voted early yet?

What if we told you that if Republicans have equal footing in the Senate, our generation will be set back even further than we already are?

**_What if we told you that even the smallest amount of money today can mean 1000’s of voters today with your help?_**
[**_Donate here if we have convinced you_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpZyQFJmwsJ5PhvcCRPt5e_D8sxfbOqQ73HurmRHm7XvEp2VYurdcxoSRN_92tTMzIWMsawgSv19QUsD9VPYcvWwvrh23ReO4-DoWXnzqFMbBruI2p4bzXbH8Jp5crfTD1Xt7VkrJ0Rr0AgKXtclxXYr0ghLNwsGFAvaO1oKOuSJcJe72ywfcJijIPfbG2Kc1EOHlmN54dzwdj2v_NjhQAvNSFH6mTgCldjsRSPY5pa-8kaO39aLR8zDP8migFsRC22m8B7b2TbNBS9jDCmwnN-21WuYGuKxiWJ6QsVZc4NSJcccKhtNWC8sXvQ8186BJY8F-HYT1UsbLfN8EVAAPs/3rr/u4f6qJP4QtmF1WjwoChAlg/h2/NDHBfaZDawhrqkPGBB5jEA2RYYWPRKr0K30Svu6uABo)
Young people today have **_so much_** at stake in this election. Reproductive Rights, Environmental Justice, the Right to Vote, and our Economic Futures are all on the line. **_As the largest and oldest youth-led partisan organization in the country, we are uniquely qualified to get this message out to our fellow young people, so know your money is going to the right place._**
But we can’t do that without your help. Campaigns will end tomorrow but our work doesn't. We are already making big plans for 2024.
Your donation will go a long way to expanding our majority in the Senate. With 49 chapters, we are active in every battleground and almost every state and territory you can think of. clean_body: We are down to the wire here in this election. We are in need of grassroots donors like you to help get our message out to young voters. What else can we say to convince you? | | | | | | Derek, we are down to the wire here in this election. Right now Voters area heading to the polls in Georgia and we are in need of grassroots donors like you to help get our message out to young voters in these final hours. What else can we say to convince you? What if we told you that Youth voter registration is at an all time high but many of these young voters have not voted early yet? What if we told you that if Republicans have equal footing in the Senate, our generation will be set back even further than we already are? What if we told you that even the smallest amount of money today can mean 1000’s of voters today with your help? Young people today have so much at stake in this election. Reproductive Rights, Environmental Justice, the Right to Vote, and our Economic Futures are all on the line. As the largest and oldest youth-led partisan organization in the country, we are uniquely qualified to get this message out to our fellow young people, so know your money is going to the right place. But we can’t do that without your help. Campaigns will end tomorrow but our work doesn't. We are already making big plans for 2024. Your donation will go a long way to expanding our majority in the Senate. With 49 chapters, we are active in every battleground and almost every state and territory you can think of. Thank you for all you do, The Young Democrats of America | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. clean_body: We’ll be frank – we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023. | | | | | We can’t believe it: over 750 Democrats have already renewed their 2023 DLCC Membership! That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. Does this look right? | 2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: 2023 Member Status: PENDING Suggested Gift: $10 This year showed the nation just how critical Democratic leadership at the state level can be – abortion access, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are being decided in state legislatures across the country. body:

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Being honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
America can't handle this loss
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| |
Fellow Conservative, it’s Herschel Walker. I know you’re busy, so I’ll be quick.

It’s official. Nikki Haley was right—Georgia is the TOUGHEST race in the country.

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Election Day, our Senate race is headed to a RUNOFF election on Tuesday, December 6.**

**Once again, it all comes down to Georgia.**

Two years ago, Democrats beat Republicans in Georgia, but we’re not going to let history repeat itself.

If far-Left Democrat Raphael Warnock wins this race again, there will be dire consequences for Georgia and our country. He’s weak on crime, reckless with our tax dollars, and a threat to our values.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff...and we’re quickly running out of time.

My opponent is the #1 fundraising senator in America, _**[so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-xdWcw "so I need your urgent support to close the gap and FLIP THIS SEAT.")**_
---
| | | | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $10](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $20](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | | [EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION OF $30](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._O9Rmhe7S-yenziayA)
---
| | | Democrats are already salivating about the liberal policies Raphael Warnock will help them pass in a Democrat-led Senate.

You and I must work together to stop this from happening. The path to victory is clear. The question is, will you help me get that victory, Fellow Conservative?

I know you are a patriot who is willing to go the extra mile, _**[so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?](http://trk.faithandlibertymail. "so can I count on you IMMEDIATELY?")**_
---
|
---
| | | [HELP ME WIN THIS RACE](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
To victory,

Herschel Walker
U.S. Senate Candidate

subject: Derek, I​ need your help to expand our Senate majority.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Like so many others in this election cycle, this race could come down to just a handful of votes. | |
---
In just a minute, I’m going to ask you to **[split a $10 donation between Senator Raphael Warnock’s campaign and the DNC before polls close in Georgia’s crucial runoff election.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xwBCZMAaDvd1Lam6EYqj7XzZHQIn7xmdNq2R_3BRQBppOdVpd5048nbVsz9odPlPy7UXAxazIOmLj_nTbu4HOsA1H5CgZhZTH9oDMJj_OphSAn73tpXO0yywLGaMMnDPwkycLccDXRGDHgTyApBdhiVXfeWzWpGkrCbOoPE-8tx66ly9vcFwEsPWRIGxQ8q7CEgeyU306ylrFsFa4Jl9DcTQZ_XKI0KlfSfQczPfFWnVrvBP85qUU8V6Hxz3PqfidUq1mYErLDxdDdc8DaEheGEbZ_a_6KK_ZqlfYQTdisnoFavmpXs_g8R9Nl_N4HwJgY0dkDgIhDJpU7iqmCX5gRZ9E1RNNboCO4TAOTXEvNO-VTkM2h7FhOhHgqE7l2GvQN0n9EJzhyaVS4PkoA3eWlSjVdBmqmYeQFc5XHTQephhw1PmI-JF5icIAy6tMfvS_Tr6kp9e_tPfYSwZeg2j3bhzPfnAc8isgGnFEmdJhwx0Khl49SeH3rGjufWiAjWJ2zzdLN0zLEx0kfmMdJ9APfIW5T6vn-lPDt3OD95ZXG9Tsh8O_FFfWTsZ2M68_3gIsdS-GHjxB9Y_Rh12dQiBpBGSd9TINeIrV4rgeZ5hy_BKw2Soaz-Q2HT5H-J-QZHoVAf3Suys5ftqzWhfXeZ8rfxsG81ub3aXw5gRLzQrwP-Q/3rr/sCXlaI1MT_mIJISnCQEgPg/h0/quI5H9COA_RyxNLh-lalgVR13Q3B9hiXnBP1xTqn-mg)** But first, I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why chipping in today is so important to our work to continue building a better America. I became the majority leader of the U.S. Senate because of _one_ single seat. Think about that, Derek: If this team hadn’t worked overtime to flip not one, but _both_ of Georgia’s Senate seats last January, Mitch McConnell would have taken the reins of the Senate and could have prevented Democrats from passing legislation to lower health care, energy, and other everyday costs for working families. Every bit of progress we’ve made is possible because this grassroots team worked to flip Georgia’s Senate seats. And listen, having 50 seats is great, but having 51 is even better. I’m turning to you to help expand our Democratic majority: **Will you split a $10 donation between Senator Raphael Warnock’s campaign and the DNC to protect this Senate seat, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats across the country?**

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I hold onto a persistent belief that more is possible in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Support the Georgia Runoff Fund and help send my dear friend Reverend Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642609/382310917/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221206_f_runoff_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjc3OS1hYTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjJ-1xF482Ll9wD35xN5z32vvTozwH3inNqIaJWrO0s=&emci=2f8136d1-9675-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=27722779-aa75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=1037277)

| | First of all, thank you for everything you’ve done to defend the freedom to vote. Thank you for believing in what we can achieve together. Thank you for fighting for a future for Georgians where everyone has access to education, health care, housing and a good living. And thank you for pushing to make our elections free, fair and secure. Each day, I think about the people I’ve met across Georgia. Like my family and me, they wake up each day with a persistent belief that more is possible. Our work continues, so I’m going to ask if you can [_**make a donation to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642610/382310918/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221206_f_runoff_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjc3OS1hYTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjJ-1xF482Ll9wD35xN5z32vvTozwH3inNqIaJWrO0s=) to help send my dear friend Reverend Raphael Warnock back to the U.S. Senate. But before I get to that, I want to talk about why this particular organization is such a meaningful destination for your dollars at this pivotal moment. **I started Fair Fight after the 2018 election because I believe that every eligible voter should be able to easily register to vote, cast their ballot and have that ballot counted.** Since then, Fair Fight has successfully combated voter suppression, made it possible for more people to exercise their power and their voice at the ballot box and helped elect pro-democracy champions like Senator Warnock to represent Georgia. Now, Fair Fight is working around the clock to re-elect Senator Warnock in Georgia’s Runoff Election — and to ensure that Georgians can make their voices heard and have their votes counted. Fair Fight was born for moments like this, but their team needs our help. [_**Will you make a donation of $20 or any amount to Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund today? Help get out the vote to re-elect Senator Warnock, and help protect the freedom to vote.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642611/382310919/147276702?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221206_f_runoff_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjc3OS1hYTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjJ-1xF482Ll9wD35xN5z32vvTozwH3inNqIaJWrO0s=) | [CHIP IN TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642612/382310920/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221206_f_runoff_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjc3OS1hYTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjJ-1xF482Ll9wD35xN5z32vvTozwH3inNqIaJWrO0s=)
---
I want to be very clear about the type of work your donation will support, and why it would make such a difference in Senator Warnock’s Runoff Election:
* **Fair Fight is speaking directly to Georgians across the state with phone calls, text messages, media outreach and organizing** to get out the vote for Senator Warnock — and their intentional, person-to-person messaging played a leading role in winning Georgia’s last U.S. Senate Runoffs.
* They stand out with **large-scale, culturally competent voter education and mobilization** in all of Georgia’s diverse communities — inspiring, persuading and rallying the kind of multi-racial, mutli-ethnic, multi-age coalition it takes to win in Georgia.
* And they **mitigate the dissemination and proliferation of disinformation** while providing accessible voting information and relevant civic education — making sure people have accurate information about how to vote and where candidates stand on critical issues, and also slowing the spread of election-related disinformation that can suppress and deter voters during critical elections where their voices need to be heard.

**In short, Fair Fight knows how to win Senate runoff elections in Georgia — but it comes down to grassroots support from people like you.**
[_**Please make a donation if you can to support Fair Fight’s Georgia Runoff Fund and help re-elect Senator Warnock.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642613/382310921/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221206_f_runoff_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjc3OS1hYTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjJ-1xF482Ll9wD35xN5z32vvTozwH3inNqIaJWrO0s=)
[CHIP IN TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642614/382310922/147276702?refcode=bsc_emm_sya_20221206_f_runoff_nor&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjc3OS1hYTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rjJ-1xF482Ll9wD35xN5z32vvTozwH3inNqIaJWrO0s=)

Thank you,
Stacey Abrams

**_Out of the ten counties that plan to hold early voting, all lean Democrat. _****Georgia's election rules are now corrupted and manipulated by an activist lawsuit machine.**

| | **With a single ruling, a state Supreme Court can decide the fate of our entire country.** This is the exact reason why we founded Fair Courts America. body:
| |
---
| | Peter, the one race that will determine how much control Democrats have in the Senate, could be decided by shady election lawyers and court rulings, not the ballot box! **[PROTECT OUR COURTS AND HOLD THE SENATE!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035955:6OhIVoGzN:m:1:3331703221:8F3627FF9F6350006356F5C16B87D578:r)**

| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035955:6OhIVoGzN:m:1:3331703221:8F3627FF9F6350006356F5C16B87D578:r)
---
Peter, The radical woke left has devised a malicious plan to change the Georgia Senate Runoff, and they have a secret weapon... **The Left is using their lawsuit machine to get their way in Georgia and deny the will of the American people.**[**Don 't let them, DEFEND OUR COURTS >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035955:6OhIVoGzN:m:1:3331703221:8F3627FF9F6350006356F5C16B87D578:r) Just last week, Georgia's Supreme Court sided with activist politicians and allowed some Georgia counties to participate in Saturday voting.
**_Out of the ten counties that plan to hold early voting, all lean Democrat. _****Georgia's election rules are now corrupted and manipulated by an activist lawsuit machine.**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035955:6OhIVoGzN:m:1:3331703221:8F3627FF9F6350006356F5C16B87D578:r)
---
| | **With a single ruling, a state Supreme Court can decide the fate of our entire country.** This is the exact reason why we founded Fair Courts America. We are committed to standing against injustices created by woke activists in the judicial system, uniting voters across the political spectrum, and restoring America's courts to their original purpose of rendering equal justice under the law.
---

---
When progressive activists seek to take control of the courts away from the people, Fair Courts America is there to defend our judicial system. **Our courts should not be used as a political weapon, and our elections should be left in the hands of the people. ** **[Join the fight and help protect America's courts!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035955:6OhIVoGzN:m:1:3331703221:8F3627FF9F6350006356F5C16B87D578:r)** Thank you for your support, Fair Courts America Team

name: Giffords PAC
subject: How about today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here’s the truth:
#

Friends -
You probably didn’t wake up this morning thinking it’d be the day you made your first online contribution to Giffords PAC. But we hope you’ll make that decision. Please let us explain why this request—especially today—is so important.
Here’s the truth:
In less than a month we’ll have a new Congress.
We’ll have a Senate with either 50 or 51 Democrats.
And we’ll have a House so narrowly divided that a few special elections (which always happen) could change the balance of power in-cycle.
We’ll also have hearings and legislation. Good bills we want to advance, and possibly some bad bills we want to stop.
Giffords has a role in ALL OF THIS WORK. And we need to be prepared. The fight to make our communities safer from gun violence is one that ebbs and flows—Gabby called it a “long, hard haul.”
And our work is not possible without support from people like you. So while you may not have thought today was the day, we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution of $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Giffords PAC today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll make our communities safer from gun violence: together.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221206-1-30&t=1&akid=2819%2E3935704%2EddlhiK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-dec22.jP9tfI&refcode=em221206-1-30&t=20&akid=2819%2E3935704%2EddlhiK)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cw1qcH&refcode=em221206-1-30&t=21&akid=2819%2E3935704%2EddlhiK)**

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: What’s next in the fight against Big Tech censorship
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| Peter- With the release of the internal Twitter emails, Elon Musk has revealed the smoking gun evidence that Big Tech is engaging in censorship at the behest of the Biden Administration.
We always knew this was the case, but nonetheless it is an important revelation and gives us tangible proof that these companies are packed with left- wing middle managers who are happily catering to the Democrats' agenda.
Over a year ago, I drafted a bill that would protect users from political censorship by adding political affiliation as a protected class under Section 230. This would have empowered entities like The Babylon Bee and the New York Post in their fights against Twitter. It's one of a number of Republican bills that Nancy Pelosi blocked which would have addressed Big Tech's political censorship.
All of that changes on January 3rd when Republicans take control of the House and Pelosi is no longer standing in our way.
Since this will be one of our top priorities in the new Congress, I'd really like to hear about your own thoughts and experiences with Big Tech censorship.
[If you have two minutes to spare, please take my Big Tech Censorship Survey here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019cDpq4sAqdBLd2NQvvqHR8hDjcybRPexOvMntsJBB78Wy01_bXPBt48fNvZEoXBIMrn2t4daJQUpbCP18Xcis72LxpkWasStsOR2kWOWaqrbVY2S0j88h2FgeQc1Ccq4GZsEECx2cja2JhgOt4uOeChSGmZ36AnlZq3IWAWZSJaXPqVcEYACl0s6utMXrQLlEXvTdhVxtmETn52RGDiRS3bgwy2oo34fHSBVH82WDd0sjwE3EB4TDiPi0ECEzq6DoZ5ZG0SnEFTwZMX6kZu8Euu-JFbteTlHPv7qRKOKzaf5T68FzW_fnqbXlbe_btZRycXhoggx1WNbMir35_wIO6DmV7h0uZ32G3jIDfxbp-gWS7d7mURHXoVFjJcDjjA_&c=MvedO2N_ITyBiwGrAua4HCX5SEAqgWoQM_M-WLnMv0SwFb4OsCE_iA==&ch=fi0QCX7Qx97XQ9JTh43p24oq9H1QQXbRcZT_nnyTswQt2npKgSdRSQ==)

Our Senate runoff election is today, and Georgians are casting their ballots _as you read this_. Our team is on the ground across the state right now – mobilizing every last voter to make sure we can keep this seat blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

Peter, The 2024 Indiana political landscape is coming into clear view. We’re seeing the national trends of the Republican Party happening right here in Indiana: Republicans are divided and fighting amongst themselves. As extreme Republicans like Mike Braun jockey for position, **Democrats have an opportunity to capitalize on their arrogance and extremism.** We know that the key to success in politics is a long-term commitment to organizing at the local level. That’s why we’re committed to investing in municipal elections in 2023, flipping as many mayoral seats as we can, and setting ourselves up for success in 2024. [**If you’re with us, chip in $10 to our cause and help us build a safer, stronger Indiana.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55619053/382268774/1643342139?refcode=221206-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzYyN2MwYy04NTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d_qOAKDi_qAHxG5g7RGFnH6us4-CmpR0zj1idCU-4ak=) As Republicans continue to look to the past, like the 2020 election, and invoke unnecessary culture wars, Democratic candidates and officials are focused on the future of our state and the issues that matter most to Hoosiers. body:

Hi, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, Georgians are voting in today's critical runoff election.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $58,184 short of our _crucial_ fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap.** The GOP has already poured more than $122 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so we need to fight back.

**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. [So please, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $5 or more now – split between me and the DSCC – to keep Georgia blue and grow our majority for years to come?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221206-RaphaelWarnock-Tandem5ThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221206-RaphaelWarnock-Tandem5ThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=9083%2E9716520%2Egz7MLg)**

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Chaney - Your Break is Over
body:
Your Break is Over By: Rebecca Y. ChaneyWhy is our nation in decline? It is easy to play Captain Obvious with a squinched forehead and pointed finger and list the ways our nation is suffering. It | |
---

| | | Your Break is Over |
---|---|---
| |
---
_**By: Rebecca Y. Chaney**_
Why is our nation in decline? It is easy to play Captain Obvious with a squinched forehead and pointed finger and list the ways our nation is suffering. It is a bit harder to pin down the root issues of why. What is the ultimate reason our nation and world is in utter decay?
At one time in our nation’s history, we had core belief systems that were upheld by core institutions for over one hundred years. As a result, trust was earned. For any society to remain in some form of consistent security and steadfastness, there must be some level of trust. As time passed, and because cultural and individual values shifted to a self-centric system, trust was eroded.
In the 1940s, World War II was ongoing, and the world was in chaos. By the 1950s, Boomers were growing up, and young adults were second guessing rules, authorities, and even morality. Our veterans were returning home from the war, battle weary and fatigued. In the 1960s, alternative philosophies wreaked havoc across the fruited plains. Drugs, feminism, devaluation of male and female relationships, sexual confusion, vocational rights, and human injustices were brought front and center to public conversations. We saw the government invest in war because they saw the profit. Churches fought, and denominations were at odds. Pop Culture influenced new religious beliefs such as mysticism. The LGBTQ+ community was breaking out as heavily as teen acne, and the nuclear family was under assault.
By the end of the 1960s, co-habitation, no-fault divorce, presidential embarrassments, and abortion were normal. Christianity and the Church were being challenged. By the end of the 1970s, people were tired. Culture was successfully trashing once loved and revered institutions. The people hoped that a well-meaning President Reagan could help get things back on track, but it was too far gone.
Luke 11:24-26 tells us what happens when you clean your house, sit down, and take a break.
“When an unclean spirit comes out of man, it roams through waterless places looking for rest, and not finding it, it then says, ‘I’ll go back to my house where I came.’ And returning, it finds the house swept and put in order. Then it goes and brings seven other more evil spirits than itself, and they enter and settle down there. As a result, that man’s last condition is worse than the first.”
After World War II, people were tired and took a break. It reminds me of the Israelites, and today, we are no different. After God gave Israel the victory and inheritance of the land, people enjoyed peace and rest. (Joshua 21:43-44). But the people still had a sacred responsibility to honor and obey God who had rescued and delivered them. They were commanded to love God and serve Him only. Judges chapter 1 summarizes the very last of the land’s conquest and the fact that Israel failed to do what God commanded of them. They were to cast out idols and idolatrous inhabitants of the land of Canaan. The Angel of the Lord warned them they would have severe consequences if they did not. (Judges 2:1-3). During the years of Joshua, the people took to heart the command of God. Judges 2:7 says they served the Lord all their days. But after that generation died, the people turned to idols for they knew not what the Lord had done for Israel. (Judges 2:10)
The remaining Canaanites that the Israelites failed to destroy influenced the Israelites to worship false idols. God’s anger against the idolatry and disobedience burned, and he handed them over to the surrounding nations. (Judges 2:14) But God is merciful, and He showed the Israelites this mercy over and over. Here is the pattern. Does this sound familiar?
The Israelites turn to idols, and it angers the one, true God. God brings punishment, because He is Holy and cannot be part of sin. The Israelites cry out for deliverance. God shows mercy and provides a deliverer raised up through a Judge. After deliverance, the Israelites turn to idolatry. The cycle repeats.
Do we not do this as Americans? As the world? The failure of man from the time of the Old Testament Israelites to present-day men and women is rooted in our disobedience and our failure to trust God which is covetousness. What our hearts value determines where our hearts lead. Taking a break is never an option. When we seemingly tidy up our lives and our areas of influence and when all seems to be right in the world for even a short time, we sit down. We take a break. We go to sleep. The cycle repeats, but usually, like Luke 11:24-26 tells us, things get much worse.
God tells us in Luke to “occupy until I come.” God also tells us in Genesis to “tend the garden.” We want to sow and reap the harvests of life! We are simply to steward well the talents and trusts we have been given so we will reap a harvest. (Galatians 6:9). If we do not allow Christ to occupy us, something WILL occupy that space that is much grimmer.
Our western culture is inundated with comfort. Part of the great reward of capitalism is the enjoyment of the fruits of thy labor. We have forgotten that our greatest strategy to enjoying gifts from the Lord is through wise stewardship. One day, those in Christ will get an eternal rest that never wears out, but until that day, we must be faithful to steward well all that God has given us. Being idle can lead to idols. We must resist the urge to sit down and take a break. You cannot take a break and push a reset button when things are disorderly again. Culture does not work this way. With our personal lives, our homes, and our nation, it takes constant stewarding to prevent unwelcome guests from taking over and influencing us away from the path that leads to life. May nothing secure the ultimate hold of our hearts but Christ alone.
NO BREAKS! Onward!
* * *
_Rebecca Chaney is the Director for Restore Liberty Mississippi, and she sits on the board for the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. She is a lifetime Patriot Academy Constitution Coach and has hosted Biblical Citizenship and Constitutional classes since 2020. She helped to start these classes across the state of Mississippi. She is a homeschool Mom of seven years to her son and daughter._

| Donate to the Freedom Caucus |
---|---|---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators who stand up for your rights and liberty. But we need your help.
* Legislative leadership blocks donations to Freedom Caucus members.
* Lobbyists refuse to donate to members' campaigns because we work for you, NOT them.
* Local politicians campaign against Freedom Caucus members because we oppose tax increases.

This is why your donation means so much to the Freedom Caucus. Without your support, they win and you lose.[Donate Today!](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/hOUCyej0JvTkhpM96xZD5A) I can help with a [$10 donation](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/hOUCyej0JvTkhpM96xZD5A)I can help with a [$20 donation](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/hOUCyej0JvTkhpM96xZD5A)I can help with a [$50 donation](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/hOUCyej0JvTkhpM96xZD5A)I can help with a [$100 donation](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/hOUCyej0JvTkhpM96xZD5A) |

subject: The Biggest Problem with the Georgia Senate Runoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, the one race that will determine how much control Democrats have in the Senate, could be decided by shady election lawyers and court rulings, not the ballot box! **[PROTECT OUR COURTS AND HOLD THE SENATE!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035976:JPO9VoGN3:m:1:3253819041:FF1693DB73D5031FE3D05635D1740C29:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035976:JPO9VoGN3:m:1:3253819041:FF1693DB73D5031FE3D05635D1740C29:r)
---
Peter, The radical woke left has devised a malicious plan to change the Georgia Senate Runoff, and they have a secret weapon... **The Left is using their lawsuit machine to get their way in Georgia and deny the will of the American people.**[**Don 't let them, DEFEND OUR COURTS >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035976:JPO9VoGN3:m:1:3253819041:FF1693DB73D5031FE3D05635D1740C29:r) Just last week, Georgia's Supreme Court sided with activist politicians and allowed some Georgia counties to participate in Saturday voting.
**_Out of the ten counties that plan to hold early voting, all lean Democrat. _****Georgia's election rules are now corrupted and manipulated by an activist lawsuit machine.**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035976:JPO9VoGN3:m:1:3253819041:FF1693DB73D5031FE3D05635D1740C29:r)
---
| | **With a single ruling, a state Supreme Court can decide the fate of our entire country.** This is the exact reason why we founded Fair Courts America. We are committed to standing against injustices created by woke activists in the judicial system, uniting voters across the political spectrum, and restoring America's courts to their original purpose of rendering equal justice under the law.
---
[**SUPPORT OUR MISSION**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035976:JPO9VoGN3:m:1:3253819041:FF1693DB73D5031FE3D05635D1740C29:r)
---
When progressive activists seek to take control of the courts away from the people, Fair Courts America is there to defend our judicial system. **Our courts should not be used as a political weapon, and our elections should be left in the hands of the people. ** **[Join the fight and help protect America's courts!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035976:JPO9VoGN3:m:1:3253819041:FF1693DB73D5031FE3D05635D1740C29:r)** Thank you for your support, Fair Courts America Team
---

Team, The holiday season is here and the end of 2022 is rapidly approaching in just a few short weeks. As we get ready to celebrate the holidays with friends and family, Gabe is preparing to serve you and New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District in Congress this January! **Before December ends and Gabe is sworn into office on January 3, 2023, he wanted us to reach out one more time with an end-of-year survey to get your thoughts.** As we close this chapter and enter a new year, what issues are top-of-mind for you and your family right now? name: Joe Walsh via Blue Amp Action
subject: Today is the day. I get it, we're all tired after a long election cycle. But Mitch McConnell isn't tired. He's throwing over $50 million into Georgia to buy another seat, and if we're gonna stop him we must support Senator Warnock with all we've got before the polls close today.
body:
Final call for GOTV
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19929615-db3d-43e5-9405-f73dceb728ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7af86b0f-5f68-4ac8-8a7f-074282c57ff3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, | _**This Republican is here to tell you that you have to support Senator Raphael Warnock if we want our democracy to survive. This isn’t hyperbole. Today is the last day, and the campaign still needs help getting voters to the polls. **_ [**_Will you join me by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Senator Warnock, so he can hold onto his seat today and we can hold onto our democracy?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74833863-014f-4fca-8c4f-59200322d91d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Though I'm no longer in the good graces of the Republican Party, I still have friends and sources over there. They think they're gonna win because of all the money Mitch McConnell has dumped into the race. We can't let that happen._** As you probably know, I was once part of the problem. I was a Tea Party Republican who made the mistake of thinking outrage was why I was in Washington._ Once I saw I helped pave a path to electing someone as morally and emotionally unfit as Donald Trump, I knew I had to change._ **_That's why I'm supporting Senator Warnock, a good and decent man who will fight to protect our democracy._**
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
Justice for Jan. 6th protestors!
| | | |

| Peter,

| On our VERY FIRST DAY of Republican control in the House of Representatives, we should take over the January 6 Committee and use it to release EVERY SECOND of Capitol video footage that will EXONERATE our Patriots!!!

| | [PLEASE JOIN ME: DEMAND JUSTICE FOR THE J6 PRISONERS!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M16NM3nYDAm2kX9NXIl4pqBbRerLzJpNnCRJuQjIjMkL5TZAt9txzxo9bqvCw7hUj8U8Owc7OEyGF-zX_EJShHkhMKV235YHtgSD6Qu2l4cdfPAww9hc-9lUZQbum-IJ91LhORFFYDMvm2Kj_X06CLrYGsfEYbj3fB4iY1V1rOBFlJHRJqOsXzrOED7Fj3V2Jz5JZlzg5kfLMKOukndTNoWOlYD3JfNk&c=h89dBFyYxsbmxulMkZ7QPXwt86jvRmGQEdMMasjLB0WHFuthJSZY0Q==&ch=vkruak0yHyzLEoLybldw7Z7Bkit0-Mr3xmnIZ0RrmQlV9Im5H9x_Aw==)

| That is the response we should have to the Fedsurrection that sought to demonize Trump supporters like you and permanently eradicate our movement from the political map.
Americans were locked up in solitary confinement in the D.C. Gulag.
They were denied their basic rights.
And all because Democrats and RINO Never Trumpers were trying to dupe everyone into believing that MAGA Republicans like you are some kind of domestic terrorist threat.
Those Stalinist tactics cannot go unanswered...
[>> It's time we use their special little committee against them, and FREE the patriots who are being used as pawns in the Regime's anti-Trump crusade!!! <<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M16NM3nYDAm2kX9NXIl4pqBbRerLzJpNnCRJuQjIjMkL5TZAt9txzxo9bqvCw7hUj8U8Owc7OEyGF-zX_EJShHkhMKV235YHtgSD6Qu2l4cdfPAww9hc-9lUZQbum-IJ91LhORFFYDMvm2Kj_X06CLrYGsfEYbj3fB4iY1V1rOBFlJHRJqOsXzrOED7Fj3V2Jz5JZlzg5kfLMKOukndTNoWOlYD3JfNk&c=h89dBFyYxsbmxulMkZ7QPXwt86jvRmGQEdMMasjLB0WHFuthJSZY0Q==&ch=vkruak0yHyzLEoLybldw7Z7Bkit0-Mr3xmnIZ0RrmQlV9Im5H9x_Aw==)

| The J6 Committee was flat-out BANANA REPUBLIC stuff from the very beginning, Peter.
It was established to make YOU the enemy and to STOP Trump 2024 from happening.
But these Swamp politicians messed with the wrong movement...
[And with your help supporting Republicans who actually have BACKBONE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M16NM3nYDAm2kX9NXIl4pqBbRerLzJpNnCRJuQjIjMkL5TZAt9txzxo9bqvCw7hUj8U8Owc7OEyGF-zX_EJShHkhMKV235YHtgSD6Qu2l4cdfPAww9hc-9lUZQbum-IJ91LhORFFYDMvm2Kj_X06CLrYGsfEYbj3fB4iY1V1rOBFlJHRJqOsXzrOED7Fj3V2Jz5JZlzg5kfLMKOukndTNoWOlYD3JfNk&c=h89dBFyYxsbmxulMkZ7QPXwt86jvRmGQEdMMasjLB0WHFuthJSZY0Q==&ch=vkruak0yHyzLEoLybldw7Z7Bkit0-Mr3xmnIZ0RrmQlV9Im5H9x_Aw==), we are going to repurpose this little Witch Hunt Club and use it to get down to the bottom of what REALLY happened on January 6!
That means EXPOSING the full extent of the federal government's role...
And it means TAKING OVER their snarky little Twitter account, using it to pump out the THOUSANDS of hours of unreleased footage from that day that will EXONERATE all the Patriots who the Regime has thrown into the Gulag!
Help me convince our incoming majority that this is the "Commitment to America" we need to make...
If you believe in JUSTICE for the victims of this Fedsurrection...
[>> Then please take a stand for our Patriots and support the cause today! <](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M16NM3nYDAm2kX9NXIl4pqBbRerLzJpNnCRJuQjIjMkL5TZAt9txzxo9bqvCw7hUj8U8Owc7OEyGF-zX_EJShHkhMKV235YHtgSD6Qu2l4cdfPAww9hc-9lUZQbum-IJ91LhORFFYDMvm2Kj_X06CLrYGsfEYbj3fB4iY1V1rOBFlJHRJqOsXzrOED7Fj3V2Jz5JZlzg5kfLMKOukndTNoWOlYD3JfNk&c=h89dBFyYxsbmxulMkZ7QPXwt86jvRmGQEdMMasjLB0WHFuthJSZY0Q==&ch=vkruak0yHyzLEoLybldw7Z7Bkit0-Mr3xmnIZ0RrmQlV9Im5H9x_Aw==)[<](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M16NM3nYDAm2kX9NXIl4pqBbRerLzJpNnCRJuQjIjMkL5TZAt9txzxo9bqvCw7hUj8U8Owc7OEyGF-zX_EJShHkhMKV235YHtgSD6Qu2l4cdfPAww9hc-9lUZQbum-IJ91LhORFFYDMvm2Kj_X06CLrYGsfEYbj3fB4iY1V1rOBFlJHRJqOsXzrOED7Fj3V2Jz5JZlzg5kfLMKOukndTNoWOlYD3JfNk&c=h89dBFyYxsbmxulMkZ7QPXwt86jvRmGQEdMMasjLB0WHFuthJSZY0Q==&ch=vkruak0yHyzLEoLybldw7Z7Bkit0-Mr3xmnIZ0RrmQlV9Im5H9x_Aw==)

Thanks for helping me expose the TRUTH,

body:
| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c7c9c91b6a764a5a9579fce3701775c5&_e=SeoCy-nsa92BY-p5wE5ndtPnJ0o8yPYJdtLgqlSEK85K2aEIyud3909zfFARdjO72jWGZkoIeWPIfis6N34euR9bTa7uGzUCsLU7LGLsgJZsrlBTyME7JjETEJ94L1Tgd7NDI60I4TIOi3htlGkdc3zmuxvCnEEe329rWs3Tv5xwy7pQE6pYrpanoO8huowp3o8_4YxawGgjycZ5t8uUv7lr5wLljeXFuj4wURtACe6_42RMeysFlSCFYhh5iv8PTTALYBss66owl1DEcM4NNfz3EoYQDQDmvOFOilmwi3PpIO64cyqBngH-TzcPuXOndG9VX8-8luWI8c3QhKAyAw%3D%3D)

| | Friend—You’ve been a trusted supporter throughout the campaign, so I know I can be direct with you. We’re in a real pickle. Republicans took back the House... _but by the skin of our teeth_. Our elections are a hot mess, we have radical Democrats infiltrating our government, our president is driving the U.S. into the ground, and the Republicans’ majority is razor-thin. To make matters worse, my campaign is staring down the barrel of our last fundraising deadline of 2022. I hate to be so blunt right before Christmas, but this is important, friend. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | Friend—You’ve been a trusted supporter throughout the campaign, so I know I can be direct with you. We’re in a real pickle. Republicans took back the House... but by the skin of our teeth. Our elections are a hot mess, we have radical Democrats infiltrating our government, our president is driving the U.S. into the ground, and the Republicans’ majority is razor-thin. To make matters worse, my campaign is staring down the barrel of our last fundraising deadline of 2022. I hate to be so blunt right before Christmas, but this is important, friend. This is the most crucial fundraising deadline after the hard-fought midterm elections, and the numbers we put up right now have a real impact on our future. You see, Democrats sent hundreds of millions of dollars across the country before the election to derail conservative districts and deplete Republicans’ (like myself) campaign funds to zero. Democrats know that the only way they can secure their grip on power is to defeat congressmen like me who don’t waver in our conservative values. That’s why I need your support today. I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t critical, Friend. Anything you can donate will help prove to the far left that they will NEVER stand a chance in East Tennessee. body:
A new Congress brings new opportunities to fight for the policies that will make the greatest impacts in your daily lives.

| Peter,

Thanks to supporters like you stepping up when I needed you most, I will be returning to Congress for my third term! **Before the 118th Congress begins in January, I want to hear from you:[_what issues should I prioritize in the coming term?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55644037/382317489/-147079429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODNjOTk4Yy1iNDc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kgY3ndUdVSMhEIXQp9XmWyqMlUeuHS7-f7NAxE-ujGs=&emci=1699a099-9175-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=a83c998c-b475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5543981)**
---
| [START SURVEY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55644038/382317490/-147079429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODNjOTk4Yy1iNDc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kgY3ndUdVSMhEIXQp9XmWyqMlUeuHS7-f7NAxE-ujGs=&emci=1699a099-9175-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=a83c998c-b475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5543981)
---
I am proud to be a member of Congress who always puts the needs of my constituents first, and the proof is in my work over the past four years: I’ve fought to bring down health care costs, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend your freedom to control your body. And working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I’ve passed bills to invest in manufacturing in our community, ensure veterans get the health care they deserve, and strengthen our infrastructure.

**A new Congress brings new opportunities to fight for the policies that will make the greatest impacts in your daily lives – and that means I need to hear from you.**

This survey will only take a few minutes of your time and your answers will be invaluable to me and my team. [_**Can you fill it out now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55644039/382317491/-147079429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODNjOTk4Yy1iNDc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kgY3ndUdVSMhEIXQp9XmWyqMlUeuHS7-f7NAxE-ujGs=&emci=1699a099-9175-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=a83c998c-b475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5543981)
| [START SURVEY ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55644040/382317492/-147079429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODNjOTk4Yy1iNDc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kgY3ndUdVSMhEIXQp9XmWyqMlUeuHS7-f7NAxE-ujGs=&emci=1699a099-9175-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=a83c998c-b475-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=5543981)

clean_body: A new Congress brings new opportunities to fight for the policies that will make the greatest impacts in your daily lives. | = | Peter, Thanks to supporters like you stepping up when I needed you most, I will be returning to Congress for my third term! Before the 118th Congress begins in January, I want to hear from you: | I am proud to be a member of Congress who always puts the needs of my constituents first, and the proof is in my work over the past four years: I’ve fought to bring down health care costs, protect Social Security and Medicare, and defend your freedom to control your body. And working with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle, I’ve passed bills to invest in manufacturing in our community, ensure veterans get the health care they deserve, and strengthen our infrastructure. A new Congress brings new opportunities to fight for the policies that will make the greatest impacts in your daily lives – and that means I need to hear from you. This survey will only take a few minutes of your time and your answers will be invaluable to me and my team. | Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. subject: It’s Election Day in Georgia!
body:

Friend,
---
| | Four weeks ago, the Senate race between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock came down to less than one point. Today’s runoff election will be just as close. This is our final chance to pull off a Republican victory this year. If you’re a Georgia voter, make sure to get out and cast your ballot! Let’s win today. My very best,

Nikki Haley

body:
I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. |
---
Peter,

I know something about winning close races.

Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes.

Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, **[and my friend, Herschel, needs our help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=077e1b6d97a04ae5897c6e2ffb355d8d&_e=YtAzSku8EoEEOF-SZVPUiWgCB0YZn0NsElln7SisfFniiipkQ-zLxtUwaCLP1x9cB5WW9UEKrRKlx5XGx2HUCw00I_jJN-cQRIh9VPTbcXtQy9sNyHirJFOCWWhCvicOnWHTu2HsZQR0TqZm1rFx6tuSQn4r5w3-v9_0onY-WfOFGoZFYTWVaezgQJmzK0uvIEgJ4KelwF9Huhxeqy_LRAOB7U1Y_Qie7Vtie6bACyxBfVAfzH4Kt9GPuH7vK7Y86JKkkSKKnKQgJdGFxdc2wvXEzgsriCqB8OeKwg0tw7ll7QTjNCCuc8aQqa8ROalVFpZXVF1zVqkjF4uUdCRHVBYKr9z_fi6nDSlbL384WIbeteczVgbg5T0a26YzEHnB4qE3115bGmobU-Z6O0tCk4GFzu5PRj9L8xqwKoCyp1Dz0nkwJEE7e0UxdTgRwBabKbRamp7Yr_4bNjmO3rS17g%3D%3D)**

[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=077e1b6d97a04ae5897c6e2ffb355d8d&_e=YtAzSku8EoEEOF-SZVPUiWgCB0YZn0NsElln7SisfFniiipkQ-zLxtUwaCLP1x9cB5WW9UEKrRKlx5XGx2HUCw00I_jJN-cQRIh9VPTbcXtQy9sNyHirJFOCWWhCvicOnWHTu2HsZQR0TqZm1rFx6tuSQn4r5w3-v9_0onY-WfOFGoZFYTWVaezgQJmzK0uvIEgJ4KelwF9Huhxeqy_LRAOB7U1Y_Qie7Vtie6bACyxBfVAfzH4Kt9GPuH7vK7Y86JKkkSKKnKQgJdGFxdc2wvXEzgsriCqB8OeKwg0tw7ll7QTjNCCuc8aQqa8ROalVXGEY8PDON055nt19dS-iBt3Zb1PvG-oboinlVxt1TqXc9m1mnRbNJnpymn_mBZwkCSAPLrAW-nlzpaS9xaIjciw2QOozXmsFXYUASfSd2_5GFIjUQQcpMD__cqZfbDCOMmeX-SvsjJR-hnhrYdwi5g%3D%3D)

We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN.

It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate.

**We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations.**

**[That's why I am personally asking for your urgent help, Peter. clean_body: I was just down in Georgia, campaigning for Herschel Walker, because this race is important to EVERY AMERICAN. | Peter, I know something about winning close races. Last month I won the newly drawn 10th Congressional district in Michigan by just 1,600 votes. Just like my race, this runoff between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is a dogfight, It is critical to make sure we send Herschel to the Senate because whatever happens in Georgia will affect you and me. That's why I recently joined Herschel to campaign with him on his bus tour across Georgia. We've seen what damage Democrats in Washington have done to our economy. We've seen how they've treated the men and women who serve our country. We've seen how they've left our border WIDE OPEN. It's time for a change. That's why I'm excited to go to Washington and serve, but we also need Herschel Walker in the Senate. We need a fighter on the goal line to make sure we protect our American values and the American Dream for future generations. Thank you, John James Congressman-Elect | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: Will D.C. jail kill this Jan.6 peaceful protester?
body:

Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv2s39dcjuo2nha5mk83463c3han521pohh762j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpim1p30sth2bs)
---

---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7kteb1rpk0uai0ha0nh8ost86eeek8rgp33srao_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpim1p30sth2bs) Hi Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zureamlcvog1bisaihv4clovo6rceur1j4jt49j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpim1p30sth2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk4oihihebngm7rs1gis791mn2ucp3ecuf7kspho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpim1p30sth2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvi2mjip65tt05e7e3k0ojjddhqsp30s3b450stg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpim1p30sth2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9bf4t0n2b9mcmqlp38af99m9ut67okst3mlvp20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0cpim1p30sth2bs)

---

name: Pete Sepp
subject: The biggest threat to America
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035162:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
Peter,

No one is talking about the biggest threat to national security in America's history -- the national debt.

In the last 15 years, America's national debt has skyrocketed.

An incredible 70% of that $31 trillion debt load was accumulated from the start of the fiscal year (FY) 2008, October 1, 2007, through FY 2022, September 30, 2022.

We have hit $31 trillion in gross debt faster than probably any policymaker could have imagined in 2007.

And now, _interest payments alone_ are about to exceed what the U.S. spends on the Defense Department.

**Unless we get the national debt under control, it will continue to grow and suffocate the economy. **

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union. We are the voice for taxpayers in D.C. Special interests have their lobbyists. B _**ut who is working for you as a taxpayer?**_ The answer -- the National Taxpayers Union.

Our team is working to convince Congress to rein in out-of-control government spending and get the national debt under control. That's why I've set a goal to raise $25,000 to support our fight.

[_**Can I count on you to helps us lobby Congress and REVERSE this trend? Please send your urgent gift today by clicking here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035162:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)

The national debt has been growing at an unsustainable rate, Peter.

And there are numerous consequences that come with unmanageable debt loads.

* Rising interest rates will require **higher interest payments on existing debt** by the U.S. government, and interest payments on existing debt will eat up a larger and larger share of revenues the government brings in.

* Increasing government debt crowds out private sector investment, _" which would result in lower business investment and slow the growth of economic output over time,"_ according to Congress's own budget office.

* Investors may lose confidence in the U.S. government's ability to pay its bills, increasing the risk of a flight from U.S. debt which would **raise borrowing costs** for the federal government even further.

* Rising debt makes it **more difficult for U.S. policymakers to react to future economic and fiscal shocks** , such as recessions, military conflicts, natural disasters, and public health crises.

It's time to tell Congress to tap the brakes, before $31 trillion seems as small in the future as $9 trillion seems now.

[_**A donation has a HUGE impact on our lobbying efforts.**__**If you want to get America 's debt under control, all you have to do is send NTU a one-time gift.**__**Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035162:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)

We need lawmakers to take even modest steps toward more sustainable debt levels. And like any small first steps, once they get taken, it's easier for others to follow, until pretty soon, we're making real progress. But unless Congress gets moving, the chance greatly increases that the U.S. will experience another federal debt crisis at some point in coming years.

This is where NTU plays a critical role.

Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:

* We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986.
* We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.
* In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform.
* In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS two major defeats in the Supreme Court.

And with your help, NTU can add reining in the national debt as our next victory.

Can I count on you to join the fight today? **Click below to donate. **

[_**Donate $25 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035163:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035164:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035165:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035166:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035167:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035168:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
[_**Donate $ 2,500 >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035169:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62035162:JW7VGoGNP:m:1:3331421248:48BFE301702BE455378857BC32A05B7B:r)

Thank you,

Pete Sepp
President
National Taxpayers Union

_NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels._

Friend,

**This will be one of the more important emails we send you.**

_Leftist activists, politicians, billionaires, and the media_ are scheming and trying their hardest to conquer Georgia and all 49 other states.

These freedom-hating socialists' dream is to shred YOU of YOUR Second Amendment. They want to leave us, our families, and our communities defenseless. They won't stop until every lawfully owned firearm is banned, registered, confiscated, and destroyed. _**We can't let that happen.**_

Team,
Please join us for our last virtual fundraising event of the year on **Wednesday, December 21st at 6:00 pm** central standard time.
As we settle our final expenses from a hard-fought campaign, this will be a time for all to meet with Keith, hear him reflect on the 2022 election cycle, and give a preview of what his next four years as Attorney General will look like.
It’s critical that we’re able to continue organizing and reaching out to new people across the state. We need to have face-to-face conversations and listen to what is really affecting people’s lives. And none of this is possible without your continued support.
_**REMINDER: You have until December 31st to make a refundable donation of $50 (or $100 for couples) with Minnesota’s 2022 Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program.**_
[**Please find below the registration link, where you will be able to take advantage of your $50 refund and register to attend the virtual event.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55639339/382293882/1351644599?refcode=body&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU3MzU0Mi05ODc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YNtnPrz4bHEXUjgFzvtxfwlmcTP8ZGEJkd7ZMEwwrPw=)

| | **Friend, Brendan's been elected Ranking Member of the House Budget Committee. He's the youngest member of Congress to lead his party on a legislative committee since Paul Ryan a dozen years ago. He’s also the youngest Democrat to lead the Budget Committee since Rep. Bill Gray, also of Philadelphia, led the committee in the 1980s.** **That's the good news...**

---
**The bad news? With a Republican majority in the House, the Budget Committee will be front and center as Republicans try and enact their MAGA agenda.**
* **They will try and cut Social Security benefits.**
* **They will try and weaponize the debt ceiling.**
* **They will try and cut federal support for healthcare, education and other vital programs.**

**But if we fight together, we WILL stop them.**
---
[SUPPORT OUR FIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55639634/382295219/1060786640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTdiMWVkZi05ODc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1aLsyiYYklSQYybObCluwye1kT6UDcoD2y0L9XZ1LtY=)

Are you in?
**
