name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: this is the last time I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, the time is here: This is my _final call _for grassroots support before the polls close tonight.

But before I ask, I want to express my gratitude for your unwavering support. **Thank you. Thank you. Thank you.**
Our race will make way for a stronger Senate majority to carry out our bold Democratic agenda. But the polls still show me in a dead heat with Herschel Walker, so it's going to come down to _every last vote_.
**That's why your support in this make-or-break moment is so important. Your $5 could very well determine if we can reach the final undecided voters we need to win in the eleventh hour. So please, I'm counting on you:**
**[Will you chip in $5 now – every dollar you're able to spare – to make sure we keep Georgia blue tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55639463/382294327/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5275-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTNiM2UyZS05ODc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LWrIZx_Z33mmM42x8m50M7ibiHCuG_ytsusQUzRwNlQ=)**
Thank you so much for your help – today and throughout this campaign. It means so much to me. Now let's win this one more time.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

clean_body: | | | Friend, the time is here: This is my final call for grassroots support before the polls close tonight. But before I ask, I want to express my gratitude for your unwavering support. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you. Our race will make way for a stronger Senate majority to carry out our bold Democratic agenda. But the polls still show me in a dead heat with Herschel Walker, so it's going to come down to every last vote. That's why your support in this make-or-break moment is so important. Your $5 could very well determine if we can reach the final undecided voters we need to win in the eleventh hour. So please, I'm counting on you: = Thank you so much for your help – today and throughout this campaign. It means so much to me. Now let's win this one more time. – Rev. body:

Derek, I’ll keep this quick: My runoff election against Herschel Walker is _today_ and national Republicans have spent _millions of dollars_ to defeat our campaign. With all signs pointing to a tight race, we're running out of time. **Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC before polls close tonight?**

clean_body: I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans all in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. | | Derek, I’ll keep this quick: My runoff election against Herschel Walker is today and national Republicans have spent millions of dollars to defeat our campaign. With all signs pointing to a tight race, we're running out of time. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC before polls close tonight? I believe that, at the end of the day, the people of Georgia are going to send me back to the Senate. But Derek, my opponent and the GOP will do all they can to try to get a win. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans all in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. With only a few hours until polls close, I need the full support of this grassroots team. Thank you for all that you do. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Georgia runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1431%2E5257348%2EEYWlal ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

It’s Election Day in Georgia...again.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221206_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1431%2E5257348%2EEYWlal ]Quickly, can you split a $10 contribution between Rev. Warnock’s
campaign and ours so he has the resources to continue running ads and
conducting voter outreach until the polls close tonight?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em_warnock.fJ5pfg&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221206_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1431%2E5257348%2EEYWlal ]SPLIT $10

Rev. Raphael Warnock’s victory in the last runoff put the Senate balance
of power at 50-50, with Vice President Kamala Harris’s tie-breaking vote.

But here’s how Rev. Warnock’s victory today, and a 51-49 Senate majority,
would be a major step forward:

If Rev. Warnock wins today, he will give Democrats the majority on every...
single ... Senate ... committee.

You read that right. For the last two years, Mitch McConnell and Senate
Republicans have used the dead-even divisions on every Senate committee to
stall our progress whenever possible.

With Rev. Warnock’s 51st vote in the Senate, Democrats can rapidly speed
up the pace on passing legislation and conducting processes like judicial
confirmations.

| [ Kirstie Alley Dead at 71 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42961%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1k64Qh2DXSL62Fwe2TheWg&sysid=1)
---
[ Emmy Award and Golden Globe winning actress Kirstie Alley has died at 71 following a “battle with cancer,” according to her family. A statement posted to her Twitter account read, “We are sad to inform you that our incredible, fierce and loving mother has passed away after a battle with cancer, only recently discovered.” ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42962%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aGqkqHpAklU62cURYngtsA&sysid=1)

| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42964%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2blttSxc2skAEIC%2f5CsGyw&sysid=1)
---

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42975%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dgGmYixWf6BEs9ykx24xVA&sysid=1)

PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |
---
Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Across the state, voters are casting their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue. That's why the GOP has made me their top target, flooding this race with millions of dollars in attack ads in the hopes of helping Herschel Walker flip this seat. But I'll let you in on a secret: Today's election is the final test for our grassroots movement – and with our bold agenda on the line, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas now. | | | | | | | Your support means so much. Thank you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? subject: Join Us This Saturday at Classic Bowling Center for our Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m.
body:
Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center | | | |
---
| | |
# Join us this Saturday!

---
|
---
|
---
|
#### **Fourth annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive **
---
| After a two-year hiatus due to COVID, I’m delighted to invite you to join me and some of my best friends as we host the Fourth Annual Bowl-a-Thon and Toy Drive, 2 p.m. to 5 p.m., Saturday, December 10 at Classic Bowling Center, 900 King Drive in Daly City. Donate a new unwrapped toy and bowl for free. The event is cosponsored by my friend Keith Okada, who goes by Keith O, a world-class DJ and bowler who has been a fixture at Classic Bowling for 20 years now.
---
This is such a fun day to relax and have fun and to get your competitive juices flowing playing some ten-pin. Most importantly, though, it is a way to bring some joy to children in need during the holidays. Thank you to our partner Classic Bowling Center which has become a community gathering place for Daly City residents and hosts generations of family members. Hope to see you there!

To RSVP, contact Mike on my staff: [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org)[ ](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Bowl-a-Thon%20and%20Toy%20Drive%20this%20Saturday%20in%20Daly%20City)or text: 415-845-1368
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=2798dd9621) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=2798dd9621).

body:

Fellow American,

Today's Senate runoff is going to be a turnout election.

This race will come down to who is more motivated - Raphael Warnock's team or OUR TEAM!

Fellow American, it's time to retire Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate - and the only way we can do that is if we help Herschel Walker **TODAY** turn out supporters to vote.

I am 100% behind Herschel, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b8803167544d4e70b66e57e1344f19d8&_e=w2WAOAD-Zgi8qBZUhwpuIfeC91TiHEyNoqkVUD49I-aH351wk6kc4uR3AtQAxS_ydiEVoi4ncHMK2XtCf7xojCX3AEurLmYg7dUyAFT0-f4OdP9WPfUJjaYvFcyNlpUtWriqA7cgKbr0hocHfgyE3xxhkYgdzWwQHh5uJakwES9DFGx5I5MDVjcpzd37g020aRHdPVWdkLsliExIOer34Hzb-Gg4kPtanzF7zIc2bCUcDawQMcPCS0lrCU_E9eyRcqRVA8cZfFenNr3Cdz4guB5j1COLA7wynZGzZn5y_GIxQMD5Ffm-0U52S-Ba11ZuLlWyTdpNa20sEdnos24vj1xt2uhQ4DYTkyWXTwIiH76eNQxj4J4AMl4xNo88ia3C-Lo8aTEgp90kyHvodCYXrnMehCHnoXa0Ul_f7a6UGxjrL40AG_lk4EYtFtEzzLR9)

clean_body: I am 100% behind Herschel Walker, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. | Fellow American, Today's Senate runoff is going to be a turnout election. This race will come down to who is more motivated - Raphael Warnock's team or OUR TEAM! Fellow American, it's time to retire Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate - and the only way we can do that is if we help Herschel Walker TODAY turn out supporters to vote. I am 100% behind Herschel, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. I helped Team Herschel record one of their last campaign ads that's airing across the state. Now I want to help Herschel raise the final dollars he needs to fully fund a massive voter turnout effort. In Washington, Herschel Walker will row the boat in the same direction that we're rowing here in Georgia - and help get America back on track. Let's send Herschel to the United States Senate to protect Georgia's values and keep our state a wonderful place to live, work, and raise a family! Thank you, Brian Kemp Governor of Georgia | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: Elon Musk calls ESG “the devil” - here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Have you heard about the radical Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda?| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this **_[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=d85ce61ef7bb469dbb3cff83384937f8&_t=54FBhrvNYgs2vYqfAoAhiqFPcHTdaMsTRPYdEJN11gtx1VYHoVbZhTMLl2AyhZ8MDuIQp6r2yWnY7Nt9TC0fkO5Vstw6-MO7NmmhYS0QqaE%3D)_**
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d85ce61ef7bb469dbb3cff83384937f8&_e=0d7aouCAAvqpq2dy5y60ndOCEjmv3l2Ql1Nogq9NNJSnVlC-7B0XTA-PSzGh-h66jfuEwhzpIkgCGnXc238H3uOSH_qUwRG5ZJuXJk6WGEHt0oSajQEHVA4SJbiP0XZstDHacCSugjtbaPqH6Zfg8RfEBUups4EAkess6tfSNkWqAwSvgWLLK8WRT1qWPb6yuC_fkoo4ZhsHay_vRUhuQRwNABWgACa0S3HEhHa_sAyKp2vWQhuGChYV3K5qSZAhDfZBx0GJd6RbgqfLK3Is_00xPCJgiSOw6Tx9HNG773R-eP6MHTiYNepUhT_FJ6Fqnsqs6LYkrTT4cJRmsNakKoyCTR4JMJDfiBVXo_K_ng2kBIuA-xwDF-4X6Sx5yPjNtFfn5POdxYaOuwdXihSvgnTnAQXJu65NzIBgbv41KRU%3D)
---
| | Peter, Across the country, the radical Left-wing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is taking over.** **_Have you heard of ESG?_ ** ** This radical agenda represents...
* **Racial quotas in the workplace**
* **Cancel culture for “wrongthink”**
* **Corporate donations for abortion**
* **Pushing the trans issue onto children**
* **Critical Race Theory**
* **Corporate welfare**
* **Anti-oil, “green new deal” mandates**
* **A Social Credit Score**

... all in one MASSIVE package. It’s being pushed by “woke” corporations and Left-leaning financial institutions that fund them. **But don’t just take it from us. Tesla and new Twitter CEO Elon Musk went as far as calling ESG “the devil.”**
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d85ce61ef7bb469dbb3cff83384937f8&_e=0d7aouCAAvqpq2dy5y60ndOCEjmv3l2Ql1Nogq9NNJSnVlC-7B0XTA-PSzGh-h66jfuEwhzpIkgCGnXc238H3uOSH_qUwRG5ZJuXJk6WGEHt0oSajQEHVA4SJbiP0XZstDHacCSugjtbaPqH6Zfg8RfEBUups4EAkess6tfSNkWqAwSvgWLLK8WRT1qWPb6yuC_fkoo4ZhsHay_vRUhuQRwNABWgACa0S3HEhHa_sAyKp2vWQhuGChYV3K5qSZAhDfZBx0GJd6RbgqfLK3Is_4YnqZbWHbzikFWI6B0N3TKxd98kbCul0jTT4aDCc11lUrzgyXj7pTW2zKI5Zh2lgTryLllh1ZqJ_f35pvqTkFsc58YDNe_Xn39gvsVajnIsEkiIgMET5kbb45idYC-zqMSlexXNKT3aFtPYvjRsFYA%3D)
---
| | Elon Musk has learned about the ESG agenda the hard way. _The S &P; kicked Musk’s Tesla off of their ESG 500 index despite Musk’s company being an electric car company._ _This shows what ESG scores are really about—punishing political enemies for the Left! _ Even though Elon Musk has a “green” auto company, a major ESG “ratings” organization gave Tesla a low score. **Leftist institutions can subjectively fudge the numbers and use the ESG score to punish anyone they want!** This agenda claims to assist ‘sustainable investing’ for individuals – but this is further proof that it’s actually a social credit score designed to blackball conservatives, independent-minded Americans, and anyone who is dangerous to the Left’s socialist plan for America.. **At Heritage Action, we’re FIGHTING BACK against this radical movement with a nationwide campaign to END ESG.** It starts by fighting back against the financial institutions on Wall Street that are pushing this ESG agenda!
---
| | [**HELP US FIGHT BACK TODAY >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d85ce61ef7bb469dbb3cff83384937f8&_e=0d7aouCAAvqpq2dy5y60ndOCEjmv3l2Ql1Nogq9NNJSnVlC-7B0XTA-PSzGh-h66jfuEwhzpIkgCGnXc238H3uOSH_qUwRG5ZJuXJk6WGEHt0oSajQEHVA4SJbiP0XZstDHacCSugjtbaPqH6Zfg8RfEBUups4EAkess6tfSNkWqAwSvgWLLK8WRT1qWPb6yuC_fkoo4ZhsHay_vRUhuQRwNABWgACa0S3HEhHa_sAyKp2vWQhuGChYV3K5qSZAhDfZBx0GJd6RbgqfLK3Is_y4gT4LBYf4Gf6o55lyRX0ML74QYOqnCcgsNHsF8CbXtgss1yNFt84PgUEIrgXko8ZbkxlHlJaA9j8n0YeJs5EqBEgDZO5ejbKN1sTPcr22YaQN2qUoNghQx1cBGts3vXmkHNzVzvnQFWWB8rBTZIC4%3D)
---
| | Our **ESG Hurts** campaign aims to raise awareness about the agenda and support the work of lawmakers who are fighting the ESG agenda. So far, we’ve had a BIG impact supporting state governments who keep their taxpayer dollars from funding ESG! This means:
* Protecting state pension and retirement accounts from being invested with financial firms who push for ESG.
* Making sure state contracts for banking and financial services are with institutions that are NOT pushing ESG.

**In 2022, multiple states have already sent a CLEAR message to the ESG powers-that-be and the Wall Street firms facilitating the agenda.**
* **MISSOURI divested $500M from woke investment firm BlackRock**
* **SOUTH CAROLINA divested $200M from BlackRock**
* **LOUISIANA also divested $800M from the Left-wing firm**
* **FLORIDA just divested $2 BILLION from BlackRock over ESG**

**These states are PROTECTING taxpayer dollars from funding a blatantly anti-American agenda!** Other states are fighting back—Oklahoma, Tennessee, and West Virginia have also taken prominent stands against ESG. Heritage Action’s “ESG Hurts” campaign has educated tens of thousands of Americans on this issue. And we’re backing the state legislation that is fighting to end ESG. **We need your help to keep this campaign moving in 2023–**** _and winning_****. Can we count on YOU to chip in and join our fight against the woke agenda?** Heritage Action is committed to supporting even more states in 2023 as they pass laws to protect America from the globalist ESG agenda. [_**Donate to Heritage Action today and keep ESG from Hurting America >>>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=d85ce61ef7bb469dbb3cff83384937f8&_e=0d7aouCAAvqpq2dy5y60ndOCEjmv3l2Ql1Nogq9NNJSnVlC-7B0XTA-PSzGh-h66jfuEwhzpIkgCGnXc238H3uOSH_qUwRG5ZJuXJk6WGEHt0oSajQEHVA4SJbiP0XZstDHacCSugjtbaPqH6Zfg8RfEBUups4EAkess6tfSNkWqAwSvgWLLK8WRT1qWPb6yuC_fkoo4ZhsHay_vRUhuQRwNABWgACa0S3HEhHa_sAyKp2vWQhuGChYV3K5qSZAhDfZBx0GJd6RbgqfLK3Is_7-QfN90YWkG8d1xFNN_--DOi5jSvClajYSp-pNxDisfAeaHEBvBchHd0OP_uT1wcPsz9rqKk9Wpkfu_0t2YagLM_RgN6FKpLNMVPv6YZ3dScT-HyVMO46qTELSuke112B_NsXsZiN7vVBSwRfTOiUs%3D)

clean_body: Have you heard about the radical Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda?| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | | | Peter, Across the country, the radical Left-wing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) agenda is taking over. Have you heard of ESG? This radical agenda represents... Racial quotas in the workplace Cancel culture for “wrongthink” Corporate donations for abortion Pushing the trans issue onto children Critical Race Theory Corporate welfare Anti-oil, “green new deal” mandates A Social Credit Score ... all in one MASSIVE package. It’s being pushed by “woke” corporations and Left-leaning financial institutions that fund them. But don’t just take it from us. Tesla and new Twitter CEO Elon Musk went as far as calling ESG “the devil.” | | | | Elon Musk has learned about the ESG agenda the hard way. The S &P; kicked Musk’s Tesla off of their ESG 500 index despite Musk’s company being an electric car company. This shows what ESG scores are really about—punishing political enemies for the Left! Even though Elon Musk has a “green” auto company, a major ESG “ratings” organization gave Tesla a low score. Leftist institutions can subjectively fudge the numbers and use the ESG score to punish anyone they want! This agenda claims to assist ‘sustainable investing’ for individuals – but this is further proof that it’s actually a social credit score designed to blackball conservatives, independent-minded Americans, and anyone who is dangerous to the Left’s socialist plan for America.. At Heritage Action, we’re FIGHTING BACK against this radical movement with a nationwide campaign to END ESG. It starts by fighting back against the financial institutions on Wall Street that are pushing this ESG agenda! | | | | Our ESG Hurts campaign aims to raise awareness about the agenda and support the work of lawmakers who are fighting the ESG agenda. So far, we’ve had a BIG impact supporting state governments who keep their taxpayer dollars from funding ESG! This means: Protecting state pension and retirement accounts from being invested with financial firms who push for ESG. Making sure state contracts for banking and financial services are with institutions that are NOT pushing ESG. In 2022, multiple states have already sent a CLEAR message to the ESG powers-that-be and the Wall Street firms facilitating the agenda. MISSOURI divested $500M from woke investment firm BlackRock SOUTH CAROLINA divested $200M from BlackRock LOUISIANA also divested $800M from the Left-wing firm FLORIDA just divested $2 BILLION from BlackRock over ESG These states are PROTECTING taxpayer dollars from funding a blatantly anti-American agenda! Other states are fighting back—Oklahoma, Tennessee, and West Virginia have also taken prominent stands against ESG. Heritage Action’s “ESG Hurts” campaign has educated tens of thousands of Americans on this issue. And we’re backing the state legislation that is fighting to end ESG. We need your help to keep this campaign moving in 2023– and winning. Can we count on YOU to chip in and join our fight against the woke agenda? Heritage Action is committed to supporting even more states in 2023 as they pass laws to protect America from the globalist ESG agenda. | | | | If Americans don’t learn the TRUTH about ESG – and lawmakers don’t put a stop to it – this agenda will take over our country. Heritage Action, will NEVER stop fighting until ESG is defeated, no matter what kind of opposition we face. body:
The radical woke left has devised a malicious plan to change the Georgia Senate Runoff. | | | | | |
---
| | Friend, the one race that will determine how much control Democrats have in the Senate, could be decided by shady election lawyers and court rulings, not the ballot box! **[PROTECT OUR COURTS AND HOLD THE SENATE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=50442f54fe&e=fdefed58de)**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=cf8f00a487&e=fdefed58de)
---
Friend, The radical woke left has devised a malicious plan to change the Georgia Senate Runoff, and they have a secret weapon... **The Left is using their lawsuit machine to get their way in Georgia and deny the will of the American people.**[**Don’t let them, DEFEND OUR COURTS >>>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b0f040f3f7&e=fdefed58de) Just last week, Georgia's Supreme Court sided with activist politicians and allowed some Georgia counties to participate in Saturday voting.
**_Out of the ten counties that plan to hold early voting, all lean Democrat. _****Georgia's election rules are now corrupted and manipulated by an activist lawsuit machine.**
---
| | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3423341470&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | **With a single ruling, a state Supreme Court can decide the fate of our entire country.** This is the exact reason why we founded Fair Courts America. We are committed to standing against injustices created by woke activists in the judicial system, uniting voters across the political spectrum, and restoring America’s courts to their original purpose of rendering equal justice under the law.
---
[**SUPPORT OUR MISSION**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4e4ef85e60&e=fdefed58de)
---
When progressive activists seek to take control of the courts away from the people, Fair Courts America is there to defend our judicial system. **Our courts should not be used as a political weapon, and our elections should be left in the hands of the people. ** [**Join the fight and help protect America's courts!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=944a3b08c5&e=fdefed58de) Thank you for your support, Fair Courts America Team

name: Jay Inslee
subject: It's our turn
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is a warning.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/aR3jCZ3PG-h4/WVFYUERkTXRscXVNR2dFUE5XSkxWLzZvYWNBaU9MTmFZczFYemZtVlZna2wwZHc2QXEyTE9LVWtUSXN6ZjZXMldTQTZNemdwU2svVGR3cVY2empkVzBZcTRSMUYxZTNDT1FOU09UczdQZ2c9S0/cDRHenNHZXZqRjdTNEl3Y1hxdmZGdG50VTdWWC91N3Z2VGIyc0RDbHY5UT0S1) Friend -- I need to warn you about the anti-choice groups we expect to fight tooth and nail to prevent us from enshrining the right to choose into Washington state's constitution this legislative session. Over in Kansas, anti-choice efforts spent $5.4 million trying to strip the right to abortion away from residents. Even down in blue California, a ballot committee raised hundreds of thousands of dollars to try and stop the people of California from enshrining the right to abortion into their constitution. Our fundamental right to abortion access shouldn't depend on which political party is in power. So I'm fighting in Washington state to permanently protect the rights of Washingtonians to safe and accessible abortions. **But as we prepare for the far-right, anti-abortion apparatus to turn its focus here, we must be prepared for my legally mandated fundraising freeze.** [_**Please, before our fundraising freeze this Friday at midnight, will you chip in $10 so we can hit our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/AGbNcdeb-WF~/WVFYUERkTXRscXVNR2dFUE5XSkxWLzZvYWNBaU9MTmFZczFYemZtVlZna2wwZHc2QXEyTE9LVWtUSXN6ZjZXMldTQTZNemdwU2svVGR3cVY2empkVzBZcTRSMUYxZTNDT1FOU09UczdQZ2c9S0/cDRHenNHZXZqRjdTNEl3Y1hxdmZGdG50VTdWWC91N3Z2VGIyc0RDbHY5UT0S1) [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/AGbNcdeb-WF~/WVFYUERkTXRscXVNR2dFUE5XSkxWLzZvYWNBaU9MTmFZczFYemZtVlZna2wwZHc2QXEyTE9LVWtUSXN6ZjZXMldTQTZNemdwU2svVGR3cVY2empkVzBZcTRSMUYxZTNDT1FOU09UczdQZ2c9S0/cDRHenNHZXZqRjdTNEl3Y1hxdmZGdG50VTdWWC91N3Z2VGIyc0RDbHY5UT0S1) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/rrL_JmX2dbhp/WVFYUERkTXRscXVNR2dFUE5XSkxWLzZvYWNBaU9MTmFZczFYemZtVlZna2wwZHc2QXEyTE9LVWtUSXN6ZjZXMldTQTZNemdwU2svVGR3cVY2empkVzBZcTRSMUYxZTNDT1FOU09UczdQZ2c9S0/cDRHenNHZXZqRjdTNEl3Y1hxdmZGdG50VTdWWC91N3Z2VGIyc0RDbHY5UT0S1)
---
Every Washingtonian should have the right to a safe and accessible abortion. Our state must be a sanctuary state when it comes to the right to choose -- for good.
But it bears repeating: The same type of extreme, anti-abortion Republicans who pushed to get _Roe v. Wade_ overturned also live right here in Washington. And the ones who don't? Living out of state frankly won't stop them from sending dark money our way just like they've done across the country.
So, before this fundraising freeze begins, I want to make sure our campaign is prepared. Humbly, I'm counting on you.
[_**Please, chip in $10 towards our $50,000 Beat the Freeze goal today.**_](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/AGbNcdeb-WF~/WVFYUERkTXRscXVNR2dFUE5XSkxWLzZvYWNBaU9MTmFZczFYemZtVlZna2wwZHc2QXEyTE9LVWtUSXN6ZjZXMldTQTZNemdwU2svVGR3cVY2empkVzBZcTRSMUYxZTNDT1FOU09UczdQZ2c9S0/cDRHenNHZXZqRjdTNEl3Y1hxdmZGdG50VTdWWC91N3Z2VGIyc0RDbHY5UT0S1)
Thank you so much for your support.
Very truly yours,
Jay

clean_body: This is a warning. | Friend -- I need to warn you about the anti-choice groups we expect to fight tooth and nail to prevent us from enshrining the right to choose into Washington state's constitution this legislative session. Over in Kansas, anti-choice efforts spent $5.4 million trying to strip the right to abortion away from residents. Even down in blue California, a ballot committee raised hundreds of thousands of dollars to try and stop the people of California from enshrining the right to abortion into their constitution. Our fundamental right to abortion access shouldn't depend on which political party is in power. So I'm fighting in Washington state to permanently protect the rights of Washingtonians to safe and accessible abortions. But as we prepare for the far-right, anti-abortion apparatus to turn its focus here, we must be prepared for my legally mandated fundraising freeze. | Every Washingtonian should have the right to a safe and accessible abortion. Our state must be a sanctuary state when it comes to the right to choose -- for good. But it bears repeating: The same type of extreme, anti-abortion Republicans who pushed to get Roe v. Wade overturned also live right here in Washington. And the ones who don't? Living out of state frankly won't stop them from sending dark money our way just like they've done across the country. So, before this fundraising freeze begins, I want to make sure our campaign is prepared. Humbly, I'm counting on you. Thank you so much for your support. Very truly yours, Jay

body:
| **Today's the day, folks!** Across the state, voters are casting their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue.

That's why the GOP has made me their top target, flooding this race with millions of dollars in attack ads in the hopes of helping Herschel Walker flip this seat. But I'll let you in on a secret: **We're going to win - but not without your support, friend.**

Today's election is the final test for our grassroots movement - and with our bold agenda on the line, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas now. **That's why I'm looking for 10,000 grassroots folks like you to step up with a donation right away so we can power our final GOTV efforts and keep Georgia blue.**

clean_body: | | If you want to see Raphael Warnock re-elected, then you're in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | ONE. LAST. CHANCE. One last chance, Peter. One last chance to expand our Senate majority. One last chance to minimize Trump’s influence in the Senate. One last chance to make sure Total Disaster Herschel Walker stays far away from elected office. One last chance to power a true progressive Black champion to victory — again. TODAY IS THE DAY WE DO IT ALL, Peter, AND WE CAN’T AFFORD TO WASTE A SINGLE SECOND. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The stakes have truly never been higher than they are right now, and we need every single one of you to step up to the plate. If you’re located in Georgia and haven’t cast your vote yet, click to find your polling place. For more information on this election, click . If you aren’t able to vote in this election but want to help the team here at The Collective PAC mobilize as many voters as possible, click to make a donation of $10 or anything you can right now. Thank you, Peter. We’ll see you at the polls in Georgia! — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I am 100% behind Herschel Walker, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. |
---
Fellow American,

Today's Senate runoff is going to be a turnout election.

This race will come down to who is more motivated - Raphael Warnock's team or OUR TEAM!

Fellow American, it's time to retire Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate - and the only way we can do that is if we help Herschel Walker **TODAY** turn out supporters to vote.

I am 100% behind Herschel, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c33077e2396d492d94f52467044f077b&_e=dL92biSNuPFKLi69RBX4gKuKqLCScxHo8b5ZSXJTJQRy3yqkFp03lSqxi62yvwCTjv69v2klznzGopIPVjUiHf40HtehXzqut0ccsmlm2mnt9hVZES_a273r-twBSB5GFyO4qyJAahGvrvBOmQLyX6Uda_mJN6K7csMgqlO05g74b7YVypy3cq7jGjjtc9GFp27ueSWxFR1VrWrF_Ul54qyuKUt8jtkitZP08RXtO0e3jWhj-MhT9WRlPBnA52IbFcLLx8S58LU8fADayIMjhM5lrWoiEa_83gIbWSSsGVlWAZAUkbP_pXMmTizJw9jPfjKz_i_1IFvdzI5H4Y6xHQMD122IwHakfT8rZ14oHF-pXWjTh5XbKbSA9w_eCQ3AQQr9qomc8ioMpb634XorWiBL5mccU1tjvRk_z5nj4z5lZUtZltrPkkttNBveZxe-)

clean_body: I am 100% behind Herschel Walker, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. | Fellow American, Today's Senate runoff is going to be a turnout election. This race will come down to who is more motivated - Raphael Warnock's team or OUR TEAM! Fellow American, it's time to retire Raphael Warnock from the United States Senate - and the only way we can do that is if we help Herschel Walker TODAY turn out supporters to vote. I am 100% behind Herschel, and I am personally asking for your help to Get-Out-The-Vote. - I helped Team Herschel record one of their last campaign ads that's airing across the state. Now I want to help Herschel raise the final dollars he needs to fully fund a massive voter turnout effort. In Washington, Herschel Walker will row the boat in the same direction that we're rowing here in Georgia - and help get America back on track. Let's send Herschel to the United States Senate to protect Georgia's values and keep our state a wonderful place to live, work, and raise a family! Thank you, Brian Kemp Governor of Georgia | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: Will you join me in supporting marriage equality?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
This is a historic opportunity.

Team, Last week, the U.S. Senate passed the Respect for Marriage Act, a historic bill to protect the rights, freedom, and dignity of same-sex and interracial couples. Now it’s the House’s turn — and though I don’t take office for another few weeks, I am still going to do my part to get this vital legislation across the finish line so President Biden can sign it into law. And I’m hoping you will do the same. _**[Friend, will you add your name next to mine on our petition calling for the House to pass the Respect for Marriage Act?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642374/382309899/-1353455840?refcode=email_120622_marriage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRhZDg5Yi1hOTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQh5HBJ51r8_hF7UGoWYVRdwPNFgvKFsoQ7B3i1A6co=&emci=8e14287c-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=824ad89b-a975-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=19954364)**_ | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642375/382309900/-1353455840?refcode=email_120622_marriage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRhZDg5Yi1hOTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQh5HBJ51r8_hF7UGoWYVRdwPNFgvKFsoQ7B3i1A6co=&emci=8e14287c-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=824ad89b-a975-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=19954364)
---
This year’s horrific Dobbs decision stripping away a woman’s right to choose made it all too clear that we cannot rely on Supreme Court precedent to protect Americans’ basic rights.
The Respect for Marriage Act ensures that no matter what the far-right SCOTUS majority tries to do, millions of Americans who are in loving, same-sex and interracial relationships will continue to have access to marriage rights and protections under federal law.
[**Supporting this bill is an easy call, and I’m proud to advocate for its passage. Will you join me, friend?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55642376/382309901/378752410?refcode=email_120622_marriage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjRhZDg5Yi1hOTc1LWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QQh5HBJ51r8_hF7UGoWYVRdwPNFgvKFsoQ7B3i1A6co=&emci=8e14287c-a375-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=824ad89b-a975-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=19954364)
Thank you,
Brittany Pettersen
Congresswoman-elect, Colorado’s 7th District

| Email is a great way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/y6N32-PBR02A61hdKqQ9kg2?unsubscribedata=kiz5fFcD%2Fs8SOMuYs89DNsyzpwm%2FTyKVx791i7QeshLADds3W%2BgGRCX4rkEckjuPhSgnIXDhrlmObOiZrANAd5wZ2ZpNO1ZACyH9dM4bSNabdTxJSGbVbB%2BnDGyl%2BK5vCXLHaPwbxrnMqG97vWFPhi3JmV2QTptnompp2thKyxN37j6DotT4AEvV43wnfYUGrWKkBEQyZpDDRlRwXwqI5zsyQV1sEVe%2BBE8IYZfZf%2BLrI8Hn7NEOXhJ%2BSLkXTinMxs6lzCAQXHlJYoiO5xvH3LMck%2FwxFN5td92yj%2Fm68A0%2FzFu2B19l2UYHshRs6gCotDbVEZ%2BQFf5TZoW9mwKUqmdg6r9Gasd2nugQeTLqglxXQj1t3%2Fl6QQw2jPwF%2BZ%2FQ%2BuRJaI3x3fbw%2FHadmST42NWAgKMiCT%2FwIzkj7qO1pN2cd8%2FuwMHkx9PERWxQlSJ6)**.

Friend,

The runoff election is less than 24 hours away.

We are trying to make every hour count, **but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be.**

We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us – even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow.

**Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history.**

We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff.

clean_body: I have some bad news. | Our fundraising has slowed down. If we're going to turn out voters in the final 24 hours of this runoff, we've got to crank things up. It's now or never. Friend, The runoff election is less than 24 hours away. We are trying to make every hour count, but our fundraising numbers aren't where they should be. We always knew that Raphael Warnock would outraise us – even in the runoff, but the financial gap continues to grow. Senator Warnock has raised over $153 million and is on track to break all fundraising records in American history. We're in the turnout phase of the campaign, so missing a fundraising goal means that we don't have the money to invest in our ground game for the final hours of this runoff. Friend, I know the number of emails and text messages we send can be annoying, but they are the backbone of our fundraising program. When you don't respond and we miss our fundraising goal, our entire campaign suffers. If we don't properly fund our voter turnout operation, we're going to lose. It's now or never. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, To enter without making a contribution, Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The promotion begins on December 6, 2022, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on December 6, 2022, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on December 6, 2022. Five (5) winners will receive the following prize: one (1) autographed Run Herschel Run hat signed by Herschel Walker. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia, and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this promotion may apply, they are listed in the . The Sponsor is Team Herschel, Inc., PO Box 501707, Atlanta, GA 31150. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ca4c13e5160f4791911364197affb8ea&_e=0h5vRLQl1Np6ku-4DsQ9oPpNX1oO-AHqzuBt0DnP21vKZCU-XalhEKumy2Bb1BjDwPYWa9zHxIP57tgUfL6v0a7w-apat5cd8ELgB93JluxrBRS_0akG5HcEXKP-jXgFXMeNbDyIZUw4qy5Jvdw_M2EVk2COhcuo6NfQ-7ZeYEfKPRubH4ypw3-zyyfYsyQ9PnsoL4TE50N5TguRnOk0IIZ-uHI4CAMzt97KzVHaKbyK26pRCPMdWHk2SppjB4KQhAdeUdT6-jyEFg-671UtVFL_79uI-OqJQ9BkqWg9iAwsP_7-c6E77e_o6_olaLV9cfvFPTeJfkkq2PP4Qgyg_G_TF5vIyNU5ryjk2F3o2gRTmVXQsIOkf07bJdNQ_SgLcTeWNtDUL7E7ogThqJjNeQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, COVID lockdowns enforced by liberal mayors and governors throughout the pandemic have absolutely failed our children. Every report shows that children are better off IN SCHOOL. Academically, economically, and emotionally. But right now, Fauci won’t say that parents can count on open schools this winter.
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ca4c13e5160f4791911364197affb8ea&_e=0h5vRLQl1Np6ku-4DsQ9oPpNX1oO-AHqzuBt0DnP21vKZCU-XalhEKumy2Bb1BjDwPYWa9zHxIP57tgUfL6v0a7w-apat5cd8ELgB93JluxrBRS_0akG5HcEXKP-jXgFXMeNbDyIZUw4qy5Jvdw_M2EVk2COhcuo6NfQ-7ZeYEfKPRubH4ypw3-zyyfYsyQ9PnsoL4TE50N5TguRnOk0IIZ-uHI4CAMzt97KzVHaKbyK26pRCPMdWHk2SppjB4KQeqOlKNbkJjw6Gii9ubSJYoZWAzeGuxsoYRPcoxN0FbyjbLxXf7ASlptXeZb_al_2iIKNsDbKFb7wP_hRpberaO-Fg9bmvIngkhteioh0hFw6tmI1wOZPcudBm_9vmcCdzJnoa_cScO4pictXrlpnzA%3D%3D)
---
Peter, this is madness. To return to lockdown education again would be a terrible idea that puts our kids more at risk, and adds stress on parents who are trying to make ends meet in this economy. Our conservative leaders must fight to keep schools open. **_[I AGREE>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ca4c13e5160f4791911364197affb8ea&_e=0h5vRLQl1Np6ku-4DsQ9oPpNX1oO-AHqzuBt0DnP21vKZCU-XalhEKumy2Bb1BjDwPYWa9zHxIP57tgUfL6v0a7w-apat5cd8ELgB93JluxrBRS_0akG5HcEXKP-jXgFXMeNbDyIZUw4qy5Jvdw_M2EVk2COhcuo6NfQ-7ZeYEfKPRubH4ypw3-zyyfYsyQ9PnsoL4TE50N5TguRnOk0IIZ-uHI4CAMzt97KzVHaKbyK26pRCPMdWHk2SppjB4KQfTZwIJc6MhpFwu4Hm6fHjftgtp1214j9i1kapBeOaVJcF2IJDb9GYbp47ow_6SETEQiBijeoW0z0qGOtVo6h8cT9KKpJ7od48psFMhHPw7ObSOzDbwlYq3xmSiW9grrOob34ihMy5SnViDDiL32IiA%3D%3D)_ ** During the Trump-Pence Administration, we fought to keep kids in school..._and now liberals want to take them out again._ We cannot allow the COVID fear-mongering from this bureaucratic regime to overrun the parents and students of this nation. After nearly three years, we know the price of school shutdowns is just too high. And if we allow this nonsense to continue, our nation will face terrible consequences. We must keep schools open. If you agree, please chip in now to stand up for American children and say NO to school closures.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel?=
subject: Getting to Work in DC
disclaimer_text: paid for by Nathaniel Moran for Congress
body:
I hope you enjoyed a Thanksgiving filled with food, family, and fun. | | |
---
| | Good afternoon!

I hope you enjoyed a Thanksgiving filled with food, family, and fun. Much of my November was spent in Washington, DC, where I attended an orientation for all incoming members of Congress, hired the staff that will serve Congressional District 1, and worked with other Republicans to establish the rules we will use to guide our efforts in the coming Congressional session.

It has been a privilege to represent East Texas as I have begun to work for you in the Capitol. In an effort to be transparent and keep all citizens informed about the work being done by your federal government, I have been providing weekly radio updates. Please take a listen at the link below if you'd like to know more about what we've been working on since Election Day.

["First Check-in with Congressional District 1"](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=291ba15986&e=bbce4dd6ad)
["First Week of Orientation"](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=364b3e4f48&e=bbce4dd6ad)
["Preparing for First Few Days in Congress"](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=c713e35bea&e=bbce4dd6ad)

We eagerly anticipate January 3, 2023, when I will be officially sworn in as the next Congressman from the First Congressional District of Texas. Thank you for your continued support and prayers as we continue along this journey of service.
---
| |
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran
Congressman-Elect, First District of Texas

---

body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55643414/382315089/-1345694891?amount=10&refcode=UD_20221206_EMSPL_E4_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5M2JhMTU1LWIxNzUtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BcTDsoCsbS56CuKXhlUmN0NTVtpwc-xECtx2F2JfHQk=) **Today's the day, Peter!** Across the state, voters are casting their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue.

That's why the GOP has made me their top target, flooding this race with millions of dollars in attack ads in the hopes of helping Herschel Walker flip this seat. But I'll let you in on a secret: **We're going to win – but not without your support, Peter.**

Today's election is the final test for our grassroots movement – and with our bold agenda on the line, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas now. **That's why I'm looking for 10,000 grassroots folks like you to step up with a donation right away so we can power our final GOTV efforts and keep Georgia blue.**

clean_body: | = Today's the day, Peter! Across the state, voters are casting their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue. That's why the GOP has made me their top target, flooding this race with millions of dollars in attack ads in the hopes of helping Herschel Walker flip this seat. But I'll let you in on a secret: We're going to win – but not without your support, Peter. Today's election is the final test for our grassroots movement – and with our bold agenda on the line, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas now. That's why I'm looking for 10,000 grassroots folks like you to step up with a donation right away so we can power our final GOTV efforts and keep Georgia blue. So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Raphael Warnock and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = Your support means so much. name: VoteVets.org
subject: Please sign our petition telling Congress to pass a FULL YEAR appropriation for the defense budget. This will fund programs critical to Veterans and their families.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Programs to modernize base housing? That’s in the defense budget.
#
Derek -
As you read this, Republicans are blocking this year’s defense budget — legislation that is critical not just to our national security, but to our Service Members and their families.
The time for short-term funding bills that Republicans can constantly hold hostage is over. President Biden is calling for a full year’s worth of funding for the Department of Defense — and we are backing him up.
First and foremost, we need a full year of funding so that we can properly address rising security threats to all of us and keep us safe. Rising threats from China and Russia. We can’t defend against them if the budget is constantly in limbo.
But the defense budget does so much more:
Programs to build new childcare centers for military families? That’s in the defense budget.
Programs to help save lives and get help for members of the military contemplating suicide? That’s in the defense budget.
So yes, this bill is about the very security of the United States.
But it is also so much more. And we need your help to get it passed:
[**Please sign our petition telling Congress to pass a FULL YEAR appropriation for the defense budget. This will fund programs critical to Veterans and their families. Short-term fixes that need to be renegotiated every month are not good enough.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/221206_vv_ndaa_defense_budget/?source=em221206-2-15&refcode2=7222.3013755.-Cjeuj&t=1&akid=7222%2E3013755%2E-Cjeuj)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/221206_vv_ndaa_defense_budget/?source=em221206-2-15&refcode2=7222.3013755.-Cjeuj&t=2&akid=7222%2E3013755%2E-Cjeuj)
---
We cannot delay, and we certainly cannot allow Kevin McCarthy to dictate the terms of this debate again in a few months. The time to act and pass a full-year appropriation is NOW.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/221206_vv_ndaa_defense_budget/?source=em221206-2-15&refcode2=7222.3013755.-Cjeuj&t=3&akid=7222%2E3013755%2E-Cjeuj)
---

subject: Our Border is the Battlefield
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Border Security PAC
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=344c968662&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,The number one issue in this country is **border security.** I live at the border in El Paso so I know the chaos that happens here every single day.It’s worse than it ever has been despite the media’s absolute refusal to report it.For some reason, even our Republicans won’t go as hard to secure our border as they need to. They run on securing the border and then cut deals with Democrats to keep it open. **They SHOULD be impeaching Mayorkas. They should be making an ACTUAL barrier. THEY SHOULD NOT ALLOW THIS MESS!** I’m a Border Patrol wife who has seen up close and personal what it means when the Southern Border is left to the cartels... that’s why I’ve opened this PAC.
| [HELP IRENE SECURE OUR BORDER!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fa8904c3bc&e=fdefed58de)
---
With this PAC, we’re going to do one thing: support candidates that will vow to secure our border and OPPOSE any Republican who is in office complacent about this issue.Sadly, the only thing that gets action in DC is money. That’s why we aim to be a financial juggernaut. With the right funding, we can get results and get action. That’s the language these people understand so we need to speak it.I cannot continue to sit by as this happens. I ran for Congress twice but the Open Borders Veronica Escobar and her dark money have continued to hold this seat. Now I’m taking the fight national.I need your help and I need it today. We want to show $14,000 in grassroots donations on our first day of launch. We can do it if everyone who receives this email donates $20.**I’m asking you because I truly need you. Will you pitch in and help me secure our border once and for all?**
| [Donate $20 right now! ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b979855642&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [Donate $50 right now! ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=afc9265b0d&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [Donate MORE right now! ](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=bcd846cace&e=fdefed58de)
---
This is absolutely a battle for the soul and sovereignty of our nation. With your support, we can win it.
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ca9e7a7f13&e=fdefed58de)
|

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Across the state, voters are casting their ballots in our critical runoff race to keep Georgia blue. That's why the GOP has made me their top target, flooding this race with millions of dollars in attack ads in the hopes of helping Herschel Walker flip this seat. But I'll let you in on a secret: Today's election is the final test for our grassroots movement – and with our bold agenda on the line, we can't afford to take our foot off the gas now. | | | | | | | Your support means so much. Thank you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkEFzgyAQhX8N3nRwQTAHD21t2plOc-8pQwCVVMQQjJP8-qJtesjMzh6-994yPF3ljGPCONvQRFWCiUarxFSAAXLADAjOCWSMHxpKSywxV1JuGKJYW2H6TOSz8N45m0lnk65SOSMNPhBBC1LwXIq8xCWVjFIJBJpN0lddCOMZkScE2ziN11o5O4sgu8zryyUeiliKQWqfBq9FsHoIqbOIbKdg92c3eakRqZug0kcbArZ4rFZmioE6pn6JFHYUph3uTFg3RTupobg73BD0igbZp-y1LbeH2_GbR3k_9EZF4QF2RsV_1Lc2f7fjp0t8pcbZ9L05Mx4LateCllri271prhXizwhgjQGsDcDpa7Z-OtqPt5Tv5vTEdrZYRHiJO1xH_e_8O5KtvS-U1z-QZoxY)

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkM1ugzAQhJ_G3ED2GuzkwKEpSiNVzb2nyPFPcIUxMSYoffoa2vQQabWHb2bW8uiaMI4p42xbZqoWTBitMlsDBiCAGVBMKBSMn01ZbrDEXEm5ZajE2gnbFYLMIgTvXSG9y9paEkUYlSWpTMmMkpXeYGCGbZgq-ZaYrKvbGIcR0RcE-zQmaK28m0WUbRH07ZYOJSxFL3XIY9AiOt3H3DtE91N0p9FPQWpEGxNV_mxDwBaP08pOKdCk1C-Rwg3CXvoHE85PyU4bqB4O30e9ol52-f28O4hBVXJM8qnvrErCE2ytSv9ovi_k4IYPn4VaDbPtOjsyngq6rAUttaS3O2vuNeI7BLDGANYG4Po5uzB9ufe3nB_n_MqOrlpEeE073gf97_w7Uqy9L5Q3P6ScjYs)

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking. Thank you! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Friend, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil. He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: 1 in 7 homes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Investors purchased one in seven of the homes sold in the largest metro areas last year.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15527%2E3422442%2EdrAtyF)
In 2021,**investors bought nearly one in seven homes sold** in the 40 largest metropolitan areas.
That’s a real problem because corporate landlords tend to be more likely to evict tenants and aggressively raise rents, and they worsen our country’s existing housing crisis. These Wall Street investors have targeted Black neighborhoods, contributing to gentrification and preventing families from being able to afford to purchase a home.
Katie co-sponsored the Stop Wall Street Landlords Act to rein in the greed of Wall Street and help make housing more affordable. **[Sign our petition to show your support for passing this bill.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-wall-street-landlords/?source=EMAE06_WSL_20221206_V1_F&t=2&akid=15527%2E3422442%2EdrAtyF)**
**[Show your support ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-wall-street-landlords/?source=EMAE06_WSL_20221206_V1_F&t=3&akid=15527%2E3422442%2EdrAtyF)**
While campaigning, Katie heard from plenty of families who were concerned their kids won’t be able to afford to live in the same Orange County neighborhoods they grew up in. The rising cost of housing is squeezing families, and Congress needs to act to ensure private equity firms don’t own all of our homes.
Thanks for being on Team Porter.
—Team KP
**[Show your support ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-wall-street-landlords/?source=EMAE06_WSL_20221206_V1_F&t=4&akid=15527%2E3422442%2EdrAtyF)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE06_WSL_20221206_V1_F&t=5&akid=15527%2E3422442%2EdrAtyF)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=6&akid=15527%2E3422442%2EdrAtyF)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=15527%2E3422442%2EdrAtyF).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Julia, Finance Director (via Justice Democrats)
subject: Where your donation goes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In just a few short years, Justice Democrats has ensured AOC, Jamaal
Bowman, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee won historic races, helped re-elect the
Squad, and transformed progressive politics. Others write off our
campaigns as impossible, but we know that’s not true — it’s just that the
odds are stacked against us. The number one reason why: money.

JD has grown exponentially to accommodate for the scale of work it takes
to win races against the establishment, because 95% of the time, the
candidate with the most money wins. It’s un-democratic, but true.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122627?refcode=em20221206-26428&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp ]It’s for this reason that I’m asking you to make a donation to Justice
Democrats today — one I can promise you personally will make a difference
for us AND our future candidates. Can you rush a gift right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122627?refcode=em20221206-26428&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp ]Contribute $3

We don’t raise money for the sake of it, or ask for your donation lightly.
It’s because we have real operations to sustain, and each one is critical
to the success of our candidates, and our movement in the long-term. I
want to share with you some examples of what your donation will fund, but
first I have a request to make...

We don’t win our races by accident — we create our path to victory
carefully for every candidate, meaning every program we budget for is
absolutely essential.

We promise to always use your donations strategically and efficiently, but
we do need your support in order to fund these critical operations. Right
now we are falling far behind the numbers we need to keep all of our
programs running.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122627?refcode=em20221206-26428&t=1003&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp ]Can you contribute $3 today to sustain our work as we
prepare to launch these critical programs for the next cycle?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122627?refcode=em20221206-26428&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp ]Contribute $3

Here’s just a sample of what your donations help fund:

* Highly-detailed data analysis to identify districts where we seek to
recruit progressive candidates to primary entrenched incumbents
* Intense campaign training on communications, political, financial, and
field strategy for newly recruited Justice Democrat candidates
* Candidate management while our recruited Justice Democrats are still
building out their program and staff
* Year-round fundraising support, plus direct fundraising for our
candidates
* Staff who embed into campaigns and offer rapid response support on the
ground
* Transitional support for winning candidates as they prepare to enter
Congress

As you can see, we don’t take this work lightly — we know what we’re
up against, and we do everything in our power to set our candidates up
for success. There’s no other organization that does what we do. But
we cannot do it without you.

Because of Justice Democrats, working class candidates from diverse
communities across America have a fighting shot to reclaim power in
Congress. But that’s all on the line if we can’t revive our
fundraising ASAP.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/122627?refcode=em20221206-26428&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp ]Please Peter,
will you rush a donation to JD today
so we can keep doing our critical work to elect progressive candidates
and transform the Democratic Party?

In solidarity,

Julia Eddy, Finance Director

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221206-26428-footer&t=1026&refcode2=26428_1203867_idWUhp&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=26428%2E1203867%2EidWUhp

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
